subject: short

body:
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250131-2&t=1&akid=1612%2E1088799%2Es0a870)
You're receiving this message because you have supported Democrats in the past. **Rob Bonta is fighting for justice and progress for all as California's Attorney General.** If you want to stop receiving emails from us, [click here](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1612%2E1088799%2Es0a870).
---
Hey, I wanted to reach out because **our first end-of-month deadline of the year is coming up in just a few hours, and we’re still short of our goal.**
I’m hard at work fighting for Californians and standing up to the recent wave of harmful and unlawful attacks from the Trump administration. But that means I don’t have as much time to fundraise, so I’m hoping you can help.
**[Chip in $20, $5, or even $1 to our people-powered campaign before midnight to help us continue our fight for justice and progress.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250131-2?refcode=em20250131-1612&refcode2=1612_1088799_s0a870&akid=1612%2E1088799%2Es0a870)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250131-2?refcode=em20250131-1612&amount=5&refcode2=1612_1088799_s0a870&akid=1612%2E1088799%2Es0a870)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1612%2E1088799%2Es0a870)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1612%2E1088799%2Es0a870)

To give by check:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
Email us: [info@robbonta.com](mailto:info@robbonta.com)

body:

| The stakes are laid out in front of us.

In his first week, Trump:

**✅ **_Removed guard rails for equity in the workplace_
**✅ **_Withdrew_**🇺🇸 **_from the Paris climate agreement_
**✅ **_Froze most federal hiring_

**But I won’t stop fighting for our shared beliefs–whether working across the aisle or pushing back against the administration.**

We have our first monthly deadline of the year tonight, and we’re hoping we can count on your support. West Michigan will be key in challenging the Trump administration’s disastrous policies, but we need to know you’re with us: [_**Will you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can ahead of tonight’s midnight deadline?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101342264/525661306/591366052?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-01-31_2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDYxMzA5OS0yZmUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x_c53g1TX9lMGb4fxm50uprp4uvUeHdfjzoTrp2CwD4=)

| Peter,

I’ll keep this short.

We’ve got a long year ahead of us. As the Trump administration lays out its priorities to pardon January 6th insurrectionists and line the pockets of the ultra-wealthy like Elon Musk, I’m working with my team to strategize for the year ahead.

**Marylanders deserve real solutions for the most pressing issues we face, from driving down living costs to creating good-paying jobs to building a better, safer, and more inclusive future.** I’m committed to working across the aisle to make it happen and ready to fight back against policies that harm hardworking families. [_**But before tonight’s midnight deadline, I need your help. Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can to my campaign to help us hit our $5,000 fundraising goal and prepare for any challenges that may come our way?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101342316/525661470/-1146661722?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2025-01-31_3&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDkxNTliOWYtMmZlMC1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DqTj3kmckV26eJPHAhvpxedlfR7ImncrYC1dOvLt9NI=)

name: Florida Decides Healthcare
subject: Join the fight to defend Medicaid!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
By expanding Medicaid access in a state like Florida, we can send a strong and clear message to politicians in Washington to keep their hands off of our healthcare!

| Peter,

While Medicaid enrollment continues to reach record-breaking levels, politicians in Washington are doubling down on their efforts to slash funding for critical public services like Medicaid.

These proposed cuts would leave millions of Americans vulnerable without access to quality, affordable care. **As one of 10 states that have yet to expand Medicaid,_the impact would be particularly devastating in Florida!_**

Our team at **Florida Decides Healthcare** is working to expand Medicaid access and strengthen our healthcare system so we can defend this vital program from any attempts to limit access to those who need it the most.
---
| [JOIN THE FIGHT TO DEFEND MEDICAID → ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101342427/525662059/2074326069?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-01-31_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmMjFmNWI1LTJmZTAtZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Y3wFJMmPsgdXwM-fabWFvGirzOOpdfMcvkRkQlsQuqc=)
---
We have the opportunity to expand Medicaid access in Florida through a ballot initiative in 2026, but we will first need to secure **1 million signatures** from Floridians across the state to put it on the ballot.

By expanding Medicaid access in a state like Florida, we can send a strong and clear message to politicians in Washington to keep their hands off of our healthcare! We must fight back, but we can’t do it without you.

clean_body: By expanding Medicaid access in a state like Florida, we can send a strong and clear message to politicians in Washington to keep their hands off of our healthcare! | Peter, While Medicaid enrollment continues to reach record-breaking levels, politicians in Washington are doubling down on their efforts to slash funding for critical public services like Medicaid. These proposed cuts would leave millions of Americans vulnerable without access to quality, affordable care. As one of 10 states that have yet to expand Medicaid,the impact would be particularly devastating in Florida! Our team at Florida Decides Healthcare is working to expand Medicaid access and strengthen our healthcare system so we can defend this vital program from any attempts to limit access to those who need it the most. | = We have the opportunity to expand Medicaid access in Florida through a ballot initiative in 2026, but we will first need to secure 1 million signatures from Floridians across the state to put it on the ballot. By expanding Medicaid access in a state like Florida, we can send a strong and clear message to politicians in Washington to keep their hands off of our healthcare! We must fight back, but we can’t do it without you. = | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Onward, Florida Decides Healthcare * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. name: Valerie Foushee
subject: What inspires me when things feels helpless
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/9_07fM1dnEmqdVR1wv8kcQ2?unsubscribedata=CSMxN7Z%2FSmIdSSMduL1JVp5fEsA%2Bzexw%2BmQdAkULWa14pApyXPpp%2FkVLh%2F3LrjrTk0jlt25j2TTxpiGfj7Uc%2FNfpZiM8Ism%2FBrvHTvMCBWxPBGGWjbe4%2F7C2tmlbGi5Kntrl%2F%2BnP7HpkbA%2BCg5uhWIe81ykkEMFgamWyrUgfczWSbukUqXhTZk3TJAVAvNEtPyDuCPMnjAwZS2yagDfrKDhh51rxwi%2F%2B14w9tH1NWCfN%2Bfc%2F85r%2ByrgDSNcEasnr4U5alCVdKHkrpWIfMBn2GArlTs5Z0%2Ba3sD3pEANG4bIzJBncswEbho2VjvBUNKLOJv0iht%2B%2BMmXnKDaSaioxnMfjNxKMYUqoBH4HI%2F5wF5MHjgbeqk2bFKc0d6FvK7YNetGJ%2FyXf0S3JZoMTfrpcTB3SIr2uZccnoufpwZL%2BZQ8%3D)
---
| |
---
Peter, it’s Valerie Foushee.

I know that for many of us, the past 11 days have been filled with uncertainty, frustration and sadness. In moments like these, or whenever things get tough, or things look particularly hopeless, I like to turn to my favorite song, “Love’s in need of love today” by Stevie Wonder.

The lyrics ring true even now, almost 50 years after its release: Hate's goin' 'round
Breaking hate's tried to break my heart many times In this time of divided government and extreme partisanship, it can sometimes feel like there’s only hate. I know I’m not the only one who gets frustrated in times of gridlock.

But what keeps me going in this work, is a commitment to building a better future for our children, and a better life for our communities.

The first fundraising deadline of 2025 is just a few hours away, and I still need to raise $2,397 to help close the gap. If you’re with me and committed to fighting through the gridlock, will you give $10 or more?

Here’s the best link to use: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vf-em-fr-jan25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101342538/525662921/669864211?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_013125_2_3_EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTBhZDJkZi0yZmUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1QNLilyUPC912BTXOxw71L9gFI7RzUPXB67pV64wLy4=)

I’ll end this email with the final lyric of my favorite song — and my guiding principle in life:

Just give the world love.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101342539/525662923/-1546188038?source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_013125_2_3_EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTBhZDJkZi0yZmUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1QNLilyUPC912BTXOxw71L9gFI7RzUPXB67pV64wLy4=)[CONTRIBUTE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101342540/525662925/-1546188038?source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_013125_2_3_EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTBhZDJkZi0yZmUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1QNLilyUPC912BTXOxw71L9gFI7RzUPXB67pV64wLy4=)

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: The clock is ticking, Peter.
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250131-1208-foote&t=1001&akid=1208%2E342411%2ETSCYLq ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

We're just hours away from our midnight deadline — and we need your help
to cross the finish line.

Our January goal isn’t just about hitting an arbitrary number. It’s about
proving the strength of our grassroots movement — a movement that stands
strong against the chaos of the far-right.

Reaching $75,000 today will not only protect our Squad from their attacks,
it will also send a clear message that we are powered by people like YOU,
not billionaires. Unlike the GOP, we won’t be bought. We rely on everyday
people — those who believe in real change, in representation, and in
justice for all.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250131-2-movement.Hl2s8M&refcode=em20250131-1208&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1208%2E342411%2ETSCYLq ]Help us prove the real power of the grassroots by chipping in any
amount to help us close the gap on our January fundraising goal before the
clock strikes midnight tonight.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250131-2-movement.Hl2s8M&refcode=em20250131-1208&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1208%2E342411%2ETSCYLq ]Contribute ››

The clock is ticking,
Peter. Your donation, no matter
the size, will help us show the real power of our grassroots movement.

In solidarity,

Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1208%2E342411%2ETSCYLq

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: EMILYs List
subject: RE: ✅ Taking power back
body:
Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw our message. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101342615/525663672/-1491281772?sourceid=1055646&refcode=WUEFE170_20250131_MacklerEOM_ALL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjBhZDJkZi0yZmUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ba2sD2QbFkuuG9aLYAOIvx3cDb8EczDx5J9NgyXe-8w=) Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw our message from Tuesday about our End-of-Month goal. It's easy for these updates to get lost in the shuffle, especially with the extremism of the new Trump administration — each day seems to bring more chaos and a new threat to Americans' fundamental freedoms. But despite the challenges, our EMILYs List women are stepping up and fighting back. Governors are already working on the ground to protect communities affected by federal funding freezes, and our attorneys general are standing firm to defend birthright citizenship. We're proud to stand behind the leaders who don't just talk about protecting your rights — they take action to safeguard them.

This cycle, we're focused on electing more Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot to strengthen our defense against the Trump agenda and take back power. If we fall short of our End-of-Month goal, we risk losing the momentum we need to keep up this fight. [_**With the deadline approaching, can we count on you to help us hit our goal of 5,000 grassroots donors before midnight tonight? Your support will keep this critical work going.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101342617/525663674/-1491281772?sourceid=1055646&refcode=WUEFE170_20250131_MacklerEOM_ALL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjBhZDJkZi0yZmUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ba2sD2QbFkuuG9aLYAOIvx3cDb8EczDx5J9NgyXe-8w=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101342619/525663676/-1491281772?sourceid=1055646&refcode=WUEFE170_20250131_MacklerEOM_ALL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjBhZDJkZi0yZmUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ba2sD2QbFkuuG9aLYAOIvx3cDb8EczDx5J9NgyXe-8w=)

Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers)

clean_body: Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw our message. | = Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw our message from Tuesday about our End-of-Month goal. It's easy for these updates to get lost in the shuffle, especially with the extremism of the new Trump administration — each day seems to bring more chaos and a new threat to Americans' fundamental freedoms. But despite the challenges, our EMILYs List women are stepping up and fighting back. Governors are already working on the ground to protect communities affected by federal funding freezes, and our attorneys general are standing firm to defend birthright citizenship. We're proud to stand behind the leaders who don't just talk about protecting your rights — they take action to safeguard them. This cycle, we're focused on electing more Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot to strengthen our defense against the Trump agenda and take back power. If we fall short of our End-of-Month goal, we risk losing the momentum we need to keep up this fight. = | = Thank you for standing with us, Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers) President, EMILYs List —Original Message— Sent: Tues., Jan. 28, 2025 From: EMILYs List = = = = = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

body:
This is our first deadline of 2025, and I need your help to reach our goal.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101342902/525664824/985656371?nd&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.01.31_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjA1ZGMyYy0zMGUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xrDdYDrGHn7SJmmjvxSIif1pJQ9b9_M8CCLsvEk_6_M=) Peter, it's Emilia. I know my team has been reaching out about our 2025 Founding Donor opportunity. Before midnight, I wanted you to hear from me personally about how critical the support of our Founding Donors will be this year. We are only 11 days into Donald Trump’s second term, and already he’s stripping away decades of progress we have all fought for – attacking reproductive healthcare, removing protections against discrimination, signing Executive Orders that could raise drug prices, and so much more. **I’m steadfast in fighting back against every piece of Donald Trump and J.D. Vance’s radical agenda.** But the truth is that in doing so, I open myself up to right-wing attacks. Last year, Republicans spent over _$6 million_ trying to defeat me and our grassroots team. **But thanks to hardworking people like you, who believe in Northeast Ohio and in the progress House Democrats are working toward, we were able to defy the odds and win in November.** **Now, I need you to step up again.** **[Our Founding Donors will help to lay the foundation for what our campaign can accomplish over the next two years. This grassroots team has never let me down before, so please: Can I please count on you to become a 2025 Founding Donor before the offer expires at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101342903/525664825/985656371?&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.01.31_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjA1ZGMyYy0zMGUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xrDdYDrGHn7SJmmjvxSIif1pJQ9b9_M8CCLsvEk_6_M=)** Yours in Service, _Emilia_

| **A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

[**Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars to Emilia's campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101342904/525664826/985656371?nd&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2025.01.31_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjA1ZGMyYy0zMGUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xrDdYDrGHn7SJmmjvxSIif1pJQ9b9_M8CCLsvEk_6_M=) | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101342905/525664827/985656371?-nd&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2025.01.31_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjA1ZGMyYy0zMGUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xrDdYDrGHn7SJmmjvxSIif1pJQ9b9_M8CCLsvEk_6_M=)

name: Yvette Martinez
subject: Need you (before 11:59pm)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
Bad news with a silver lining |
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101342966/525665685/-1175830425?refcode=header&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDUzMGQ3Ni0zMGUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38cXu51B3ujvX_yk6dlTll8b0Y0Gcyy8yi-b--b07_Y=)
---
| Hi there. I have some bad news, but also a silver lining: **First, here’s the bad news:** Today is our first End-of-Month fundraising deadline since Donald Trump became President of the United States. **And here’s the silver lining:** Today is *also* our first End-of-Month fundraising deadline since our three new Democratic Members of Congress got sworn into office from their red-to-blue districts. At the national level, the 2024 Presidential Election did not go how we hoped. Now the entire country is fighting through the reality of a second Donald Trump Presidency. But at the statewide level in California, we were able to achieve major wins, including flipping three U.S. House seats from red to blue. These winners are now our **_California Strong_** leaders who are fighting for us in Washington. We have a proven game plan for flipping seats — even in election years where we are facing political headwinds. But this gameplan only works if we can hire organizers, open regional offices, print literature, and mobilize up and down our state. clean_body: Bad news with a silver lining | = | Hi there. I have some bad news, but also a silver lining: First, here’s the bad news: Today is our first End-of-Month fundraising deadline since Donald Trump became President of the United States. And here’s the silver lining: Today is also our first End-of-Month fundraising deadline since our three new Democratic Members of Congress got sworn into office from their red-to-blue districts. At the national level, the 2024 Presidential Election did not go how we hoped. Now the entire country is fighting through the reality of a second Donald Trump Presidency. But at the statewide level in California, we were able to achieve major wins, including flipping three U.S. House seats from red to blue. These winners are now our California Strong leaders who are fighting for us in Washington. We have a proven game plan for flipping seats — even in election years where we are facing political headwinds. But this gameplan only works if we can hire organizers, open regional offices, print literature, and mobilize up and down our state. That costs money, and right now, our budget is a lot tighter than we would like. = = = = = = Sincerely, \- Yvette | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. # [#]
Hey Peter, I’m sorry to bother you on a Friday night — so I’ll keep this brief.

Tonight marks our very first end-of-month fundraising goal under the Trump administration, and my team has set out to raise $15,000 to show the White House that we’re not backing down in our fight for results, not rhetoric, for the American people.

Hitting this goal means sending a clear message of our strength and allows us to build up our resources to take back the House come next year — and take back a critical check on Donald Trump’s power.

It would mean the world to me if you could chip in just $ or really any amount before our deadline at midnight. Here’s a link for you: secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-jan25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-jan25?amount=]

Thank you for your support, Peter.

George
https://www.facebook.com/LatimerforNY [https://www.facebook.com/LatimerforNY] https://twitter.com/LatimerforNY [https://twitter.com/LatimerforNY]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-footer-23 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-footer-23]
For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.

name: Hillsdale College via Victory News
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l8hq9gq2cl2nb0kwq4lnzq3dzsvpvm63b8du3lhc0bkorhhg8tdf2vss1syf3xz1tlhfymxouevvpu4njs&__stmp=sqza1e&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqza1e&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dz56j8m3iht8oyg9yyexltr5m6zn7q87t20ml592me29c1z41jzch5bf0j4xtxx0r3rxqlxg5kfospy7kv0n1t30z3ysmlsko6g0wod3abgen4fv3egea5zd0vuc8k84a2qufxei7x0ul9u3cxb3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqza1e&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqza1e&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqza1e&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqza1e&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dz56j8m3iht8oyg9yyexltr5vfbdr6628l7canybt4a4wop1e5mj1b6n7s8mk702n0tjrv1b8yzzeto2da46a3odo0rr7jdk8jahqgdc15imy2uc5bkrn5m0bsezbddb0o3hy2ri2yc8skxqam5r&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqza1e&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqza1e&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Emily Randall
subject: One more time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
The more we raise now, the better we’ll be able to provide early support to Democrats in competitive races in 2025 and 2026. So please, if you can, make a donation of any amount to fuel this effort.

Emily Randall for Congress
Peter, I’m reaching out one more time before the end of the month to ask: Can you chip in $10 or any amount before midnight to help fight the Trump agenda AND take back the House? We’re about halfway to our goal.
You can use this link to chip in: _**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rs_er4c2024_fr_q12025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101343171/525670165/-1324188244?amount=10&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.01.31_Jan2025Final_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjY5MmJiNS0zMWUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KLxB8SJeCzct3ZNvPFaugXL-0SYGq3qr1fiItNUXnl0=)**_
In fundraising, there’s a phrase: _“Early money is like yeast. It helps raise the dough.”_
When people-powered candidates have resources early, they can plan better budgets, hire staff, and communicate their message — which in turn brings more grassroots support.
They can also spend less time on the phone with donors and more time talking to voters—the conversations that win!
The more we raise now, the better we’ll be able to provide early support to Democrats in competitive races in 2025 and 2026. So please, if you can, make a donation of any amount to fuel this effort.
Here’s that link again: _**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rs_er4c2024_fr_q12025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101343172/525670166/-1324188244?amount=10&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.01.31_Jan2025Final_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjY5MmJiNS0zMWUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KLxB8SJeCzct3ZNvPFaugXL-0SYGq3qr1fiItNUXnl0=)**_
Thank you for everything 💙
— Emily

Port Orchard, WA 98366

subject: tonight at midnight

name: Sam W.
subject: Higher prices, discrimination, and literal invasion
body:
| |
---
Just today, Donald Trump unleashed hell on our norms, our economy, and global stability. | [View in browser](https://jjajxo.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyODY4MDcsXCJsXCI6MTQ1MDkwMzE0ODc2NDg3MTYyLFwiclwiOjE0NTA5MDM1MDk5NDY4NzM0OH0iLCJzIjoiMWNkZDIzY2I0Zjk1ZTAwZSJ9)
| |
---
| [ ](https://jjajxo.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyODY4MDcsXCJsXCI6MTQ1MDkwMzE0ODgxNzMwMDUwLFwiclwiOjE0NTA5MDM1MDk5NDY4NzM0OH0iLCJzIjoiYTg2Yzg1YmFjNWM4ZjAwZCJ9)
---
|
---
Friend,

As if the first eleven days of Trump’s presidency hadn’t been bad enough, today — Day Twelve — might have been even worse. Today alone, Trump announced 25% tariffs on Canada, China, and Mexico, our three biggest trading partners and said that he will seize the Panama Canal, a clear threat of military aggression.

In short, expect your prices to go up and for the US to possibly start a new US-led invasion for the first time since 2003.

But we can’t give up. That’s exactly what Trump and his fascistic cronies want. They feed off our anguish and our apathy.**

All of this is preventable with the right opposition.** When we give up, we’re giving Trump and his right-wing cronies exactly what they want. They feed off our anguish and our apathy.

While they hope we give up, we’re actually on track to raise more money just this month than we did all of last year — but only if folks reading emails like these help us cross the finish line to reach our goal and help us rally young people against the threats posed by Trump and for a brighter future.****

|
---
_**[Path to Progress is the only organization led by Generation Z that engages our peers with policy-based solutions instead of political bickering. To fuel massive public support for our policy agenda, we’re asking grassroots supporters like you to contribute $27 or whatever you can spare today:](https://jjajxo.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyODY4MDcsXCJsXCI6MTQ1MDkwMzE0ODg1OTI0MzU4LFwiclwiOjE0NTA5MDM1MDk5NDY4NzM0OH0iLCJzIjoiZGU3YTkwZmE4ODcyMWQ0ZCJ9)**_
|
---
| | [ Donate $27 >> ](https://jjajxo.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyODY4MDcsXCJsXCI6MTQ1MDkwMzE0ODkwMTE4NjY0LFwiclwiOjE0NTA5MDM1MDk5NDY4NzM0OH0iLCJzIjoiNzJiN2ZkYzcwNjY5MGE4ZSJ9)
---
|
---
| | [ Donate another amount >> ](https://jjajxo.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyODY4MDcsXCJsXCI6MTQ1MDkwMzE0ODkzMjY0Mzk1LFwiclwiOjE0NTA5MDM1MDk5NDY4NzM0OH0iLCJzIjoiNzZhOTE2YmIxMmNkOWY0OSJ9)
---
|
---
_**[_Or multiply your impact with a monthly recurring donation!_](https://jjajxo.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyODY4MDcsXCJsXCI6MTQ1MDkwMzE0ODk3NDU4NzAyLFwiclwiOjE0NTA5MDM1MDk5NDY4NzM0OH0iLCJzIjoiMDBkMDNjNGZmNzk1MmRiYyJ9)**_
|
---
A strong fundraising month would show our doubters that what we’re doing is viable — and, more importantly, it would show the Trump White House that they’re facing a formidable foe in us and our anti-authoritarian agenda.

Together, we can push back on his agenda to raise prices and create more forever wars.

Thank you for your support,

**\- Path to Progress** __
|

|
##### Path to Progress Action

Before you log off for the weekend, I wanted to send one more note ahead of our fundraising deadline tonight. I promise I’ll keep this short!!

| Peter,

Before you log off for the weekend, I wanted to send one more note ahead of our fundraising deadline tonight. I promise I’ll keep this short!!

In a race as competitive as ours – where prominent national Republicans and outside groups alike will spend millions to defeat us – it’s essential that we continue to build momentum early.

The more we raise, the stronger a message we’ll send to my opponents that I’m not going anywhere.

The latest polls show this race is a total toss-up, so we need all the help we can get to build a winning campaign. Will you invest in our campaign today before our monthly deadline at midnight tonight?

name: Val Hoyle
subject: One last time
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101343260/525672183/553882890?refcode=AU_VAH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250131_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmY2ZTg1NC0zMmUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FLeFKPNG1ZFX0FlkbsjKbz931vmzVfdMsvnIqN6gSG0=&emci=cad461c4-3fdf-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=0ff6e854-32e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Hey Peter — I wanted to reach out to you one last time before the month comes to a close tonight. At midnight, we’ll reach our very first fundraising deadline since Donald Trump returned to the White House. It’s important to start his presidency off on the right foot because, as the first few days of his term have shown, he is determined to carry out his far-right agenda. So far, he’s: | ➡️ | Withdrawn the United States from the Paris Climate Agreement
---|---
➡️ | Signed an executive order attempting to end birthright citizenship
➡️ | Pardoned the January 6 rioters who stormed the Capitol and brutally attacked police officers
➡️ | Pulled down a website providing resources for reproductive healthcare
➡️ | Fired or reassigned dozens of government civil servants so that he could fill critical government positions with far-right loyalists
➡️ | Proposed tariffs that would raise costs for working families on everyday items like coffee
**Meanwhile, he hasn’t taken _any_ action that would meaningfully lower the costs of health care, child care, groceries, and housing for working families. **
Trump’s extreme agenda leaves working Oregonians behind — which is why I’m prepared to defend them against his harmful actions and fight to bring real progress to Oregon.
**[I need people like you to stand and fight with me, Peter. clean_body: | | | | Hey Peter — I wanted to reach out to you one last time before the month comes to a close tonight. At midnight, we’ll reach our very first fundraising deadline since Donald Trump returned to the White House. It’s important to start his presidency off on the right foot because, as the first few days of his term have shown, he is determined to carry out his far-right agenda. So far, he’s: | ➡️ | Withdrawn the United States from the Paris Climate Agreement ---|--- ➡️ | Signed an executive order attempting to end birthright citizenship ➡️ | Pardoned the January 6 rioters who stormed the Capitol and brutally attacked police officers ➡️ | Pulled down a website providing resources for reproductive healthcare ➡️ | Fired or reassigned dozens of government civil servants so that he could fill critical government positions with far-right loyalists ➡️ | Proposed tariffs that would raise costs for working families on everyday items like coffee Meanwhile, he hasn’t taken any action that would meaningfully lower the costs of health care, child care, groceries, and housing for working families. Trump’s extreme agenda leaves working Oregonians behind — which is why I’m prepared to defend them against his harmful actions and fight to bring real progress to Oregon. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = This work wouldn’t be possible without your support. Thank you. — Val | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. body:
The Trump administration showed a reckless disregard for working families this week, as freezing essential federal programs jeopardized child care, health care, and good-paying jobs and left countless Minnesotans wondering how they would make ends meet.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101343409/525676121/576686510?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTNhZmQ5Ni0zM2UwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wjK8vT9nVz3xUr-nHu-_Er4JpZkAU4hUN7Cpr7X8bwk=)
---
Peter,
The Trump administration showed a reckless disregard for working families this week, as freezing essential federal programs jeopardized child care, health care, and good-paying jobs and left countless Minnesotans wondering how they would make ends meet.
I spoke out about this unconstitutional order and the devastating harm it would cause. And I wasn’t alone. Minnesotans across the state took action — calling their representatives, organizing in their communities, and making their voices heard.
And you know what? We won. The Trump administration backed down.**This proves that people power is stronger than Trump’s MAGA machine. **
But this fight isn’t over. Trump and his allies have shown that they’re willing to break the law and put working families at risk. We know they’ll try again, and we must be ready to fight back.
**Our first end-of-month deadline of 2025 is only hours away, and we still need to raise $6,659 to hit our target.**
[**Peter, if you’re able, please send a donation that works for you by 11:59 pm so we can close the gap, keep up our work, and continue working together to build the brightest future possible for our state.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101343410/525676129/576686510?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTNhZmQ5Ni0zM2UwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wjK8vT9nVz3xUr-nHu-_Er4JpZkAU4hUN7Cpr7X8bwk=)

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: People’s livelihoods are on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Friend,
Today marks my first-ever end-of-month deadline since being sworn in. I could use your help. Would you consider donating today to help me continue fighting for the East Bay? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_013125_janeom_actrs]
Listen, Friend: Every morning since my swearing-in on January 3rd, stepping into the Capitol feels like entering the Colosseum. Every day, we are bombarded by this administration's hateful and discriminatory executive orders, like banning transgender individuals from serving in the military, dismantling diversity and inclusion initiatives, and executing their mass deportation plan. I know it's a scary time, folks, but we won't let them win.
I won’t let them win.
I’ve spent the last 25 years advocating for my community, so to be here, in DC, with so much clarity and discipline, I have not taken my foot off the gas once because I know what it takes to make real change.
This administration is costing folks their livelihoods, enabling ICE raids across the country, and stifling women's rights and autonomy.
As if that wasn’t enough, earlier this week, President Trump announced a pause on all federal grant, loan, and financial assistance programs — threatening up to $3 trillion in vital support, including SNAP benefits, the Veteran Suicide Hotline, school lunches, Medicaid, and housing assistance, just to name a few...
These are people’s livelihoods on the line.
Fortunately, after swift and overwhelming public backlash, he reversed course — but make no mistake, this wasn’t a misunderstanding. They are actively trying to dismantle constitutional law right in front of our eyes. We must keep up the pressure, because we know they will try again.
To continue this fight, I need your support. Can you chip in $10, $25, or any amount to help us meet this critical deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_013125_janeom_actrs]
If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: [] Friend, Today marks my first-ever end-of-month deadline since being sworn in. I could use your help. Would you consider donating today to help me continue fighting for the East Bay? [] Listen, Friend: Every morning since my swearing-in on January 3rd, stepping into the Capitol feels like entering the Colosseum. Every day, we are bombarded by this administration's hateful and discriminatory executive orders, like banning transgender individuals from serving in the military, dismantling diversity and inclusion initiatives, and executing their mass deportation plan. I know it's a scary time, folks, but we won't let them win. I won’t let them win. I’ve spent the last 25 years advocating for my community, so to be here, in DC, with so much clarity and discipline, I have not taken my foot off the gas once because I know what it takes to make real change. This administration is costing folks their livelihoods, enabling ICE raids across the country, and stifling women's rights and autonomy. As if that wasn’t enough, earlier this week, President Trump announced a pause on all federal grant, loan, and financial assistance programs — threatening up to $3 trillion in vital support, including SNAP benefits, the Veteran Suicide Hotline, school lunches, Medicaid, and housing assistance, just to name a few... These are people’s livelihoods on the line. Fortunately, after swift and overwhelming public backlash, he reversed course — but make no mistake, this wasn’t a misunderstanding. They are actively trying to dismantle constitutional law right in front of our eyes. We must keep up the pressure, because we know they will try again. To continue this fight, I need your support. Can you chip in $10, $25, or any amount to help us meet this critical deadline? [] If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] OTHER [] DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] OTHER [] Thank you & In Solidarity, Lateefah Simon [] Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s fighting this fight from the Capitol. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a proven champion. To learn more about Lateefah, visit LateefahSimon.com [] DONATE TODAY [] DONATE MONTHLY [] DONATE TODAY [] DONATE MONTHLY [] [] [] [] Lateefah for Congress 1714 Franklin St #100 - 438 Oakland, CA 94612 United States Paid for by Lateefah for Congress If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Join Us: People Not Billionaires
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Tomorrow, Democratic National Committee members will vote for new
leadership, including the next DNC Chair.

This leadership will make critical decisions about the direction of the
Democratic Party, the rules that govern Democratic candidates, and how
resources are allocated in elections. The next leaders of the Party must
decisively show that the party is for the people — not billionaires or
corporations.

We’re joining our partners at Sunrise Movement in calling on DNC
leadership candidates to commit to adopting bold reforms to reduce the
corrosive influence of big money in politics and prioritize working people
over billionaires and special interests.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140581?t=1002&akid=36386%2E1203867%2EgGveal ]Will you sign our open letter to DNC leadership candidates to demand a
party that works for us, not the wealthy few?

Sign the Letter

The time to end the influence of corporate money is NOW. Our open letter
calls on DNC leadership candidates to pledge to:

1️⃣ Revive the Obama-era ban on corporate donations to the DNC.

2️⃣ Ban SuperPAC spending in Democratic primaries.

Right now, super PACs bankrolled by oil CEOs, crypto moguls, and GOP
billionaires like Elon Musk have free reign to buy our elections,
undermining candidates who represent the needs of working people. And just
because these billionaires work with Republicans doesn’t keep them out of
Democratic primaries. In fact, Elon Musk has already threatened to
intervene in Democratic primaries this cycle.

For Democrats to be taken seriously when calling out Trump’s corruption,
they need to show they stand for something different. That starts with
rejecting corporate PAC contributions to the DNC and taking a stand
against the special interests interfering in Democratic primaries. That’s
how we can win back working-class voters in 2026 and 2028.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140581?t=1003&akid=36386%2E1203867%2EgGveal ]The fight for bold, people-powered change needs everyone. Can we count
on you to add your name to our open letter before tomorrow’s vote?

Together, we can build a Democratic Party ready to take on Donald Trump
and his allies while championing policies that work for everyone.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

PS — Tonight at midnight is our end-of-month deadline to raise $120,000
for our 2026 Candidate Recruitment Fund. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250131-2?refcode=em20250131-36386&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36386_1203867_gGveal&akid=36386%2E1203867%2EgGveal ]Help us recruit and support
working-class candidates for Congress who will put people before
billionaires: donate now!

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250131-36386-footer&t=1004&refcode2=36386_1203867_gGveal&akid=36386%2E1203867%2EgGveal

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=36386%2E1203867%2EgGveal

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

January grassroots goal: $20,000 by 1/31
Chip in now to stop anti-democracy extremism in 2025 >>
Peter,

In these initial days of Republicans in power, I want to step back and reflect on what progress truly looks like.
The work we’re doing to strengthen and protect democracy is critical — and it’s paying off. Right now, our congressional maps are the fairest in a generation. That’s because of this movement:
* In Alabama, victory in the courts allowed voters to elect two Black members of Congress to serve together for the first time in the state’s history.
* Another legal challenge in Louisiana resulted in a state map that elected two Black members of Congress to serve together there for the first time in nearly three decades.
* And in New York, a fair, commission-drawn map resulted in a more representative outcome, which meant Democrats flipped three seats.

Of course, there are some unfortunate exceptions to this forward progress. Republican gerrymandering in just one state — North Carolina — dismantled three seats held by Democrats. Without those three seats, the Republicans don’t have a majority.
It’s been true throughout our history: Progress is never a straight line — it feels like there’s a step backward for every few steps we take in the direction of fairness and justice. And none of that progress is inevitable. It takes people like us to fight for those steps forward.
As Republicans take power, the next phase of this work is already underway in states around the country. [**We have a plan I believe in — but we need the resources to execute. Please, make a gift of $30 or more to help elect pro-democracy candidates, challenge gerrymandered maps, and fight back against attempts to skew the census count.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101343913/525683433/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_JanEOM3_email_20250131-NDRC-Tier1-JanEOM3_Hdshot&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250131-NDRC-Tier1-JanEOM3_Hdshot&utm_campaign=JanEOM3&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0MmIyNjEyLTM1ZTAtZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OLaAClObXZxY6C3o0ynNv5a6nJ-abMIyHmDIyL2EN8g=)

I’m proud of our work, but I’m clear-eyed about the threats ahead. In his first term, Donald Trump tried to undermine the accuracy of the 2020 Census. We fought back and prevailed. Now, we know they intend to try again.
Let’s not mistake his electoral victory as an indication of support for his extreme, undemocratic agenda. Most of what he stands for is, simply, not popular — and in the months ahead, just three defections in the House will put a stop to Trump’s legislative agenda.
The NDRC got its sea legs during the first Trump administration. **We know how to make progress amidst this broken landscape, and to stand strong together in the power of our ideals and the forces of our shared community. And we know that when we do, we can win.**
[**We also know that it takes each of us who believe in this mission to help make it happen. Please, make a gift to the NDRC and help us reach our $20,000 grassroots goal by tonight.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101343920/525683467/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_JanEOM3_email_20250131-NDRC-Tier1-JanEOM3_Hdshot&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250131-NDRC-Tier1-JanEOM3_Hdshot&utm_campaign=JanEOM3&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0MmIyNjEyLTM1ZTAtZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OLaAClObXZxY6C3o0ynNv5a6nJ-abMIyHmDIyL2EN8g=)
You’re an important part of the fair maps movement. We need you in this fight.
And remember, there is joy in the struggle.
Thank you,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States

clean_body: Please, make a gift and help us reach our $20,000 grassroots goal by tonight. | | = January grassroots goal: $20,000 by 1/31 Chip in now to stop anti-democracy extremism in 2025 >> Peter, In these initial days of Republicans in power, I want to step back and reflect on what progress truly looks like. The work we’re doing to strengthen and protect democracy is critical — and it’s paying off. Right now, our congressional maps are the fairest in a generation. That’s because of this movement: In Alabama, victory in the courts allowed voters to elect two Black members of Congress to serve together for the first time in the state’s history. Another legal challenge in Louisiana resulted in a state map that elected two Black members of Congress to serve together there for the first time in nearly three decades. And in New York, a fair, commission-drawn map resulted in a more representative outcome, which meant Democrats flipped three seats. Of course, there are some unfortunate exceptions to this forward progress. Republican gerrymandering in just one state — North Carolina — dismantled three seats held by Democrats. Without those three seats, the Republicans don’t have a majority. It’s been true throughout our history: Progress is never a straight line — it feels like there’s a step backward for every few steps we take in the direction of fairness and justice. And none of that progress is inevitable. It takes people like us to fight for those steps forward. As Republicans take power, the next phase of this work is already underway in states around the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = I’m proud of our work, but I’m clear-eyed about the threats ahead. In his first term, Donald Trump tried to undermine the accuracy of the 2020 Census. We fought back and prevailed. Now, we know they intend to try again. Let’s not mistake his electoral victory as an indication of support for his extreme, undemocratic agenda. Most of what he stands for is, simply, not popular — and in the months ahead, just three defections in the House will put a stop to Trump’s legislative agenda. The NDRC got its sea legs during the first Trump administration. We know how to make progress amidst this broken landscape, and to stand strong together in the power of our ideals and the forces of our shared community. And we know that when we do, we can win. = You’re an important part of the fair maps movement. We need you in this fight. And remember, there is joy in the struggle. Thank you, Eric H. Holder, Jr. 82nd Attorney General of the United States = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. name: Josh Harder
subject: The next step in our campaign
body:
We’re so close.
Hey Peter,
I know this week has been a long one. The news is utterly terrifying, and to be honest, we’re in for a long slog the next 4 years. But we can’t lose hope - **we need to turn this frustration into action.**
I’m reaching out one more time before tonight’s end-of-month deadline because I could really use your help.
You can **[make a donation here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101344471/525693695/-31595347?&refcode=E12116-20250131-EOM2-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDllZmFiZmUtMzdlMC1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LHnEr-d9zECbmgwHFAQKZA2EcjTj2rMUqB8RbDB0A60=)** \- and this is why I need your support.
Right now, my team and I are desperately trying to raise enough money to help us build the grassroots foundation of our campaign. We know we have to start organizing early if we’re going to win this Trump district and do our part to take back the House in 2026.
This deadline at midnight is the first big stepping stone to revving up our campaign for another incredibly important race. Our goal was to raise $20,000 by tonight at midnight, but right now we’re still falling short.
So I’m asking, will you please make a generous donation before tonight’s deadline to help us staff up and take this pivotal next step in our campaign?
I’ll leave my link here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-Jan2025-FR-January](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101344472/525693696/-31595347?&refcode=E12116-20250131-EOM2-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDllZmFiZmUtMzdlMC1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LHnEr-d9zECbmgwHFAQKZA2EcjTj2rMUqB8RbDB0A60=)**
Thank you for helping us get this done. We’re staying in the fight.
\- Josh

Josh Harder for Congress
PO Box 4220
Manteca, CA 95337
United States

subject: Rep. Raskin’s mic drop 🎤 ⬇️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Someone is finally speaking up!!!
| FINALLY, we have Democratic heroes like Jamie Raskin FIGHTING BACK!!! [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86590?t=6&akid=18740%2E878179%2E6l2Hv4) **We know what this means:** _Trump, his MAGA trifecta, and his billionaire buddies _WILL_ go after Rep. Raskin, again (!) — _and we need to be prepared.__

We’re sending Rep. Raskin a letter tomorrow at 9 AM sharp to show our support and stand with him in the face of MAGA attacks: [**Will you join the top 99 Democrats in your state and add your name? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86590?t=7&akid=18740%2E878179%2E6l2Hv4) | [ADD MY NAME: STAND WITH REP. JAMIE RASKIN »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86590?t=8&akid=18740%2E878179%2E6l2Hv4)
---
TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank You! Rep. Raskin,

**I couldn’t be more thrilled to have your voice in the House at this critical time in our history — you are one of the most heroic Representatives we have, and I’m so grateful.**

As a key part of the January 6th committee, you stood up to Donald Trump and his MAGA Republicans over and over again. _Now the GOP is furious at you,_but you continue to stand strong and lead our party forward.__

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of the work you’ve done to hold MAGA Republicans accountable – so I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to VPP to keep electing incredible Democrats just like you. As long as you keep fighting for Democracy, we’ll be beside you! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86590?t=9&akid=18740%2E878179%2E6l2Hv4)

Standing with you, **_X A grateful Democrat_** | [ADD MY NAME: STAND WITH REP. JAMIE RASKIN »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86590?t=10&akid=18740%2E878179%2E6l2Hv4)
---
-The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18740%2E878179%2E6l2Hv4). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18740%2E878179%2E6l2Hv4).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18740%2E878179%2E6l2Hv4) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=18740%2E878179%2E6l2Hv4). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18740%2E878179%2E6l2Hv4)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=18740%2E878179%2E6l2Hv4)

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Add your name: No conditions on disaster aid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=013125_3&amount=25]
Folks,
President Trump is exploiting a crisis: Using the suffering of those affected by the Los Angeles fires as a tool to push voter suppression.
That’s right – he's threatening to withhold aid to the thousands of Southern Californians who’ve lost their homes, livelihoods, and communities to wildfire unless the state government sides with him to deny thousands of voters’ rights by passing a voter ID law.
Say it loud: Disaster victims are not political pawns . California needs wildfire aid now – with no partisan, anti-voter demands attached.
Stand with us and urge Congress to do their job and deliver help to people who need it immediately >> [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/tell-speaker-johnson-disaster-victims-are-not-political-pawns-2?source=013125swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3Djaaidvictims]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/tell-speaker-johnson-disaster-victims-are-not-political-pawns-2?source=013125swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3Djaaidvictims]
Unfortunately, Trump's friends in Congress are falling in line , with House Speaker Mike Johnson refusing to commit to helping his fellow Americans in need if there isn’t something in it for his party.
California lawmakers have already passed strong protections for the state’s voting systems to ensure they’re both accessible AND secure . Adding voter ID into the mix would do nothing to secure elections, just shut thousands of eligible voters out on the basis of class and color.
Entire neighborhoods have been reduced to ash, families have been displaced, and critical infrastructure has been damaged. The road to recovery is long – and pressuring California to pass voter ID will only make it longer.
Tell Speaker Mike Johnson: Don’t follow Trump’s lead in politicizing disaster aid. Do your job and deliver help to people who need it immediately! >> [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/tell-speaker-johnson-disaster-victims-are-not-political-pawns-2?source=013125swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3Djaaidvictims]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/tell-speaker-johnson-disaster-victims-are-not-political-pawns-2?source=013125swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3Djaaidvictims]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=013125_3&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=013125_3&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=013125_3&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=013125_3&amount=25]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=kbeGlkzNK9tlZZ22wBNP0cweILBSWhfW%2FkjrTnsDmoJBB9lD5bLrTJ5QbsDyDIy9eShGpZD254gsmYIVtpBoT0QKSC4KqeLc1c9xEYmILOlvcgr8YgB6yI10QDk8ZFRG7myVoXR%2Fe9itrjPvelbKm2IvsBI3ACZmPJq6JEGTxsLCc%2BkaYahuCSGpMTRC45uRhlrM%2FujMaYlLjOOpeT0Oj5J1G1%2FIbv1i7BwMIu61ooi8RlNVIoGcsrDOESEgRcrzcvHoJqN1usvNBSDgyQFAnRHxMyUEPQzFOIwtCTwzeFsAeNXLzzXzL2HBTONjFp00811zQLm33oUB5OBM2OmExkoOII1rM7RsfWdBECVPI2Q6Hxri2LLlPe3F8uMyu1RTsE1QaFgUt7txrIKtTlHHqRrZs8sLeHdnRgOTt1W8WtQ%3D .

name: David Hogg
subject: The Democratic Party needs a reset
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
This is going to be a long email...
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250131-1&t=1&akid=1686%2E587540%2Em-Gx3M)
Peter, this is going to be a long email because there’s a lot going on right now.
Every day, we are watching the Liar in Chief wreak havoc with radical executive orders, unfit cabinet appointments, and anything else he can do to cause chaos.
Want to know the honest truth? **We need a stronger Democratic Party to respond to this moment.** That’s one big reason I’m running for DNC Vice Chair. And it’s the reason that we started Leaders We Deserve in the first place – to rebuild our party with the young, progressive leaders who’ll actually fight to get us out of this mess.
Look, I know a lot of groups are asking you for money right now, even at a time when it seems like the Democratic Party is failing to win or deliver. I know it can be frustrating if you’re chipping in, but you aren’t seeing the results you want to see.
**Here’s what’s different about Leaders We Deserve:** We are recruiting a brand new wave of young leaders to come in and fight the worst of Trump’s agenda _AND_ show the positive, youthful, and modern direction we want for the party’s future.
Think of it this way, Peter – **_this is our chance to reset the Democratic Party._**
But there’s no way around it. We cannot do this work without grassroots support.
Unlike the other side, we don’t have a legion of corporatist billionaires ready to finance our efforts. There is no one waiting in the wings with a $5 million check.
Instead, we’re building this movement with _$5, $10, and $25_ at a time. (Some folks may give more when they’re able – and at the end of the day, it all really adds up.)
That’s why I’m writing to you today, Peter. We need people like you – people who understand that the Democratic Party needs a reset – to join us in the fight.
**The first end-of-month deadline of Trump’s second term is tonight at midnight and we need your support to reach our $25,000 goal before the clock runs out.**
**[Will you contribute $5 right now to help us reset the Democratic Party?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250131-1?refcode=em20250131-1686&amount=5&refcode2=1686_587540_m-Gx3M&akid=1686%2E587540%2Em-Gx3M)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250131-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250131-1686&refcode2=1686_587540_m-Gx3M&akid=1686%2E587540%2Em-Gx3M)**
Thank you,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250131-1&t=2&refcode2=1686_587540_m-Gx3M&akid=1686%2E587540%2Em-Gx3M)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1686%2E587540%2Em-Gx3M)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1686%2E587540%2Em-Gx3M)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Tracy Kemp via ParentsTogether
subject: My son was bullied by racists (petition)
body:
Tell your state lawmakers to keep kids safe online. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us8.campaign-archive.com/?e=7e921d898f&i=*|ITERATION_UNIQUE_ID|*&u=1c4af7e0c2cf6603f994addd7&id=0cc297d6d9)
---
| | Hi Peter, My name is Tracy, and I’m a mom in New Mexico. Last year my fourteen year-old son, Brayden, was targeted by racist cyberbullies on Instagram and Snapchat. It made me more aware than ever how dangerous social media can be for kids. In addition to the concerning lack of safeguards for kids like Brayden it’s scary to watch kids navigate an online world that nudges them to give up their privacy, interact with strangers, and exposes them to extreme content and risky behaviors while also addicting them to screens.
---
|
#### **Sign this letter in support of new bipartisan state legislation that will help protect kids online.**
---
| | [Add my name](https://parents-together.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c4af7e0c2cf6603f994addd7&id=98831609fa&e=7e921d898f&i=51c29acb05 "Add my name")
---
| Parents will do anything to protect our children, but tech companies make billions off social media platforms that are designed to be addictive. The companies know it’s bad, too: leaked Instagram documents said the platform is exacerbating body image problems for 1 in 3 teen girls. I don’t think it has to be this way, though. You wouldn’t start your car without making sure your kids are buckled in, so why do we let kids use platforms that are clearly dangerous without any protections at all? I don’t want anyone else’s child to go through the mental pain and social anxiety that has been forced upon my son. “Kids Code” bills are being considered in states across the country, including New Mexico, Nevada, Maryland, and Minnesota with the hope that others will soon follow. Legislation like this has already succeeded in protecting kids across the globe and in California, but not all American kids have the same rights and protections that can keep them safe online. Together, we can persuade lawmakers and pass these bills on a state level! [Children in every state deserve these protections. Will you join me by signing the letter supporting Kids Codes?](https://parents-together.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c4af7e0c2cf6603f994addd7&id=d8f79dc0fa&e=7e921d898f&i=51c29acb05)
---
| Thank you for your support, **Tracy & the ParentsTogether Team**
---

I stood my ground for over a year against this immoral practice. Taxpayer hard-earned dollars should not go toward abortions.

_I took a beating for a year from the Legacy Media and Democrats._

**Worth every second of it.**

_I 'll never back down from a fight, especially when it's for our country and shared conservative values. But I need your support to get our America-First agenda across the goal line. _
