name: Jeff Younger
subject: They need to be held accountable
body:
...I’ve watched the school system, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.

| | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now.
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt2p8lndv325fnob49j3j9k523b6dmj0mblhtpeo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5g6eor6c3h2bs)
---
My Dear Friend, My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above.I’m writing to you because I’ve spent the last eight years fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, and out-of-control judges from transitioning my son James against my will and against all reason.You may have heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or on Fox News.I am James’s father, but because I refused to accept that my 5 YEAR OLD boy should be surgically and chemically castrated......I’ve watched the school system, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James. That’s why I’m writing to you today. **[I need your help.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbv1567316p5gdtosv1vhf9o6lm7a48n22ujq81g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5g6eor6c3h2bs)** I’m up against radical trans-activist judges, the 6 BILLION dollar trans lobby, and coastal elites forcing their LGBTQ+ agenda down our throats. They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees... They’re trying to break my spirit... I want to keep fighting, but I can’t do it alone. If you’re with me in the fight to **Save James** , **[would you consider making a generous $25 contribution to my Legal Defense Fund today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zveo4lfg4524gdkr7t9e0d1qlll9ohnta1h6jp98_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5g6eor6c3h2bs)** But I’m getting ahead of myself...Let me start at the beginning. When James was just two years old, my ex-wife began saying our boy James was actually a girl.I told her she was wrong, and I kept dropping my son off at school in boy’s clothes because **he is a boy**. (I can’t believe I have to say that.) I later found out that the school counselors were changing him into girl’s clothes once he got to school WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE to inflame this delusion.Then during the custody battle, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.The court-mandated supervisor would ONLY let me see James if I put him in girl’s clothes. I have never affirmed the lie that my son is a girl, nor will I ever affirm it.So I was forced to stop visiting him.It broke my heart.**Do you see what we’re up against?** I can confirm that these trans-activist judges are presiding over kangaroo courts where common sense goes right out the window.They need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And **James** needs to be **saved** from their butchery.**[THAT’S why I need your help.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zotia8bhtftclbdkuqbu9oedv6ihfe5p929v4htg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5g6eor6c3h2bs)** I am under a gag order currently to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Obviously, I’m not abiding by that order because it’s blatantly unconstitutional.But that’s not even the point.If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time. But I’m not just some activist.I’m a Dad.I’m fighting to save my son.And I will never give up on **James**.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers. I authored the bill in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee that outlawed sex change surgeries for minors.I then spent every dollar I had to make sure cowardly politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair. I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, but then my ex-wife just took James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state.And there was nothing I could do to stop it.And that’s the scary part:**If this can happen in Texas, it can happen anywhere.** Then in California, the radical judge railroaded me and gave my ex-wife free reign to proceed with the castration.I can’t even appeal the case because he sealed all the court records...I’ll have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process...On top of that, the other side is trying to make ME pay THEIR legal fees...**Do you see what we’re up against?** But if Conservatives won’t put up a fight, how will we ever win? That’s where Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) comes in. They heard about my case and immediately offered to stand by my side. **[Will you stand with us?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb4fejjm3pu0vnuahda3a5bcul3c5fr06ufrpcm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5g6eor6c3h2bs)**

subject: Confirm President Trump’s Nominees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Democrats are trying to obstruct. But our new majority won’t stand for it.

Friend,

There is no good reason for Senate Democrats to be blocking President Trump's nominees.

It puts our national security, our border, and our economy at risk.

**[But make no mistake: Democrats' obstructionism will _NOT_ stand in our way. We will confirm President Trump's team -- _the easy way or the hard way._](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z313nvobmm2ed7fkgsvo8l5hog07meoe93di4eo0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5g61pb2c9h2bs)**

subject: WisGOP Update 1.31.25
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-ctyduuy-didthutlhu-yk/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ctyduuy-didthutlhu-r/) **January 31, 2025** Friend --It was a strong week for Wisconsin Republicans. From Wisconsin's own Sean Duffy being confirmed as Secretary of Transportation to [polling](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ctyduuy-didthutlhu-y/) showing Brad Schimel up in the race for Supreme Court, Republicans in Wisconsin are building on the momentum from our victories in November!Read our latest update below!-Team WisGOP**Top Story of the Week** This week, Voters had the chance to see Radical Susan's true colors. While she continues to pretend to be a fair and impartial judge, her and the Democrat machine have made their intentions clear. In our effort to expose Radical Susan, WisGOP launched a new website, [RadicalSusan.com](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ctyduuy-didthutlhu-j/), showcasing Susan Crawford's history of serving as a political weapon for the far-left Madison elite and why she is bad for Wisconsin. Not only does Radical Susan put criminals above Wisconsin's children and families, allow sexual predators to roam free on our streets, let violent criminals be released early, and fight to remove Voter ID laws, making our elections less secure, her and the Democrat machine plan to use this race to gerrymander Wisconsin's congressional districts.In a shocking email, obtained by the _[Milwaukee Journal Sentinel](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ctyduuy-didthutlhu-t/)_ , Democratic donors were asked to attend a fundraising briefing, hosted by liberal California billionaire Reid Hoffman, described as a "Chance to put two more House seats in play for 2026," featuring Susan Crawford and Wisconsin Democratic Chairman Ben Wikler. Radical Susan and her far-left friends are selling Wisconsin's Congressional seats to out-of-state billionaires. Susan Crawford was also endorsed by Eric Holder and the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, whose mission is installing and keeping a liberal majority to Wisconsin's Supreme Court to gerrymander legislative maps to favor Democrats.Eric Holder knows Radical Susan is his ticket to redrawing Wisconsin's congressional maps in Democrats' favor. Radical Susan will continue to play pretend and tell voters that she will be "impartial", despite the mountain of evidence of the contrary.In April, Wisconsinites need to stand up to Radical Susan and out of state liberals. **In Case You Missed It**[**ICYMI: Susan Crawford Caught Selling Two House Seats for Donations**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ctyduuy-didthutlhu-i/)
"In an appeal to entice out-of-state billionaires, Susan Crawford said the quiet part out loud: she is begging to be bought and paid for. Her willingness to use the Court as a market for political favors is not only unethical, it's disrespectful to the people of Wisconsin who are owed justice by their government. Susan Crawford is unfit to serve on the Wisconsin Supreme Court," stated WisGOP Chairman Brian Schimming.[**ICYMI: Radical Susan Crawford is Bad for Wisconsin**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ctyduuy-didthutlhu-d/)
Today, WisGOP launched a new site, [RadicalSusan.com](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ctyduuy-didthutlhu-h/), showcasing Susan Crawford's history of serving as a political weapon for the far-left Madison elite and why she is bad for Wisconsin.[**ICYMI: WisGOP Reaction to the State of the State Address**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ctyduuy-didthutlhu-k/)
"Tax and Spend Tony Evers has previously said he would deliver tax cuts for Wisconsinites but his record proves otherwise. Last year, Evers vetoed three Republican proposals that would have brought $3.5 billion in tax cuts to Wisconsinites. This fall, Wisconsin voted to maintain a Republican majority in the legislature to keep a check on Tax and Spend Tony Evers. Tony Evers' address will not distract Wisconsinites from his failures as Governor." stated WisGOP Chairman Brian Schimming.

[**ICYMI: Crawford's Hypocrisy on Extreme Partisanship Reaches New Heights**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ctyduuy-didthutlhu-u/)
"Crawford's record speaks for itself: she is a liberal partisan through and through," said Andrew Iverson, Executive Director for the Republican Party of Wisconsin. "From her cozy relationship with liberal activists and donors to her time working in Democratic administrations and partisan law firms, Crawford has spent her career pushing out-of-touch, liberal policies at the expense of fairness and justice. Crawford's laughable attempt to project her partisan campaign on her opponent reeks of hypocrisy."

name: Rebecca Weber
subject: Democrats and RINOs want to tank this nomination!
body:
Donald Trump hit the ground running after his inauguration.

| |
---
| | Kash Patel is a true patriot who has spent his career defending the American people, exposing the deep state, and fighting to restore integrity to our government.
---
| |
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zo1mhek2sknbsh9kmj7slbaq606oadruk9kd7l80_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5i68oj6clh2bs)
---
| | **Fellow Patriot,** Donald Trump hit the ground running after his inauguration. He’s signed hundreds of executive orders to undo much of the damage caused by the Biden administration, and he’s named a stellar lineup of cabinet appointments.Some have already been confirmed by the Senate. But the Left-wing media, radical Democrats, and even weak-kneed RINOs are working overtime to sabotage one of his most important picks – **Kash Patel as FBI Director**._**[_**Today I need your help to DEMAND Kash Patel CONFIRMATION!**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcq5s6u07cp0upduplki8nbimt022baua5fa219o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5i68oj6clh2bs)**_ Kash Patel is a true patriot who has spent his career defending the American people, exposing the deep state, and fighting to restore integrity to our government. He’s proven that he won’t back down, especially in the fight to hold the FBI accountable for its weaponization under Christopher Wray. Under Wray’s leadership, the FBI’s actions cast a dark shadow on our nation’s federal law enforcement – it became a political tool used against the Biden administration’s political opponents and innocent American citizens.Under Wray’s watch:
---
* **The FBI coordinated with Big Tech outlets to censor and lie about the Hunter Biden laptop story.**
* **They targeted Traditional Catholics and labeled them as potential “Domestic Terrorists.”**
* **And they investigated parent groups to punish and malign Americans who opposed Critical Race Theory and gender madness in schools.**

---
My friend, **America deserves better.** President Trump understands that, which is why he’s nominated Kash Patel – someone who will restore honor, transparency, and fairness to the FBI.But we know what’s coming: just like they tried to do with Pete Hegseth, the Democrats will unite to block Kash Patel’s confirmation, and it will only take a handful of weak Republican Senators to sink this critical appointment. Make no mistake; the radical Democrats and deep state actors will do anything to stop Kash from cleaning house at the FBI...... including bullying and coercing “Republican” Senators into voting “No.”If we don’t stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak RINOs could help the Democrats tank this nomination. We can’t let that happen. We won’t let them undermine President Trump again!_**[_**If you agree that Kash Patel MUST BE CONFIRMED as FBI Director, then please click here to fill out your CONFIRM KASH Response Form right away!**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlts669i6uf5gn06dpulmc0f85njnico17719v28_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5i68oj6clh2bs)**_ And my friend, this isn’t just about Kash Patel. This is about ensuring President Trump’s America First agenda is implemented without sabotage from the radical Left or weak Republicans.Donald Trump won in a landslide, mandate election. The American people have given HIM the power to choose his cabinet. To deny his picks is to deny the will of **_We the People_**.If we stand down now, we’ll send a message that RINOs and Democrats can undermine the will of the people and block President Trump’s vision for a stronger America. That can’t happen! AMAC Action is mounting a massive pressure campaign – [**but we need every conservative voice backing us up.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztklun18qh4gbuh1asb18pb0stltp58km9b01m68_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5i68oj6clh2bs)
---
[ **CONFIRM KASH**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8s543rukn0c41p15kgffu4la8q5fm8qe3d164h8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5i68oj6clh2bs)
---
Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber – CEO of AMAC. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections. That’s why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. And with conservative control in Washington with only _razor-thin margins_ , our advocacy is more critical than ever before. We cannot take our foot off the gas for one second.It’s simple: when we speak, Washington listens. When you speak, We listen.And we’ve got a To-Do list a mile long to pave the way for the incoming administration. But my friend, all we do, we do with the support of patriots like you. Fellow American, thanks to YOU, thousands of young people have been inspired by the President's message of FREEDOM, PATRIOTISM, and AMERICAN GREATNESS... **... and the Turning Point Generation -- as I call these high school and college students -- are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people.**

| | | | **MESSAGE FROM ANNA PAULINA LUNA:**
---
_**The Dem establishment is standing on my doormat.**_
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ze00c8m6j2sorad47bc993u97lp206l0k189pdbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5i64p36c9h2bs)

Patriot, this is Anna Paulina Luna, and let me tell you something—they hate what we stand for.

Conservative veterans like myself and Pete Hegseth are under **VICIOUS** attack because we refuse to bow to their woke, America-**LAST** agenda.
Since Pete Hegseth’s brutal nomination process, I’ve become #1 on the radical left’s target list and I need some serious supporters.

In my short time in Congress, I’ve shaken up the swamp—fighting to **CRUSH** the corruption destroying our nation.

As a proud Air Force veteran and daughter of a single mom, I’ve earned my stripes through service and grit—not by playing D.C.’s dirty games.

That’s why the Radical Left sees me as one of their biggest threats—and if I’m going to keep fighting, I’ll need your help.
**I’ll be frank, I’m just $11,349 away from reaching my end of month goal.**
Could I ask for your helping hand today with a small donation to ensure we can **HOLD** the majority?
[If everyone reading this chipped-in, we can get this done. I’m counting on you.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za4ulolbo41nsue6mglfnjt1ak6od43qkvasffl0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5i64p36c9h2bs)

[PLEASE STAND WITH ME](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqgie9ar9adjtfs4tbg17f0r4badnuoj77d5ta08_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5i64p36c9h2bs)

Thank you & God Bless,
Anna Paulina Luna

name: Rebecca Weber
subject: Democrats and RINOs want to tank this nomination!
body:
Donald Trump hit the ground running after his inauguration.

| |
---
| | Kash Patel is a true patriot who has spent his career defending the American people, exposing the deep state, and fighting to restore integrity to our government.
---
| |
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ztsohrod5etmb84tan31m2rl98i67tp42rubjsa8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5i64p36c9h2bs)
---
| | **Fellow Patriot,** Donald Trump hit the ground running after his inauguration. He’s signed hundreds of executive orders to undo much of the damage caused by the Biden administration, and he’s named a stellar lineup of cabinet appointments.Some have already been confirmed by the Senate. But the Left-wing media, radical Democrats, and even weak-kneed RINOs are working overtime to sabotage one of his most important picks – **Kash Patel as FBI Director**._**[_**Today I need your help to DEMAND Kash Patel CONFIRMATION!**_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5qja7appfkdavu727q25k1hdhrv45ul5k5csq8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5i64p36c9h2bs)**_ Kash Patel is a true patriot who has spent his career defending the American people, exposing the deep state, and fighting to restore integrity to our government. He’s proven that he won’t back down, especially in the fight to hold the FBI accountable for its weaponization under Christopher Wray. Under Wray’s leadership, the FBI’s actions cast a dark shadow on our nation’s federal law enforcement – it became a political tool used against the Biden administration’s political opponents and innocent American citizens.Under Wray’s watch:
---
* **The FBI coordinated with Big Tech outlets to censor and lie about the Hunter Biden laptop story.**
* **They targeted Traditional Catholics and labeled them as potential “Domestic Terrorists.”**
* **And they investigated parent groups to punish and malign Americans who opposed Critical Race Theory and gender madness in schools.**

---
My friend, **America deserves better.** President Trump understands that, which is why he’s nominated Kash Patel – someone who will restore honor, transparency, and fairness to the FBI.But we know what’s coming: just like they tried to do with Pete Hegseth, the Democrats will unite to block Kash Patel’s confirmation, and it will only take a handful of weak Republican Senators to sink this critical appointment. Make no mistake; the radical Democrats and deep state actors will do anything to stop Kash from cleaning house at the FBI...... including bullying and coercing “Republican” Senators into voting “No.”If we don’t stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak RINOs could help the Democrats tank this nomination. We can’t let that happen. We won’t let them undermine President Trump again!_**[_**If you agree that Kash Patel MUST BE CONFIRMED as FBI Director, then please click here to fill out your CONFIRM KASH Response Form right away!**_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0o3pscgitooec0lstfeg75gikkbvpqctmn489j8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5i64p36c9h2bs)**_ And my friend, this isn’t just about Kash Patel. This is about ensuring President Trump’s America First agenda is implemented without sabotage from the radical Left or weak Republicans.Donald Trump won in a landslide, mandate election. The American people have given HIM the power to choose his cabinet. To deny his picks is to deny the will of **_We the People_**.If we stand down now, we’ll send a message that RINOs and Democrats can undermine the will of the people and block President Trump’s vision for a stronger America. That can’t happen! AMAC Action is mounting a massive pressure campaign – [**but we need every conservative voice backing us up.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7dnkcl67ughl5sqvkanh4602reqso05pkii3rpg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5i64p36c9h2bs)
---
[ **CONFIRM KASH**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkvesmb2dr0uclpvq78qepmss8d5u8hgsk8pqcng_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5i64p36c9h2bs)
---
Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber – CEO of AMAC. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections. That’s why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. And with conservative control in Washington with only _razor-thin margins_ , our advocacy is more critical than ever before. We cannot take our foot off the gas for one second.It’s simple: when we speak, Washington listens. When you speak, We listen.And we’ve got a To-Do list a mile long to pave the way for the incoming administration. But my friend, all we do, we do with the support of patriots like you. And mounting a huge pressure campaign to confirm Kash Patel will take time, money, and resources.**[That’s why I’m asking you to join AMAC Action with your very best CONFIRM KASH emergency contribution today.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdaemlqec2tac8j5fhlr9lujrtplhf5c2r1hprag_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5i64p36c9h2bs)** Let’s send a clear message:
---
* **The American people will not be denied.**
* **Weak-kneed Republicans will not stand in the way of the America First movement.**
* **And Kash Patel will be confirmed as FBI Director.**

---
No one is in a better position to advocate for change than AMAC Action – and with you by our side, we’re an unstoppable force.**_But we have got to move quickly. We have just days to rally support for this critical nomination –_**** _[So please don’t delay!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpchb2bk2pkgp9rtau3f6pjmse4dt7dqjbd83fao_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5i64p36c9h2bs)_** Let’s make it clear that the American people will not be denied. Let’s show them that Election Day was just the beginning.Thank you, friend!
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zq1dil6hvipklnbq4no24uu8h7r2b3v00oumn6d0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5i64p36c9h2bs)

_**_**[Support AMAC Action](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zrmb5qitpkalig6j269lmo3d2lkc9bgvvl6tc068_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5i64p36c9h2bs)**_**_

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: We’re going to win the American Culture War
body:
To celebrate this PRO-AMERICA MOMENTUM, I wanted to send you a LIMITED EDITION “47” hat

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zer2lar7i622nierbkfnnth0s74lg3p7gj9ith9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5i62o71c1h2bs)
---
Friend, What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point's AMERICAFEST, the biggest and boldest celebration of our country and our freedoms! Friend, thanks to YOU, thousands of young people have been inspired by the President-elect's message of FREEDOM, PATRIOTISM, and AMERICAN GREATNESS... **... and the Turning Point Generation -- as I call these high school and college students -- are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people.**
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zk0mk5jtfbll672ja99o9of49cgisb9ba0q94t68_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5i62o71c1h2bs)
---
To celebrate this PRO-AMERICA MOMENTUM, I wanted to send you a LIMITED EDITION "47" hat to honor our 47th president-elect: DONALD TRUMP. _**[_**All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to help Turning Point USA inspire MILLIONS MORE kids to LOVE AMERICA again in the year ahead!**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjp8tg9c0figalggqmkpkcous4f0ieom8tpm8u3o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5i62o71c1h2bs)**_

---
Thanks to generous patriots like YOU, Turning Point USA:
* **Leads the BIGGEST and MOST IMPACTFUL patriotic student movement** in American history, with 820,000+ student activists in ALL 50 states,

* **Reaches nearly EVERY smartphone and computer in our country with POWERFUL, PRO-AMERICA content** -- as only Turning Point USA can go HEAD-TO-HEAD with the Fake News Media in online reach, AND

* **Continues to INSPIRE millions of kids to LOVE AMERICA again** , with a MASSIVE SWING in favor of conservative principles among young people under age 25!

But while we're seeing MAJOR WINS every day ... we must keep up our momentum until we TOTALLY WIN the American Culture War against the "Woke" Left! _**[Please, friend, make your gift of any amount today to help Turning Point USA make MILLIONS MORE kids LOVE AMERICA again, and I'll send YOU a limited-edition "47" hat as my personal thanks.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zav7ecao888t5kc3lis39onkjok79h5nlcutlb1o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5i62o71c1h2bs)**_
---
[ **Make your gift & claim your "47" hat!**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0kinojuj5vgbpv0knlfuo2p79nkkbluv81ejq0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5i62o71c1h2bs)
---
Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and generous support of the 820,000+ America-loving young people of Turning Point USA. Working together, I know we will totally defeat the "Woke" Left to WIN the American Culture War and restore PATRIOTISM and FREEDOM as our country's way of life again! Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

---|---
| | |
---
| |
# _Weekly Recap_
It was an eventful week at the Statehouse where, amongst the flurry of committees and legislation, we heard Governor Mike Braun deliver his first State of the State, and Chief Justice Loretta Rush deliver her State of the Judiciary.
[You can hear my response to Governor Braun's State of the State here.](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=b686e6c92b60387cd0a54be3d94a78b8d8dcee31d8030e071568db935d05fc4352ab0e917603ee031e91f09e992dd9639f59ebe84c884a6a "You can hear my response to Governor Braun's State of the State here.")
I remain steadfast in my commitment to work with you all, and my colleagues in the Statehouse, to pass legislation aimed at positively impacting the futures, families and freedoms of all Hoosiers.
_**Committees I Attended this Week**_
* [Tax and Fiscal Policy](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=b686e6c92b60387c6bfe4ba7f12530e82098ec4a7b7b56677186845c088a122397e7f4c82b552b1d38bc31b6475a3d9132c7f5914faeec29 "Tax and Fiscal Policy") 💸
* [Pensions and Labor](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=b686e6c92b60387c71b67c691916cbe11819961a6f9abce45b7dd914c6e716da1f962181d9b0535433b1d76629c4b5e77d19c72cb69b2c56 "Pensions and Labor") 💪
* [Education and Career Development](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=b686e6c92b60387ca6dfdacfefff6760139062013b4e28b3ef7a12e43c8a99bb4fd3468e2eab064b756561c3538ce2b5003a7f8b4b3e91e1 "Education and Career Development") 🚌
* [Utilities](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=b686e6c92b60387c5d0ab5303766ab282ada65fd2a73fe7ccbd16c34578c3be71b893ef04d582dad94197d38f505418d56d124307b57e1ad "Utilities") 🔋

---
#
* * *
---
|
---
| | | In our state, the leading cause of death for our young people is **guns.**

What is even more startling is the trend that shows it is just getting worse, with **youth firearm injuries tripling over the last six years in Indiana**.

One important way we can work to mitigate firearm injuries to Hoosier children is to address safe storage of firearms. My bill,**[SB 248](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=b686e6c92b60387c0a4038171039dbe190631f81534852457166ab1e018d65a613c730820088ea2d164e7e80ae466fcd137fcbc1d6624b74 "SB 248")**, does this.

This bill would increase the penalties in instances where a child injures themselves because an unsecured, loaded, firearm was left unattended.

Indiana is one of 24 states that have no safe storage laws. **This is unacceptable if we are serious about protecting our children**.

I am hopeful that this bill will receive a hearing in the Committee on Corrections and Criminal Law, and I am thankful for my colleague Senators Mark Spencer and Rodney Pol for championing this bill alongside me.
---
|
---
#
* * *
---
## **SB 111 Passes Out of the Senate on Third Reading**
---
|
---
[Senate Bill (SB) 111](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=b686e6c92b60387cb41a1e2b7166df0c2f02177425defa9bca5941e3f62820a1df5243f5199918c9fc7314ca75e774b3f10c406a7e6853c4 "Senate Bill \(SB\) 111"), a bill ensuring insurance coverage for living organ donors, passed on third reading this past week with resounding bipartisan support.

In Indiana, we have over 1,200 Hoosiers waiting on life-saving organ transplants. These folks rely on the selflessness of family, friends or total strangers for a chance at a higher quality of life.

_SB 111 incentivizes organ donations by:_**

• Prohibiting insurance companies from limiting or declining coverage solely because the individual is a living organ donor or discriminating in any way against living donors
• Ensuring insurers do not prohibit insured individuals from donating as condition of receiving an insurance policy
• Guaranteeing coverage for those who donate**

It is crucial we remove these barriers for those who wish to save a life by donating an organ.

SB 111 first passed out of Senate Insurance and Financial Institutions after moving testimonies by those who had received organ donations.

I am so grateful to those who shared their stories of resiliency in the face of adversity. We saw firsthand the impact that organ donations have not only on those who receive them, but their loved ones as well.

I could not help but think of her friend, the late Senator Jean Breaux, who long championed this legislation, as SB 111 has moved through the Senate. Our Caucus, and the work we do, stands on the shoulders of giants like Sen. Breaux who spent her life as a public servant advocating for the families, futures and freedoms of all Hoosiers.

I have hope that the House will have similar support for SB 111 and ensure this long overdue legislation becomes law.

---
#
* * *
---
**Advocating for Diversity, Equity and Inlcusion in Indiana**
---
| [](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=b686e6c92b60387c3236c5dc0a5ec2e5ece2320cc5ce6316689e59f1e71093b86b2c0cfaf5bf6ebcab526a0207934f55b315b4664e1be976)
---

Diversity, equity and inclusion are about bringing people together who have different perspectives, experiences and ideas.

We unlock creativity, solve problems more effectively and build a future that is stronger for everyone when we champion these principles.

I had the opportunity to chat with Lt. Governor Micah Beckwith on Indiana Lawmakers to go over why prioritizing DEI initiatives is the right approach for Hoosiers.

Thank you for listening!
---
#
* * *
---
| | | |
---
|
# Thank you for completing my 2025 Pre-Session Survey
Thank you to all of you who took time share your your hopes, concerns and ideas for our community.

Stay tuned for next week's newsletter for the results of the online and by-mail surveys for District 46.

---

* * *
---

[Black Legislative Caucus hosts 'unity rally' during Braun's first State of the State address](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=b686e6c92b60387c8a4e5fc054136924293b9b328d0198deb25d4267628b8e1bddaf4642d6971f50f6da5e17406dafa76a2524473efe566d "Black Legislative Caucus hosts 'unity rally' during Braun’s first State of the State address") [Bill aimed at protecting living organ donors passes out of Senate with overwhelming support](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=b686e6c92b60387c682c769bdec943d0ade0629fa02ad9088cb4513869eaff34f840b5ddb89866e61f0495d69bd12c4018ac2f7551f8143b "Bill aimed at protecting living organ donors passes out of Senate with overwhelming support") [Friends, family, supporters gather for LGBTQ+ Statehouse Day](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=b686e6c92b60387cd0754d2b4395e653d5be4213d134c1e44b2eeae66c7af61133cc2d6081dfc17a05dad69c6e62b3cf8356e1574990365a "Friends, family, supporters gather for LGBTQ+ Statehouse Day")

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: Your pre-primary checklist
body:
Peter, 130 days. That’s how much time we have until the June 10 New Jersey Primary election where we the common sense people
|
---
| Peter, 130 days. That’s how much time we have until the **June 10** New Jersey Primary election where we the common sense people have the chance to decide WHO is on our November ballot. Will it be the same status-quo, do-nothing lemons chosen year-after-year by the political elite (because, by the way, only 2 in 10 of us have been voting in primaries until now)? Not if we vote. And it’s never too late to get ready. Here’s your pre-primary 2025 checklist (if you’ve already done one of these, move on to the next!):
1. name: Concealed Carry
subject: Your CCW Permit is approved! download here ✅
body:
It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20119/6374453/350d861447d1c7f10f9c3cde3a5f9f9846dc6f40/68fccc8978aba3b3f3686d6601625bd51a0c1ac9)
---
| | |

_February 1st, 2025_
---
| | |
---
It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20119/6374453/4ceb2748f3af42f246912350646df48f60535c11/68fccc8978aba3b3f3686d6601625bd51a0c1ac9). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20119/6374453/4ceb2748f3af42f246912350646df48f60535c11/68fccc8978aba3b3f3686d6601625bd51a0c1ac9).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20119/6374453/4ceb2748f3af42f246912350646df48f60535c11/68fccc8978aba3b3f3686d6601625bd51a0c1ac9)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

name: No Dem Left Behind Executive Director, Hassan Martini
subject: Reflecting After Wednesday's Tragedy
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wa6hk-ulol0q-kyd76rh1/)
---
# **Reflecting After Wednesday's Tragedy**
---
| | | | Dear friend, As Executive Director of No Dem Left Behind, I frequently travel to our nation's capital. Like many of my colleagues, I’ve come to consider DCA, or Ronald Reagan Airport, a second home. The recent tragedy on that familiar flight route has deeply affected me. Countless times, I’ve gazed out the window as we approach DC, taking in the sight of the Washington Monument, the White House, and the Capitol Building. These landmarks evoke a sense of history and purpose, reminding me of the importance of our work. These flights are filled with people like myself—traveling for work, living in DC, or visiting as tourists eager to experience our nation’s rich history. DC is a diverse and vibrant city, welcoming people from all walks of life. I can’t help but think that many passengers on flight AA5342 were doing exactly what I do in those final moments—looking out the window in awe of the city’s beauty, perhaps even capturing a photo or two. My heart aches for the victims and their families. I hope they find some peace in time. For now, we can only offer our prayers and support. This tragedy comes at a time when our nation is facing yet another crisis. MAGA and Trump are tearing apart our democracy—eroding progress, innovation, and human rights, one department at a time. The hearings this week for Trump’s nominees would make our Founding Fathers turn in their graves—whether due to their incompetence, ignorance, or, in the case of Tulsi Gabbard, outright treasonous behavior. Before anyone accuses me of being melodramatic, let’s be clear: she has a history of praising our country’s enemies, parroting their propaganda, and doing so at the expense of the United States. If that’s not treason, what is? Right now, Trump, Elon Musk, and their oligarch allies are doing whatever they want—boasting about it every step of the way. But we are taking notes. We are exposing their actions and, more importantly, explaining why they are doing them. Musk’s Doge program is designed to replace federal government employees with AI bots. They don’t value human capital because they don’t value humans. That is who they are. But that is not who we are as Americans. I know times are tough. As the saying goes, elections have consequences—and boy, are we feeling them. Meanwhile, something important is happening in DC this week that isn’t making headlines: the DNC is meeting to elect a new chair. No Dem Left Behind has proudly endorsed Wisconsin Chair Ben Wikler for the position. We’ve worked closely with the Wisconsin Democrats over the years, and they run exactly the kind of operation our party needs—listening to all voices, trying new ideas, and exploring innovative ways to connect with voters from all walks of life. Ben has done that in Wisconsin, and we are confident he can bring that winning formula to the rest of the country. That said, I’ve been incredibly impressed with all the candidates running for DNC Chair and Vice Chair. Their ideas are refreshing, and regardless of who wins, I hope they come together to implement those ideas into our party. We must rebuild, win again, and restore everything Trump is trying to take away from us. We have work to do, and we are doing it. In the meantime, we must raise our voices, exercise our First Amendment rights, and call out wrongdoing wherever we see it. In Solidarity, Hassan Martini

clean_body: | | | | | | Reflecting After Wednesday's Tragedy | | | | Dear friend, As Executive Director of No Dem Left Behind, I frequently travel to our nation's capital. Like many of my colleagues, I’ve come to consider DCA, or Ronald Reagan Airport, a second home. The recent tragedy on that familiar flight route has deeply affected me. Countless times, I’ve gazed out the window as we approach DC, taking in the sight of the Washington Monument, the White House, and the Capitol Building. These landmarks evoke a sense of history and purpose, reminding me of the importance of our work. These flights are filled with people like myself—traveling for work, living in DC, or visiting as tourists eager to experience our nation’s rich history. DC is a diverse and vibrant city, welcoming people from all walks of life. I can’t help but think that many passengers on flight AA5342 were doing exactly what I do in those final moments—looking out the window in awe of the city’s beauty, perhaps even capturing a photo or two. My heart aches for the victims and their families. I hope they find some peace in time. For now, we can only offer our prayers and support. This tragedy comes at a time when our nation is facing yet another crisis. MAGA and Trump are tearing apart our democracy—eroding progress, innovation, and human rights, one department at a time. The hearings this week for Trump’s nominees would make our Founding Fathers turn in their graves—whether due to their incompetence, ignorance, or, in the case of Tulsi Gabbard, outright treasonous behavior. Before anyone accuses me of being melodramatic, let’s be clear: she has a history of praising our country’s enemies, parroting their propaganda, and doing so at the expense of the United States. If that’s not treason, what is? Right now, Trump, Elon Musk, and their oligarch allies are doing whatever they want—boasting about it every step of the way. But we are taking notes. We are exposing their actions and, more importantly, explaining why they are doing them. Musk’s Doge program is designed to replace federal government employees with AI bots. They don’t value human capital because they don’t value humans. That is who they are. But that is not who we are as Americans. I know times are tough. As the saying goes, elections have consequences—and boy, are we feeling them. Meanwhile, something important is happening in DC this week that isn’t making headlines: the DNC is meeting to elect a new chair. No Dem Left Behind has proudly endorsed Wisconsin Chair Ben Wikler for the position. We’ve worked closely with the Wisconsin Democrats over the years, and they run exactly the kind of operation our party needs—listening to all voices, trying new ideas, and exploring innovative ways to connect with voters from all walks of life. Ben has done that in Wisconsin, and we are confident he can bring that winning formula to the rest of the country. That said, I’ve been incredibly impressed with all the candidates running for DNC Chair and Vice Chair. Their ideas are refreshing, and regardless of who wins, I hope they come together to implement those ideas into our party. We must rebuild, win again, and restore everything Trump is trying to take away from us. We have work to do, and we are doing it. In the meantime, we must raise our voices, exercise our First Amendment rights, and call out wrongdoing wherever we see it. In Solidarity, Hassan Martini | | Thank you for your support in this pivotal time. | | | | | No Dem Left Behind PAC P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003 | You are subscribed to this email as dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to modify your or .

You are cordially invited to join the MassGOP for a Galentine's Day Wine & Chocolate Tasting at our headquarters on Feb 11th 🌹💘🍫🍷
Did you know 5 out of the 6 MassGOP leadership positions are filled by women?

name: Jeff Younger
subject: They need to be held accountable
body:
...I’ve watched the school system, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.

| | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now.
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-U9uIQ55tBThQcFVS2V7vg~~/AARclBA~/OX7siSx-thuYOXDe9niwhXQv7tXZgOUz_Uf6Mt2ljb-LEvdWnzxIYYTnWhf9o6QFRboP0rr5PBueBWTbjMeG7-Cd0DkHzviOaySEmwpiyxTaBNh24gye77JrL2ueKOiasfmr4qEZbTrGDFOBZSVXX_zv69jIygO61Ulp5_iQlRkqafmKrW4CaKoe7R0WkIRIARmiPzOMrsEaN0BpkUwOQvm92sQjErtNOPXPVL1XCMYL64FmDiUsSnZIsTtqzYu2-jnXxgqay9pMK3b_gvi7WAWjiwSIY55hjqKFXUVWGsc~)
---
My Dear Friend, My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above.I’m writing to you because I’ve spent the last eight years fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, and out-of-control judges from transitioning my son James against my will and against all reason.You may have heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or on Fox News.I am James’s father, but because I refused to accept that my 5 YEAR OLD boy should be surgically and chemically castrated......I’ve watched the school system, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James. That’s why I’m writing to you today. **[I need your help.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-U9uIQ55tBThQcFVS2V7vg~~/AARclBA~/OX7siSx-thuYOXDe9niwhXQv7tXZgOUz_Uf6Mt2ljb-LEvdWnzxIYYTnWhf9o6QFRboP0rr5PBueBWTbjMeG7-Cd0DkHzviOaySEmwpiyxTaBNh24gye77JrL2ueKOiasfmr4qEZbTrGDFOBZSVXX_zv69jIygO61Ulp5_iQlRkqafmKrW4CaKoe7R0WkIRIARmiPzOMrsEaN0BpkUwOQvm92sQjErtNOPXPVL1XCMYL64FmDiUsSnZIsTtqzYu2-jnXxgqay9pMK3b_gvi7WAWjiwSIY55hjqKFXUVWGsc~)** I’m up against radical trans-activist judges, the 6 BILLION dollar trans lobby, and coastal elites forcing their LGBTQ+ agenda down our throats. They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees... They’re trying to break my spirit... I want to keep fighting, but I can’t do it alone. If you’re with me in the fight to **Save James** , **[would you consider making a generous $25 contribution to my Legal Defense Fund today?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/h0BcoDDUZyrHbwUyiKKDhA~~/AARclBA~/V5E8qzFSfXznbcH5P0Mjlnx3UrPk_g5rt5RgYbabBJN11mNP-nN_yEDHN4LfciUeJy2yI2_-kWPZhtL682UQ1yLZtu800-IhPZ290tKow-U8XMaeuCugUsrKKxBV_xv8HdCIdqEgreXgpj93FS3HGZC4i_8qp-r8r2P11Y_9YIZ63zR5NdzMCK6IiZw6393flEmxs4VtmnN9xDuJvbVGTx2OEr6lWphUtcVFtaWjR4Fbp_YIZr27UFlSBKOBKUOGANR73TWwj3t8GkichExgggUGFcVDWJjFThUeU2jJ96h2uuFhLbLSqweBmmlnxvQP)** But I’m getting ahead of myself...Let me start at the beginning. When James was just two years old, my ex-wife began saying our boy James was actually a girl.I told her she was wrong, and I kept dropping my son off at school in boy’s clothes because **he is a boy**. (I can’t believe I have to say that.) I later found out that the school counselors were changing him into girl’s clothes once he got to school WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE to inflame this delusion.Then during the custody battle, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.The court-mandated supervisor would ONLY let me see James if I put him in girl’s clothes. I have never affirmed the lie that my son is a girl, nor will I ever affirm it.So I was forced to stop visiting him.It broke my heart.**Do you see what we’re up against?** I can confirm that these trans-activist judges are presiding over kangaroo courts where common sense goes right out the window.They need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And **James** needs to be **saved** from their butchery.**[THAT’S why I need your help.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-U9uIQ55tBThQcFVS2V7vg~~/AARclBA~/OX7siSx-thuYOXDe9niwhXQv7tXZgOUz_Uf6Mt2ljb-LEvdWnzxIYYTnWhf9o6QFRboP0rr5PBueBWTbjMeG7-Cd0DkHzviOaySEmwpiyxTaBNh24gye77JrL2ueKOiasfmr4qEZbTrGDFOBZSVXX_zv69jIygO61Ulp5_iQlRkqafmKrW4CaKoe7R0WkIRIARmiPzOMrsEaN0BpkUwOQvm92sQjErtNOPXPVL1XCMYL64FmDiUsSnZIsTtqzYu2-jnXxgqay9pMK3b_gvi7WAWjiwSIY55hjqKFXUVWGsc~)** I am under a gag order currently to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Obviously, I’m not abiding by that order because it’s blatantly unconstitutional.But that’s not even the point.If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time. But I’m not just some activist.I’m a Dad.I’m fighting to save my son.And I will never give up on **James**.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers. I authored the bill in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee that outlawed sex change surgeries for minors.I then spent every dollar I had to make sure cowardly politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair. I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, but then my ex-wife just took James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state.And there was nothing I could do to stop it.And that’s the scary part:**If this can happen in Texas, it can happen anywhere.** Then in California, the radical judge railroaded me and gave my ex-wife free reign to proceed with the castration.I can’t even appeal the case because he sealed all the court records...I’ll have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process...On top of that, the other side is trying to make ME pay THEIR legal fees...**Do you see what we’re up against?** But if Conservatives won’t put up a fight, how will we ever win? That’s where Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) comes in. They heard about my case and immediately offered to stand by my side. **[Will you stand with us?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-U9uIQ55tBThQcFVS2V7vg~~/AARclBA~/OX7siSx-thuYOXDe9niwhXQv7tXZgOUz_Uf6Mt2ljb-LEvdWnzxIYYTnWhf9o6QFRboP0rr5PBueBWTbjMeG7-Cd0DkHzviOaySEmwpiyxTaBNh24gye77JrL2ueKOiasfmr4qEZbTrGDFOBZSVXX_zv69jIygO61Ulp5_iQlRkqafmKrW4CaKoe7R0WkIRIARmiPzOMrsEaN0BpkUwOQvm92sQjErtNOPXPVL1XCMYL64FmDiUsSnZIsTtqzYu2-jnXxgqay9pMK3b_gvi7WAWjiwSIY55hjqKFXUVWGsc~)**

clean_body: ...I’ve watched the school system, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges. | | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now. | | | | | | ~ My Dear Friend, My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above.I’m writing to you because I’ve spent the last eight years fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, and out-of-control judges from transitioning my son James against my will and against all reason.You may have heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or on Fox News.I am James’s father, but because I refused to accept that my 5 YEAR OLD boy should be surgically and chemically castrated......I’ve watched the school system, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James. That’s why I’m writing to you today. ~ I’m up against radical trans-activist judges, the 6 BILLION dollar trans lobby, and coastal elites forcing their LGBTQ+ agenda down our throats. They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees... They’re trying to break my spirit... I want to keep fighting, but I can’t do it alone. If you’re with me in the fight to Save James , But I’m getting ahead of myself...Let me start at the beginning. When James was just two years old, my ex-wife began saying our boy James was actually a girl.I told her she was wrong, and I kept dropping my son off at school in boy’s clothes because he is a boy. (I can’t believe I have to say that.) I later found out that the school counselors were changing him into girl’s clothes once he got to school WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE to inflame this delusion.Then during the custody battle, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.The court-mandated supervisor would ONLY let me see James if I put him in girl’s clothes. I have never affirmed the lie that my son is a girl, nor will I ever affirm it.So I was forced to stop visiting him.It broke my heart.Do you see what we’re up against? I can confirm that these trans-activist judges are presiding over kangaroo courts where common sense goes right out the window.They need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And James needs to be saved from their butchery.~ I am under a gag order currently to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Obviously, I’m not abiding by that order because it’s blatantly unconstitutional.But that’s not even the point.If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time. But I’m not just some activist.I’m a Dad.I’m fighting to save my son.And I will never give up on James.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers. I authored the bill in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee that outlawed sex change surgeries for minors.I then spent every dollar I had to make sure cowardly politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair. I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, but then my ex-wife just took James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state.And there was nothing I could do to stop it.And that’s the scary part:If this can happen in Texas, it can happen anywhere. Then in California, the radical judge railroaded me and gave my ex-wife free reign to proceed with the castration.I can’t even appeal the case because he sealed all the court records...I’ll have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process...On top of that, the other side is trying to make ME pay THEIR legal fees...Do you see what we’re up against? But if Conservatives won’t put up a fight, how will we ever win? That’s where Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) comes in. They heard about my case and immediately offered to stand by my side. ~ | | | | | | | The fact is, if you care about keeping your children or grandchildren safe...If you want to save my son James from castration and make sure this will NEVER happen to ANY child ever again...And if you want to send a message to these radical judges that their day of reckoning has come...Then you’ll need someone who knows how these kangaroo courts ACTUALLY operate, and someone who’s willing to do WHATEVER it takes to save his son and every other kid like him.I humbly submit to you that I am that man. ~ Your Warrior on the Frontlines,Jeff Younger ~ P.S. I need your help to save my son. I have fought for a decade to keep radical activists and judges from transitioning my son against my will and against all reason. I have lobbied politicians, wiped out my life’s savings, and spent thousands of hours in court trying to save my son. Would you please rush me your ~ I need your help, and I need to know that I’m not alone in this fight. subject: We’re running out of time
body:
Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call.

| | | my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's.
---
| |
---
Dear Friend, My husband saved the life of his fellow officer and now, on February 3rd, a Soros-funded prosecutor is going to try and lock him up for _11 years_.
Here is one of my favorite pictures of our two boys.
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3459882563f7497ba008f563722836d0&_e=y8V-xP4h4_wId5-BxS318CFhoQQrDJNIeN_UzxZbsSsX5L6vwUAhnxtfLIhCLJm6O4_o0_TgQ_bEVqSPwDYsljR2o4UNMnFp0OHZiYve-SADorh-NTmZhHtKoaRnJ3bf0ZuU-yI5GV5Zhy88uPD2637focwJeOsnFEOqi5PcvUtBYS04Pp9TNr40-0QaQDEigaiFJJNWVzGZdzP22YUlgAfRNAL1TQUkKeDZOcK1E2bpLRJRI1jW9mzTjDaYb_sPRMYQSLsxNHLugmjpyo3V9pFbXz46CCguL9Xe270xnLE9stDu_4U3XAf3H5EIm9gcrTovinHJif5SqFxulzALUYLfuXjGrlcNvUiZqV5hvWtIKj1gk5mX_p55zIJdYMO9agU5W9aMK4THS_N0m5ygaA%3D%3D)

Now it makes me cry. As you can probably tell from my sons' costumes, my husband Brad is a proud U.S. Army veteran. He served two tours of duty in Iraq as a Cavalry Scout. And today he is also a decorated, 9-year veteran of the Las Cruces, New Mexico, police department. I'm used to my husband being in danger. But never in my wildest dreams did I think the biggest threat to Brad wouldn't come from a radical terrorist or a violent gangster... ...but from a _Soros-funded_ , _anti-police_ _prosecutor_. **[**That's why I'm writing you today as a last resort to ask if you'll help me fight for my husband.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3459882563f7497ba008f563722836d0&_e=y8V-xP4h4_wId5-BxS318CFhoQQrDJNIeN_UzxZbsSsX5L6vwUAhnxtfLIhCLJm6O4_o0_TgQ_bEVqSPwDYsljR2o4UNMnFp0OHZiYve-SADorh-NTmZhHtKoaRnJ3bf0ZuU-yI5GV5Zhy88uPD2637focwJeOsnFEOqi5PcvUtBYS04Pp9TNr40-0QaQDEigaiFJJNWVzGZdzP22YUlgAfRNAL1TQUkKeDZOcK1E2Zrn4S85zlXQmdpeNP7t-l_fEaMYAiWG9w6elnVWxsM-VvT5CYc40Ty7lXnKVQUr9nTOtO1UlX1Q5NxKN9xFJsRTeCgXNDJsGHjCRBHcCFa2Wcxqok2kQA2Mmd-Y6VTYivgfqhDYiXPVOSd1GjUDRAf4EIcZsCdHmveoTN2i_Ipqw%3D%3D)** Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad arrived on the scene, right away he sensed something was off. And when he and his partner, Officer Keegan Arbogast, asked the suspect to identify himself, the suspect refused. So when Officer Arbogast saw a knife sitting on the suspect's lap, hidden under a water bottle, the officers moved to detain him. Instead of complying, the suspect got violent. Everything that happened next happened in an instant. As the officers tried to subdue him, the suspect went for Officer Arbogast's gun, trying to pull it from the holster. Then he lunged for Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him. In that moment, my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life. When one of Brad's coworkers called me to tell me there had been a shooting, I burst into tears. I didn't stop crying until Brad came home. I was so thankful he was safe. I knew he did what he had to do to protect his partner so they could both make it home to their families. And when an Internal Investigation _and_ the local District Attorney cleared my husband of any wrongdoing, I thought this awful episode was behind us. I couldn't have been more wrong. Because more than a year after the incident, the Attorney General of New Mexico charged my husband with Voluntary Manslaughter! When I heard about the charges, I was shocked. Then we did some digging -- and it all made sense. The New Mexico Attorney General is a rabid far-Left activist who _hates_ the police. He was funded by George Soros. And because my husband is white, and the suspect was black... ...this radical prosecutor is determined to make a name for himself by destroying my husband and dragging his name through the mud. He even held a press conference and turned the microphone over to the suspect's family so they could spread hateful lies about my husband, smearing him as a "racist" and a "cold-blooded killer." **Make no mistake -- these charges are a slap in the face to every brave man and woman who has ever put on the badge.** Now you can see why I'm so heartbroken and furious. My husband is an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community. That's why he served for 3 years in the Army as a cavalry scout. And it's why he served for 10 years as a police officer. But more than that, he's a wonderful husband and an incredible father to our 9- and 6-year-old boys. We've tried to explain to our boys as best we can about what's going on. But they're too young to fully understand. And I can't bear to think of what it will do to them if one day, Daddy is taken away and they're forced to grow up with their father behind bars. But unless people like you speak up to defend my husband against these disgusting Soros-funded political attacks... ...Brad will miss 11 years of birthdays, wedding anniversaries, and Little League games. As I mentioned earlier, Brad's trial starts in just days and already, the legal bills have become overwhelming for our family. Thank God, we got a call from Jason Johnson. Jason is a retired police officer -- and he's the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Brad. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families -- when it seemed like there was no hope left. And with the thought of losing my husband and trying to suddenly raise my two boys on my own -- I was certainly hopeless. Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best lawyers and expert witnesses available. But it's only because of the support of brave patriots like yourself. Jason and LELDF were an answer to prayer for our family. That's because Brad and I aren't wealthy people. I run our family farm and Brad is a veteran turned cop. So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone. **[**Will you donate $35 or any amount to LELDF to help me save my husband?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3459882563f7497ba008f563722836d0&_e=y8V-xP4h4_wId5-BxS318CFhoQQrDJNIeN_UzxZbsSsX5L6vwUAhnxtfLIhCLJm6O4_o0_TgQ_bEVqSPwDYsljR2o4UNMnFp0OHZiYve-SADorh-NTmZhHtKoaRnJ3bf0ZuU-yI5GV5Zhy88uPD2637focwJeOsnFEOqi5PcvUtBYS04Pp9TNr40-0QaQDEigaiFJJNWVzGZdzP22YUlgAfRNAL1TQUkKeDZOcK1E2a_rzTQy28v_u0g0I2C89JqomtkeO8hor2fhDz8gKNAh5-lIZnjGMtMazsQgkHU16j-fBNMmKPmlMoZGQdWj6uCV2HKQZQrCmcLl-XcLVR5rpHcpYNBlIX77GkmIpMVDwtj06m7FbZmFbDr9lPjK7wC6PfQWi-HBcf12njFJmhGyQ%3D%3D)** If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I'm so scared for Brad and I will do whatever I can for him -- and for our sons. **[So I pray you'll find it in your heart today to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3459882563f7497ba008f563722836d0&_e=y8V-xP4h4_wId5-BxS318CFhoQQrDJNIeN_UzxZbsSsX5L6vwUAhnxtfLIhCLJm6O4_o0_TgQ_bEVqSPwDYsljR2o4UNMnFp0OHZiYve-SADorh-NTmZhHtKoaRnJ3bf0ZuU-yI5GV5Zhy88uPD2637focwJeOsnFEOqi5PcvUtBYS04Pp9TNr40-0QaQDEigaiFJJNWVzGZdzP22YUlgAfRNAL1TQUkKeDZOcK1E2YGeGa-OGLxDTgKsNyEp00lRWoOytuLS5jMY6L3ZGojIKCy4OhEbS-03i3YWbxq8xppLs18uDtN4199vor2BI7v_ji8RAdwLnxTIyQH4p0eOd1Sf9EvhrJdj-BjtDKdw1JzXUvJtxUjVjP3V_dgnOpp1e7WDUj5M0xfCHEg7C1v6Q%3D%3D) ** Brad and I -- and our two sons -- are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help keep Brad home where he belongs. No matter what you're able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
Sincerely,
---
Lacy Lunsford
---
| | P.S. I already spent a year apart from my husband when he was in the Army. It's the hardest thing I've ever done. He almost died during that deployment when the Humvee he was driving hit an IED. I can't imagine having to spend 11 long, lonely years, trying to raise the boys by myself -- and worrying every day about my husband, locked up with hundreds of violent criminals. Please don't let my two boys grow up without their father -- [**please follow this link right now to make a tax-deductible donation of $35 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3459882563f7497ba008f563722836d0&_e=y8V-xP4h4_wId5-BxS318CFhoQQrDJNIeN_UzxZbsSsX5L6vwUAhnxtfLIhCLJm6O4_o0_TgQ_bEVqSPwDYsljR2o4UNMnFp0OHZiYve-SADorh-NTmZhHtKoaRnJ3bf0ZuU-yI5GV5Zhy88uPD2637focwJeOsnFEOqi5PcvUtBYS04Pp9TNr40-0QaQDEigaiFJJNWVzGZdzP22YUlgAfRNAL1TQUkKeDZOcK1E2Z2spfqT59HNa0e3onsM9djxZr1xRsGybjn0EcHldQOHwH7Rnzordi02Gzn5LpT15oRtRE3oJKMiHbuF9Zmsjnfpq2-Q3-Rjc-joUnDzzryaYxFKnGQ7clxTV7yUBayOtboXhV3V-48RfWBou1SmLmniYZoj6_gAYJGkPDRUbjOxQ%3D%3D) P.P.S. But never in my wildest dreams did I think the biggest threat to Brad wouldn't come from a radical terrorist or a violent gangster... ...but from a Soros-funded , anti-police prosecutor. Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad arrived on the scene, right away he sensed something was off. HOT BUTTON ISSUE: Tariffs
Trade policy proposals became a hot button issue during the 2024 presidential campaign and the topic has only generated more heat since the November election. President Trump’s trade related policy proposals have been inconsistent throughout but he has now announced that he will impose 25% tariffs on imports from Mexico and Canada and a 10% duty on imports from China effective TODAY — February 1 .

| | | Friend, My first month in Congress has been a complete whirlwind.

I’ve met so many incredible patriots from across the country, and we’re well underway getting to work for Americans like you. _But I won't lie to you. I’m still in the Lions’ Den of corruption and Big Government, and I’m going toe-to-toe with the leaders of the radical Left fringe on their home turf._ **They know that I’m a threat to their radical agenda in the House. Here’s where things stand:**
* The Democrats are targeting 29 Republicans across the country, and I'm at the top of that list.
* I was one of only 4 Republicans to unseat a Democrat incumbent in 2024, and they will do everything they can to get my seat back.

body:
Donald Trump hit the ground running after his inauguration.

| |
---
| | Kash Patel is a true patriot who has spent his career defending the American people, exposing the deep state, and fighting to restore integrity to our government.
---
| |
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/d8AOXzc2g21XRZeR2vw8-o-0ZI0DzT0nUt0y9petnolL7MkSHGhI-8pWGal_xR73u-eNLrDXYo0vlSs4diO_dpZImu0WzljEluMj7AhaEeeVmxw3cnd_9dw2iYHu8M8gUeOz1yfk5VdeOyRD0C2zMoJAzAjAMTyAffOYskclVamYTjffgNVoGKWJ0zZcJckq9gAVY62cNWNFoVJSO6ymxhdyLA2EOKDCx60BmLeEP8mTyYLK8iFdsRS_bDlU1Sru9t4KaqV6qF9kWudyH6mSnnXKV7Bjxn1mWeZhOHtXJ6c8CeMOeq8OoB4PN2nLlNl9wecZ45_VV0n19OX01HJ94_CgoUNT1dnvMZfKfesy7-K-CoeVOgI6Z2rtXYBQaStQ4tCH5X2MjIjtCkkOnvTeQGp7hXEjIw/5HP7kFeniLf5oqRIgGY5cMLLZ5yhXEmh/5)
---
| | **Fellow Patriot,** Donald Trump hit the ground running after his inauguration. He’s signed hundreds of executive orders to undo much of the damage caused by the Biden administration, and he’s named a stellar lineup of cabinet appointments.Some have already been confirmed by the Senate. But the Left-wing media, radical Democrats, and even weak-kneed RINOs are working overtime to sabotage one of his most important picks – **Kash Patel as FBI Director**._**[_**Today I need your help to DEMAND Kash Patel CONFIRMATION!**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/uaRpCgXXurp4QV8b4E-Z2GyJCGhVAa37YMqn_X8wtrFJ1PHG5p8RWl76T8bOrp3l5BDOoyqYfib1SVNhCGRJ-tZfrOWDSy0RSd0O5v7v6cuOaIPS67qRYLWdydhpxYfOy__DgZL-xS3LaueRzXsgslR5hlmD-uRBdvAAt-QWxJqIwrWjuSKm8BmC2IBVS9_QEkuI2lIE62CKUBnFI8oYSKttKUHiLLNF7skxXRVDLKIE_JgTwPgDKCY7k0Jp2k3gRBkhNmmzNbprg9X6W3B05yo7PK6me2VdEoKrwoT8p3TgDgyxvbm5a6OM8kqs6udG_OeZS8hLXT02mGgaPGaDQbfz5f0Zd_l_8Bal7BdH9qZUCAHPL0FjWN_UI5VYWv9aSO6f1P3_8ppxUWV0dALr4bSDhkwszQ/kumCHbw88EvFq44gjlqrpZ0V5kEmmy8L/5)**_ Kash Patel is a true patriot who has spent his career defending the American people, exposing the deep state, and fighting to restore integrity to our government. He’s proven that he won’t back down, especially in the fight to hold the FBI accountable for its weaponization under Christopher Wray. Under Wray’s leadership, the FBI’s actions cast a dark shadow on our nation’s federal law enforcement – it became a political tool used against the Biden administration’s political opponents and innocent American citizens.Under Wray’s watch:
---
* **The FBI coordinated with Big Tech outlets to censor and lie about the Hunter Biden laptop story.**
* **They targeted Traditional Catholics and labeled them as potential “Domestic Terrorists.”**
* **And they investigated parent groups to punish and malign Americans who opposed Critical Race Theory and gender madness in schools.**

---
My friend, **America deserves better.** President Trump understands that, which is why he’s nominated Kash Patel – someone who will restore honor, transparency, and fairness to the FBI.But we know what’s coming: just like they tried to do with Pete Hegseth, the Democrats will unite to block Kash Patel’s confirmation, and it will only take a handful of weak Republican Senators to sink this critical appointment. Make no mistake; the radical Democrats and deep state actors will do anything to stop Kash from cleaning house at the FBI...... including bullying and coercing “Republican” Senators into voting “No.”If we don’t stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak RINOs could help the Democrats tank this nomination. We can’t let that happen. We won’t let them undermine President Trump again!_**[_**If you agree that Kash Patel MUST BE CONFIRMED as FBI Director, then please click here to fill out your CONFIRM KASH Response Form right away!**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/9Abou8xbVJicz5CYHD_lQWXTxU8bKa5ZngxnYbNHkxbHDxsireNnbWpT0wAuz1oBY_paR2fgOgq-41WP297xLI_jOGOzzxgxJDdF9U26QoQu_REiJPO8lXBtsoWktiW67tzkVbM17YAX0FBWaKvX6m6fUgSjY13r2bKvXN4cqO8DFW9eToeXpZvKZp1jTNS57tVc3rDNcNxwG11P65B2nPN3k-auV1hmWxydjjsMHbyzk5jb9sZeNttEEyivIf2MBQZQoxyiXYDMrVgACxnKf-dIoAEMoKPZJpzKwaoDlv04tK97xtIMl27XLK-bFp0yA8eADp1DJsfkd8ePCytd9wgh3TJNjJrYEh1-SzW6L53JszSaa3NaRpO7V2IKK2zPYnjKmlaMS-do267ThCQbGQwJaNgKJg/iSTnG5ArtKo3fDRf9b3gzOVVj3TiceVD/5)**_ And my friend, this isn’t just about Kash Patel. This is about ensuring President Trump’s America First agenda is implemented without sabotage from the radical Left or weak Republicans.Donald Trump won in a landslide, mandate election. The American people have given HIM the power to choose his cabinet. To deny his picks is to deny the will of **_We the People_**.If we stand down now, we’ll send a message that RINOs and Democrats can undermine the will of the people and block President Trump’s vision for a stronger America. That can’t happen! You need a blade that’s quick, reliable, and built to handle whatever life throws at you. Don’t miss out on owning one of the most versatile and dependable OTF knives on the market. **Special Offer Just for You:** For a limited time, we’re offering an **exclusive discount** to our loyal subscribers. Don’t wait—this deal won’t last forever. [**Claim Your Yellow Jacket OTF Knife Here!**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/20125/6374453/6b43f7c4c43e7b49f943d506c9566269a7a62c5c/aef1fe236e3929c8797c9771f507cd076b59d6a5)

This is more than just a knife—it’s a piece of gear you’ll be proud to carry every day. Whether you’re in the field, on the job, or just out and about, the Yellow Jacket OTF Knife is the edge you need.

Stay sharp, stay prepared.

name: The Flyover
subject: Plane Crash Recovery Continues, Trump Tariffs Hit, and a Salmon Scramble
body:
Recovery efforts on the Potomac River [continued Friday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j71utDAQAJ_G7nxar5fjKFx8Dd19bUq0sdfgyPwIHE68fXTpU480o_l4Dk_OJS_jf57F17QOCNgYQAN2iJzLNZCOPomgOC3etu5B0BF1evLSJPfJ5KgJDbSO7wSBSDr34C45Bzr7tw0QrLXYWXuz2CYAoUbugemRFIHEXNf99rXmpU6SyrWest_COuvip1q3Q7l_CnuFPW-LvI43UtiXfIrCPgazFV7EhJ2PyezCIy_me4tc5TCRL4N693F75VLycW8VwThzLr-B-tfw6fEnAAD__7EtVzI), with crews retrieving over 40 bodies from American Eagle Flight 5342, along with cockpit voice and flight data recorders. The crash was the deadliest aviation disaster in the U.S. since 2001.

## FAA Says Reagan Control Tower Understaffed
Recovery efforts on the Potomac River [continued Friday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j71utDAQAJ_G7nxar5fjKFx8Dd19bUq0sdfgyPwIHE68fXTpU480o_l4Dk_OJS_jf57F17QOCNgYQAN2iJzLNZCOPomgOC3etu5B0BF1evLSJPfJ5KgJDbSO7wSBSDr34C45Bzr7tw0QrLXYWXuz2CYAoUbugemRFIHEXNf99rXmpU6SyrWest_COuvip1q3Q7l_CnuFPW-LvI43UtiXfIrCPgazFV7EhJ2PyezCIy_me4tc5TCRL4N693F75VLycW8VwThzLr-B-tfw6fEnAAD__7EtVzI), with crews retrieving over 40 bodies from American Airlines Flight 5342, along with cockpit voice and flight data recorders. The crash was the deadliest aviation disaster in the U.S. since 2001. A preliminary FAA report revealed that [the control tower](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuO3DAMRb9G7jjQax4uXEwQuNs0KVIOaJuyGciiISsrzN8H2n6rS4A8BO758_H6QI6c1l-401CCvKy2V9AWtHktyPH98t0yBCJLrqPB3N3D6977vtuG5bo4Y643ry1NesbHhM7gfZq0n2bXY8dD-6atNsbY3piLsfegNfkr3Wb0j6C8poWL5Mtf4VQ2CvEtn5Qvs-xdHLZSjlO5p7KjsmOt9bKfqe2UHSnBv1PZMVFt8TWfBUPgtAIWyIQrJqh4bpzWIgkSFpaEEZDzIbm0hFlSyRKhSKXcriFJgSR5xwgN4nUrIAFmiZFPlgQBUdkRMzyf5t07Z5UbZeZFuZ8_mkmq52_KR5eH5ajcqNtdeb3uyPGrWPlO9Odg_wcAAP__3k-C7w) at Ronald Reagan National Airport was understaffed. One air traffic controller was allegedly handling two positions when a jetliner collided with an Army helicopter, killing 67 people Wednesday night. The allegation of an insufficient number of air traffic controllers arises as the FAA faces a [class-action lawsuit](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DGvnDAQBOBfYzqf1ouBo3CRhu6lTYn28JrbyNgI-x7i30ekf800I30azZ-v-YskSlp_08auhjwjYKcBNZjZk8Rrto13gRm5bdiZoX1aGK0dm7ejJy1deHEPrbdoRqJ-odDT0PkFgEwj7tYAwRiDozEPg0MAYNtxv5B9BmWBvdR8PP5mSfXNIV75m4_Hkrcmunete1HtL4WTwildey71rhRON6xwAqNwau_4FJ34LAqnQKR5ex1ZInstSUc6y0eqphh5lbRqqbp-jsRe00mXNgCgad-jLJRq0S8q7HVO-qCFFU7N4fx-SoxS-kFZWDeS-H9i_emyb4f_AgAA__-GEG1a) claiming it denied 1,000 prospective air traffic controllers jobs due to diversity hiring targets. In May 2024, then [President Biden](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQRn-NvWEdZ2xgYOiSLV07WiQ-7GsxRBgF5d9X6d75-_Se9L6uy9Vz5LR9-oNcDXlBwEkACpDL6jm-FtWvLhAhjT05qUejwCpl-92NMGt7Qztbr42cjAzqZqYJVgANNwk9uzcNEKSUaKUcJOoAQGqi-e6VCZ0CWrnmMnxnTnWnEF_5SWW456OPbq_1cXbjR4eXDi-ttSFROxvRz_vQ4aWQ33wSnssjlyqOXEiEyNteT3HPMfLJOYnmS-K0CQQcR2P74tZH4_c6607BdniOf8b6X4Gnw98AAAD__4gUXRo) signed a bill to reauthorize the FAA, which added five additional slots to Reagan Airport's daily schedule, increasing traffic on the busiest runway in the country.
## White House Set to Impose Tariffs
The White House confirmed on Friday that it will [impose tariffs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPozAQBeBfYzoje2wgFC6uocu1V6KJPQ5zMnYETlj-_Yrtt3nNkz49vX_3-Y6cOD__4kquxjKDgk4qkErPATmds22Ci0RApiGnB3OzarR2bBYXTe_Hm3-AHnrqRx06Ml6ZHgxQ53vbsLs0BUprDaPWrYYhKkW2o96jvUVhFQWuZWv_F851oZjO8qGt9WVtkltqfe3C_BEwCZiO42h9fvirFDBdtIBJaQGTuaJu7_UlK24c4y5Llh4zBpQrfbEvEnOQfuGM8kFPznLH-t4CnvJYuJJcynsnueO5t0tdU7O58Do4Jd77QVj1XJHTz6z6200fB98BAAD__8CsaYY) on trading partners, implementing as much as 25% tariffs on Mexico and Canada, as well as a 10% duty on China, starting this weekend. President Trump also announced that [new tariffs would target](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAQRp8GOkfDGP9QUNzGXW67pUXMEM8KTAQkUd5-5e23_vSdI52v63p1HPm4_3eJbAt5RcChA-xArd5x_KxaehuIkHpJVk39rMFobeRuMcA2DT54gz1s44zGqNndZgA_T-Bvku1JAwSlFBqlLgqnAEB6oHFzeg5CA3luuVy-Mx9tpxA_-UXlsuUko91be1TR_xO4CFzaTjvHeG4Clz0nOuhdBS7OJz64tuIa50PgMihlRjN2rTzTo2uucAi1yxy7Som3fPjn1nI5v7JY_3hzjFzHSWi4J8e_Ctn-yvGy-BMAAP__E0ViWA) semiconductor chips, pharmaceuticals, steel, aluminum, oil, and gas. Starting Saturday, Canadian crude oil imports will face a 10% tariff, with other Canadian goods subject to a 25% tariff. More tariffs will be introduced in the coming weeks. Trump stated that any [new tariffs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3O4yAQRZ8Gd1gwxnZcUGzjLttuaU1giFnxYwGJN2-_cvqvu9KRjq7On_t2Rx98ev7GSLq5vIGAkQvgQm4WffhsqrPaEQENHWk5DzclFqWWbteKEMcB1WjNZJZZ2JsDax7SoEMw09h5fdkECCklLFL2EmYnBKmRJoPq5pgSZH3Lpf-bfWo7ufDJbyq9ybELem_tqGz4xWBlsJ7n2ZtHTXTWizNYr8lgbeUVD94y9_HIlXjD4p2rPCeefeCYLH9i_dLSKk_0r_GYU9v5sWOJaOjVvMFwubqi7XH6EHydZqbEM6IP3zvtpzxvDf8DAAD__ygcapM) would be added on top of existing tariffs and that the time for negotiation had passed. The Dow [dropped more](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FyhCAUheGngQ7ncmEVC4o0dJs2pYNwXcnisqNEx7fPmD71mfnO_F_34e5TTq_Hp1_I1qkMCHgTgALkEH3K56B5tBMRkuJkZaeMhl7rns-WRkXBtDi2HcheGX8LsSfTGYVhbGHkyV4aIEgpsZeykdhNAKRv1AavzcQ0UEy1rM13Sa8605TPstPahLLwbOda3xtTHwwdQ3ccRxNeY7hGhu6iGTqQDJ0Chm6rJTzF4tcnVVFL9KfIaSfx846-0tbMdcl8tfF9pJzT1nZMw2PxKf-91f_qd4u_AQAA___tBlqN) than 300 points, while the Nasdaq fell by 0.28% following news of the tariffs.
## List: Ancient Treasures Recently Discovered
A list of incredible [archaeological treasures](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O5CAQBp8GZ1jQxj8EBJc4m0svtBjT2H1qwwij8frtV7P55p--KtW_x_LwxJS2v_5AV2NeQEEvFUill-CJ78U0wUVEwK5Bp8duMsoaY5vd9RpsePoxKmuitUaPzxD6AXvsbBgmbMh93hQorTVYrVsNY1QKTY_D6s0UhVEYqObS_s-U6o6R7_zG0q75aNjttb5O0f0RMAuYr-tqOb8Rv16cC6XtsxIwb54Zy810VgGz1tNoRwFz3VEe-ayS0low0JNR-rQSpioDneuHQ3jKwweUBVdMle-muPC6iJnOYRRGbYcn_rGpv9V5O_gOAAD__7k_aPc) recently discovered by scientists and researchers includes lost desert cities, sea dragons, artwork, and ancient footprints. Recent archaeological discoveries in the Middle East include a missing section of Jerusalem's outer wall, a 3,000-year-old city called the Rise of Aten near Luxor, and mummies with golden tongues found in Alexandria. In Europe, the remains of an ichthyosaur, often referred to as a sea dragon, were discovered in England. Additionally, in Germany's "Unicorn Cave," scientists found Neanderthal sketches, which are among the oldest works of art ever identified, as well as the intact skull of a cave bear. The U.S. also made significant discoveries, including the oldest human footprints in North America at White Sands National Park in New Mexico and well-preserved dinosaur tracks in Texas' Dinosaur Valley State Park. [See the full list of discoveries here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O5CAQBp8GZ1jQxj8EBJc4m0svtBjT2H1qwwij8frtV7P55p--KtW_x_LwxJS2v_5AV2NeQEEvFUill-CJ78U0wUVEwK5Bp8duMsoaY5vd9RpsePoxKmuitUaPzxD6AXvsbBgmbMh93hQorTVYrVsNY1QKTY_D6s0UhVEYqObS_s-U6o6R7_zG0q75aNjttb5O0f0RMAuYr-tqOb8Rv16cC6XtsxIwb54Zy810VgGz1tNoRwFz3VEe-ayS0low0JNR-rQSpioDneuHQ3jKwweUBVdMle-muPC6iJnOYRRGbYcn_rGpv9V5O_gOAAD__7k_aPc).
