| Dear Peter, As the Trump administration issues new edicts creating chaos and fear, be assured your elected officials in Maryland remain steadfast in our commitment to the common good. Even in the intensity of the 90-day legislative session, we are working—alongside community organizations and trusted partners—to ensure our most vulnerable neighbors are protected and all Marylanders can flourish. **Hearings on My Bills**
The first few weeks of session are always packed with hearings on bills and this week is no exception. Six of my bills had hearings this week: ➤[ Hospital Debt Prevention](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101375132/525766154/-765486210?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTZkNDY5NC1iNWUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YstKbvATUX4jjbqNuCQLwxWtx3_hwDkjlHHfWpcIcFk=&emci=19ea6cc6-17e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=716d4694-b5e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=37927032) (HB 268): Medical debt can be financially devastating for low-income patients. This bill creates a standard amount hospitals must offer to those patients. It also protects patients from lawsuits and ensures that all patients have access to financial assistance ➤ [Mental Health Care Improvements](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101375143/525766155/-152442659?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTZkNDY5NC1iNWUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YstKbvATUX4jjbqNuCQLwxWtx3_hwDkjlHHfWpcIcFk=&emci=19ea6cc6-17e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=716d4694-b5e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=37927032) (HB 32): Maryland is facing a shortage of psychiatric beds for those in need. This bill establishes clearer guidelines for Forensic Review Boards and Community Forensic Aftercare Programs involved with psychiatric patients in state hospitals and in the community, which should help people receive needed care in the least restrictive environment. ➤ [Residency Requirements for Income Tax](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101375145/525766168/1902499704?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTZkNDY5NC1iNWUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YstKbvATUX4jjbqNuCQLwxWtx3_hwDkjlHHfWpcIcFk=&emci=19ea6cc6-17e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=716d4694-b5e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=37927032) (HB 183): This bill would raise revenues by taxing passive income for people who live in Maryland 3-6 months a year, rather than only those who live here for 6 months or more. ➤ [Solar-Ready School Parking Lots](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101375148/525766171/952160641?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTZkNDY5NC1iNWUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YstKbvATUX4jjbqNuCQLwxWtx3_hwDkjlHHfWpcIcFk=&emci=19ea6cc6-17e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=716d4694-b5e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=37927032) (HB 61): Installing solar panels in school parking lots creates clean energy in already developed locations. We can save money by preparing for their eventual installation while construction is being done on schools. ➤ [Food Forests and Foraging](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101375151/525766174/-1180441022?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTZkNDY5NC1iNWUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YstKbvATUX4jjbqNuCQLwxWtx3_hwDkjlHHfWpcIcFk=&emci=19ea6cc6-17e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=716d4694-b5e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=37927032) (HB 257): I discussed this in my [last newsletter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101375156/525766179/-887006618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTZkNDY5NC1iNWUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YstKbvATUX4jjbqNuCQLwxWtx3_hwDkjlHHfWpcIcFk=&emci=19ea6cc6-17e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=716d4694-b5e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=37927032) and it was featured on [WTOP News](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101375158/525766180/-591316321?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTZkNDY5NC1iNWUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YstKbvATUX4jjbqNuCQLwxWtx3_hwDkjlHHfWpcIcFk=&emci=19ea6cc6-17e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=716d4694-b5e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=37927032). ➤ [Food System Resiliency Council Updates](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101375159/525766182/610417590?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTZkNDY5NC1iNWUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YstKbvATUX4jjbqNuCQLwxWtx3_hwDkjlHHfWpcIcFk=&emci=19ea6cc6-17e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=716d4694-b5e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=37927032) (HB 9): This bill updates important definitions (e.g. replacing “food deserts” with “healthy food priority areas”) and timelines used in the council's mission and duties. **Showing Care and Concern for All Our Neighbors**
I spend a lot of time out in our community. It is always so heartening to witness the many ways people are caring for their neighbors—with actions large and small. They all matter and make our community a better place to live. Earlier this week I participated in a “Point in Time” census. Between 11pm and 3am, volunteers fanned out across Montgomery County to find and conduct a short survey with **people experiencing homelessness.** The data we collected will be used to develop services and appropriate support. Similarly, many folks are concerned for friends, neighbors, and coworkers who might be the targets of **increased immigration enforcement**. My [website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101375167/525766192/-595949960?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTZkNDY5NC1iNWUwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YstKbvATUX4jjbqNuCQLwxWtx3_hwDkjlHHfWpcIcFk=&emci=19ea6cc6-17e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=716d4694-b5e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=37927032) now lists useful resources. **Stay in Touch** : Need help with a state issue? Please contact my office at [lorig.charkoudian@house.state.md.us](mailto:lorig.charkoudian@house.state.md.us) or leave us a message at (410)-841-3423. Onward, Lorig Charkoudian

Even in the intensity of the 90-day legislative session, we are working—alongside community organizations and trusted partners—to ensure our most vulnerable neighbors are protected and all Marylanders can flourish. Hearings on My Bills The first few weeks of session are always packed with hearings on bills and this week is no exception. Six of my bills had hearings this week: ➤ (HB 268): Medical debt can be financially devastating for low-income patients. This bill creates a standard amount hospitals must offer to those patients. When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription! Your recap on this week's content (plus our obligatory Dad Joke) | | | Feb 1 | | | | | | | | | | | | Happy Black History Month! On this week's recap, a major milestone update from Let's Address This, the Qasim Rashid Show Episode 156, how Democrats can win back the working class, I filed a FOIA to challenge the Trump regime, the fascist attempt to freeze funding, Project 2025 is here--how to fight back, and a racist President blames DEIA for his own incompetence. Let 's dive into our weekly recap of Let 's Address This with Qasim Rashid. Important Call to Action Just 9 months and 1 week since we launched,Let 's Address This with Qasim Rashidhas published more than 300 (!) articles and podcasts and surpassed 106,000 followers! All thanks to you. Now, consider this: As legacy media continues to capitulate to billionaires As the new White House continues to enact fascist policies As economic, social, and climate injustices continue to increase We need to build even more aggressively in 2025 to ensure readers and listeners stay informed and have the tools at hand to fight back against injustice. Whether you can subscribe for FREE or for a cup of coffee a month--we need all hands on deck. Please subscribe, share, and let's remain relentless in our mission for a more perfect Union. This Week's Articles and Podcast Sunday:: A major milestone all due to your trust and support--I invite you to help elevate our advocacy to the next level Monday:: Dara Starr Tucker & Tim Whitaker join to discuss Christian nationalism, anti-immigrant raids, & fact checking MAGAs Monday: : A guest OpEd by two term Georgia State Senator Nabilah Islam Parkes Tuesday: : Trump is protecting Jan 6 insurrectionists, so I filed a FOIA to force DOJ to release their names Wednesday:: Trump's spending freeze, the lawsuits stopping the freeze, and how you can act to help counter this move Thursday:: Project 2025, how to counter its fascist policies, and a message of hope in these times Friday:: A deeper pattern of deregulation that media continues to ignore and politicians continue to enable Dad Joke of the Week Teen: I'm so sick of doing math on Khan Academy. Me: Then why not do some yard work & make it Lawn Academy? Wife: Or maybe study at sunrise & make it Dawn Academy? Me: Or try and sooth your muscles & make it Balm Academy? Wife: Or study the criminal mind & make it Con Academy? Me: Or play with baby deer and make it Fawn Academy? Wife: Or-- 13: I...I'm gonna get back to my math🤦 Me/Wife: Good idea😉 #DadJokes #MomJokes #ParentingTips I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism under the new administration. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe and join our movement of more than 106,000 activists. subject: Thank you, Peter. Here's how we're putting your support to work.
body:
Because of you, we’re building the progressive media alternative we need right now.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101375788/525767708/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDM0Y2U2ZGMtYjVlMC1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_4ZA6ENHUlWc7ieUYObjtLIussOuAdQiRAoTOiAqJgk=&emci=727b54b0-e7df-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=034ce6dc-b5e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=14016711)
Hi Peter,
I’m Tara McGowan, founder and publisher of COURIER, and I want to personally thank you for your recent support.
**Because of you, January was our best grassroots fundraising month ever.**
I also wanted to share how we’re putting your support to work, building the progressive media alternative America urgently needs right now—one that defends truth, counters far-right misinformation, and holds the new Trump administration accountable.
Your generosity empowers our teams of talented journalists to deliver fearless, factual reporting to millions of Americans—right in the online spaces where disinformation thrives. From national coverage to local newsrooms in 11 critical states, our platforms generated **nearly 2 billion impressions** during the last election. Now, with Trump back in office, COURIER is working day and night to ensure every community has access to the truth.
**Here are just a few ways you're helping COURIER make an impact RIGHT NOW:**
* We now reach **over 5.6 million subscribers** and achieve **251 million weekly impressions** across online platforms.
* **TikTok Leadership:** In under 10 months, COURIER became **the leading political news source on TikTok** , with **over 1.9 million followers** and **80 million video views a week** , helping us connect with young voters where they are.
* **Award winning coverage:** Our reporters have earned **42 state press awards** , and our efforts to reach news-avoidant audiences have made COURIER a critical voice in defending democracy.

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: The damage Trump has caused
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250201-1209-foote&t=1001&akid=1209%2E342411%2EXHM8Pa ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

We’re just over a week into Donald Trump’s second term and his
administration is wasting no time attacking the rights we value.

Here is a glimpse of the damage he’s caused:

* Attempted to end birthright citizenship through unconstitutional
means.
* Announced ICE raids targeting major cities like Washington D.C.,
Chicago, and Denver.
* Removed the U.S. from the Paris Climate Agreement — again.
* Removed government websites focused on reproductive health care
resources.
* Pardoned over 1,000 January 6 insurrectionists, including the leaders
of extremist groups like the Oath Keepers and Proud Boys.
* Issued an executive order that recognizes only two genders and
dismisses the rights of transgender and non-binary individuals.

This doesn’t even scratch the surface.

Trump’s actions are a stark reminder of his callousness and cruelty — but
we cannot afford to be disheartened. Now more than ever, we must rally
behind the leaders who are fighting for our values — leaders who represent
the working class, our diverse communities, and the future we deserve.

We need to strengthen the power of our Squad to ensure Alexandria, Ayanna,
Ilhan, and Rashida can continue to lead and advocate for bold, progressive
change.

clean_body: [ ]Squad Victory Fund Peter, We’re just over a week into Donald Trump’s second term and his administration is wasting no time attacking the rights we value. Here is a glimpse of the damage he’s caused: Attempted to end birthright citizenship through unconstitutional means. Announced ICE raids targeting major cities like Washington D.C., Chicago, and Denver. Removed the U.S. from the Paris Climate Agreement — again. Removed government websites focused on reproductive health care resources. Pardoned over 1,000 January 6 insurrectionists, including the leaders of extremist groups like the Oath Keepers and Proud Boys. Issued an executive order that recognizes only two genders and dismisses the rights of transgender and non-binary individuals. This doesn’t even scratch the surface. Trump’s actions are a stark reminder of his callousness and cruelty — but we cannot afford to be disheartened. Now more than ever, we must rally behind the leaders who are fighting for our values — leaders who represent the working class, our diverse communities, and the future we deserve. name: Patty
subject: not the email I wanted to send
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
| | |
---
Peter, this isn't the email I wanted to send.
Yesterday was my first major fundraising deadline since Trump was sworn in again – **but** **we ended January $2,956 short of our $20,000 goal**.
With the damage he's already done in these first two weeks – and upcoming confirmation votes for more of his far-right cabinet nominees like RFK Jr. – this setback couldn't have come at a worse time.

If we don't close this gap, MAGA Republicans _will_ take it as a sign that Democrats simply don't have the momentum to stand up to their anti-abortion, pro-billionaire, and sometimes downright unconstitutional agenda. I want to show people through our fundraising numbers that Democrats are energized and ready to fight back.
**But if everyone reading this pitches in $5 before midnight, we can prove them DEAD WRONG –** so I'm extending the deadline for one night only to make up the difference.

[Do you understand everything that’s happening with **Medicaid** under the Trump administration?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101378703/525775668/1132899367?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.02.01_Save-Medicaid_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4YjhjM2MyLWI5ZTAtZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KPEMxlblXvpT0OCmfci-B_YzLzT2yp3S5sUvc50Ij9U=&emci=61bed7a6-44df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=38b8c3c2-b9e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=23124236)
* Medicaid is the **largest health insurance program** for low-income Americans.

* **27% of the U.S. population relies on it** — including people with disabilities, seniors, children, and pregnant people.

* During his first term as president, Trump proposed an**$800 billion decrease in Medicaid funding.**

* Now, Trump and his Republicans are attempting to **gut Medicaid again to pay for their tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans.**

* According to a recent report from Axios, **“Republicans from swing states and districts are ducking questions** about their openness to cutting Medicaid.”

* This is abhorrent. If Medicaid is gutted, **folks will be left without the lifesaving medications and care they need** to survive.

[**_That’s why we’re racing to collect 300 urgent signatures today on our petition to pressure the Senate to SAVE Medicaid from the GOP’s proposed cuts. This couldn’t be more urgent, so please sign:_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101378705/525775669/1132899367?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.02.01_Save-Medicaid_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4YjhjM2MyLWI5ZTAtZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KPEMxlblXvpT0OCmfci-B_YzLzT2yp3S5sUvc50Ij9U=&emci=61bed7a6-44df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=38b8c3c2-b9e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=23124236) | **************[Sign your name →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101378706/525775670/1132899367?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.02.01_Save-Medicaid_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4YjhjM2MyLWI5ZTAtZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KPEMxlblXvpT0OCmfci-B_YzLzT2yp3S5sUvc50Ij9U=&emci=61bed7a6-44df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=38b8c3c2-b9e0-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=23124236)**************

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Not how democracy is supposed to work
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8281%2E5257348%2ElKXt57 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Axios just dropped this bombshell. WTF?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250201_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8281%2E5257348%2ElKXt57 ]Screenshot from Axios

$500 million. From billionaires and corporations who know exactly what
they’re paying for: power, influence, access, and policies that put them
first while ordinary Americans get left behind.

And it’s not just about Trump. This money will flood down-ballot races,
propping up the most extreme candidates, stacking the courts more, and
making sure their grip on power stays tight — long after Trump is gone.

I don’t believe that billionaires should be calling all the shots. That’s
not how democracy is supposed to work. That’s bad for middle class
families.

So yeah, WTF. But also: what are we going to do about it?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250201_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8281%2E5257348%2ElKXt57 ]If you’re ready to fight back, chip in here.

I’m going to the mat to fight against powerful corporate interests and
make sure our government works for the people – not just the
ultra-wealthy.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250201_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1006&akid=8281%2E5257348%2ElKXt57 ]Can you donate
$10 to
send a message to this billionaire boy band that we aren’t backing down?

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Axios just dropped this bombshell. WTF? [ ]Screenshot from Axios $500 million. From billionaires and corporations who know exactly what they’re paying for: power, influence, access, and policies that put them first while ordinary Americans get left behind. And it’s not just about Trump. This money will flood down-ballot races, propping up the most extreme candidates, stacking the courts more, and making sure their grip on power stays tight — long after Trump is gone. I don’t believe that billionaires should be calling all the shots. That’s not how democracy is supposed to work. That’s bad for middle class families. So yeah, WTF. But also: what are we going to do about it? [ ]If you’re ready to fight back, chip in here. I’m going to the mat to fight against powerful corporate interests and make sure our government works for the people – not just the ultra-wealthy. [ ]Can you donate $10 to send a message to this billionaire boy band that we aren’t backing down? clean_body: | | | ****Felon Trump just emptied the prisons of insurrectionists - and they’re already committing new crimes. Trump’s outrageous decision to release all January 6th criminals—those who mercilessly beat and even killed Capitol police officers—has unleashed a new wave of violence and crime. In just a week his reckless act has already resulted in some of these individuals committing more crimes. One was shot during a confrontation with law enforcement, another was arrested on gun charges, while yet another is wanted for soliciting a minor for sex. Lazy Trump walked back his promise to conduct case-by-case reviews, because he couldn't be bothered to review the records of these dangerous individuals. The time has come for us to stand united against the chaos and hate that convicted felon and adjudicated rapist Donald Trump continues to sow. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Many of the J6ers, who hunted former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi and tried to hang VP Mike Pence, have violent criminal histories that include domestic violence, sexual assault, and battery. DC police officer, Michael Fanone, who was beaten and repeatedly tased until he had a heart attack said, “Six individuals who assaulted me as I did my job on January 6 ... will now walk free. My family, my children and myself are less safe today because of Donald Trump and his supporters.” We need leaders who will fight back and challenge the dangerous precedents set by Trump and work tirelessly for a future where hate and chaos have no place.** Thanks for your support. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. And when it comes to staying ahead of _**Communist China**_ , this move from DJT would be an absolute game-changer. That being said, the people of Greenland are also yearning for leadership change after years of neglect and alleged abuses by the Danish state. _**Even Greenland 's prime minister is warming up to the idea of closer ties to the United States.**_

| **Meet Jim:** Congressman Jim Baird is a decorated Vietnam War Veteran and the proud representative for Indiana's 4th Congressional District in our nation's capital. A lifelong resident of West Central Indiana, Jim grew up on his family's farm and had the values of faith, family, and hard work instilled in him at an early age. He is an unwavering defender of America's Constitutional liberties and has spent the vast majority of his life serving our country. After earning both his bachelor's and his master's at Purdue University, Jim was assigned to the 523rd Transportation Company at Cha Rang Valley in Vietnam. He fought in two of the deadliest battles of Operation Lam Son 719 and lost his left arm during a convoy ambush in March of 1971. In a true embodiment of American sacrifice and patriotism, Jim Baird has put his life on the line time and time again fighting communism abroad. His belief in the American Dream and our American way of life go far beyond words. For the entirety of his life, Jim has fought the good fight for our country both physically and spiritually. And he wears his love for the world's greatest country on his sleeve each and every day that he shows up for work in Washington, D.C. Previously, Jim Baird spent eight years in the Indiana House of Representatives serving District 44 from 2010 to 2018. Prior to that, he was Putnam County Commissioner from 2006 to 2010. A fiscal conservative and America First Republican, Jim is incredibly proud to fight every day in DC to advance the best interests of Indiana's families through Congress. A loving husband to his wife Danise, a devoted father to his children, and the world's best pop-pop to his grandkids, Jim spends most of his free time in the company of his loved ones or tending to the family farm.

subject: Trump’s trying to dismantle 60 years of civil rights protections.

body:
I introduced legislation to restore and expand protections in our country’s crucial civil rights laws. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWRxynW1FrSTQy-1LGVV1PaxEgGhCd1ETH-o1h93PZI3yG13SLdq6laG68HSHB0HZ85xMsKeiTrYesum3GeruoOviuQeMvvd3WsejLD1aFp37irPL-pbfbg7K0OCSxlIsl85u0GV2m9A-HZUI-QSiAl5RdVECSJydf-M1fIsF1c-5YfUJJ3-CkuOIxzTlNpDcF_qEtAfcUswJjcim3szSxrLGNIoUbmkG7jrUviJCWwc7ikgxvv7lO9jd0U4ZdDx7S/4dn/BPH0sZNlQtaLgsk_lkR8hw/h0/h001.JWJH5YQeEZN-vhVvbnk91YI_L_5fhhA7IHj3lZrxxDo)

Friend, Today is the beginning of Black History Month, and anti-Black racism is at a fever pitch. **Through illegal and unconstitutional actions, Trump is trying to dismantle 60 years of civil rights protections and halt the Justice Department’s civil rights enforcement, in addition to suspending federal support for equity programs and trying to block teachers from talking about race in schools.** Our country is rooted in systemic racism, but we have powerful tools to protect people from discrimination thanks to Black activists and movements led by Black folks in this country, including the Civil Rights Movement. Unfortunately, decades of conservative court rulings have undermined these hard-fought civil rights protections, and now the racists in the White House are further attacking our rights and our communities. In response to the right-wing assault on marginalized communities, I partnered with civil rights attorneys in my district to introduce the _Justice For All Act_ , which would restore and strengthen the protections in our country’s crucial civil rights laws: the _Civil Rights Act of 1964_ , the _Fair Housing Act of 1968_ , the _Age Discrimination Act of 1975_ , the _Rehabilitation Act of 1973_ , and _Title IX of the Education Amendments of 1972_. We must urgently pass legislation like the _Justice For All Act_ , which would prohibit actions that have a discriminatory effect (regardless of any discriminatory intent) and give people more tools to combat discrimination in the courts—including rejected mortgage applications, unfair car insurance rates, racial profiling by the police, and workplace discrimination against race-related traits like hair texture. [**This Black History Month, can you sign on to demand Congress expand civil rights protections and restore the original intent of our civil rights laws?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5JnjCSGCZTnsLdyHpqfDBgkdDXMeslnPy0L0Jb1EFUNswAyrVJIAAX3_KU8h9zpIZy7gEBbFSmG8Ibr-ilSm4ErLpuKkFMXmfZMAij41h8nt1m4IxM15_FgEIpabj5H7BRoWdVhAr1ItGtpMONBIJN8RULuc6r8TLjk_iE-AaITCHNe8-pb054BBloe8qkISMT7wQfDX4rQ2SZLw9lnQF_bULm6OMjI_HGoApRyJx9d7GGKM9a2Z9Czu9hJsxb2CBPiKyw-BhpARfkL7Afnko-fOyVaCRSSXDOMt81DEdYpZ80_6DKlxy-5L8vmHYtt_q3uIJscZI-gY1b3BMSxL6A-8pVSn50Np7ei7h72hmtiRvWNzAucLJFByQdy3fezQe0seIh1NMrrNJIcl0ZRUvyg/4dn/BPH0sZNlQtaLgsk_lkR8hw/h1/h001.nKiMkS8UIAcCDYzRG1cRhPfo6lrYCaRPDJBUQ80lzUo) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5JnjCSGCZTnsLdyHpqfDBgkdDXMeslnPy0L0Jb1EFUNswAyrVJIAAX3_KU8h9zpIZy7gEBbFSmG8Ibr-ilSm4ErVWdDObqbgVz3j6JeZfgwVKPvYMnPWrsLeps944JBQ1uFzpE5budn6NXjDTqfqRt_TI8gN2MQ6J_c3VSSRNHqxVR7dXdeJY0y9fdpy_FeTI4AoZkj9xcp6rnVlM67Jhq_dXfTx_h08pwFtRWD9oOA4p7fCcI7rXFvsBH5-0p7LbphK6R74n_oG0lm99iqzgO2jkK1Dj9MY6999CnhLSGKogDu1yoRGDtqAZKnBFo_lpSH3szUs18jdv-HkeykW0kxRpaNRUx0odbTaJsPe0t4PEco2I2qWm5HOtpr75orIuFzemXzwIbqf6p6MfkcNR6w/4dn/BPH0sZNlQtaLgsk_lkR8hw/h2/h001.VbLKNdVD9wfSlNCQ2oG1D2o1kef0RjNx1_4lXqzPa0s)

Journalists like Karen Attiah and Jamelle Bouie have been calling this a segregationist presidential administration, and writer and teacher Brittney Cooper just posted:
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5JnjCSGCZTnsLdyHpqfDBgkdDXMeslnPy0L0Jb1EFUNswAyrVJIAAX3_KU8h9zpIZy7gEBbFSmG8Ibr-ilSm4Ej7qiaBZoiUFPZaXZmNPb6Opobis8o5BfItsZIaWURh9H2bcRdr4qd83knVzk_p-6kX6Nb4Y-KD0nsSqGUPTDJsTMuT6f7MQcrqLMmY6FJhZPz2vQHnqSU5COldAWiai3AcCHsp-9xYtqjGGu_sIe8Bk5LBHO_JsvVvQeMDZdhTx0HqNb9X1eanB2vAykmX65rT0pc1n56458cVcVl_NJ3AiznosYYS6JOwHMbN9Ns85RbGzftyjXg_W31pAWt56NH3VrpU7osiy0pmRbhmQv-_ZnAuaQGR1mCU24L5w3NLLvrCXrRfKVgvzZuvm63FDvg/4dn/BPH0sZNlQtaLgsk_lkR8hw/h3/h001.vDQ8Lc5Vs60JlCC7djZy_VWCgcN4Txz5EaaAwN6SrYs)
The administration’s attacks on the Department of Justice’s civil rights division are “unprecedented,” according to Damon Hewitt, president and executive director of the Lawyers’ Committee for Civil Rights Under Law. “We’ve never seen this before at this scale with any transfer of power, regardless of the ideology of any incoming president or administration.”
The president’s attacks on reproductive health and other marginalized communities will also disproportionately harm Black immigrants, Black LGBTQ+ people, Black women, and Black people with disabilities, who already face life-threatening disparities and discrimination.
**In this time of growing dehumanization, I promise that I will always have your back, and I will do everything I can to continue the fight for racial justice and equity for all.**
And remember: We didn’t get civil rights and voting rights protections because Congress or the President woke up and thought they were great ideas. These advancements happened because people boycotted, marched, fought in courts, spoke out, and came together in their communities. We must defend these hard-fought wins and support Black-led organizations in the ongoing fight for a truly multi-racial democracy.
Always fighting for you,
Rashida

clean_body: I introduced legislation to restore and expand protections in our country’s crucial civil rights laws. | | | Friend, Today is the beginning of Black History Month, and anti-Black racism is at a fever pitch. Through illegal and unconstitutional actions, Trump is trying to dismantle 60 years of civil rights protections and halt the Justice Department’s civil rights enforcement, in addition to suspending federal support for equity programs and trying to block teachers from talking about race in schools. Our country is rooted in systemic racism, but we have powerful tools to protect people from discrimination thanks to Black activists and movements led by Black folks in this country, including the Civil Rights Movement. Unfortunately, decades of conservative court rulings have undermined these hard-fought civil rights protections, and now the racists in the White House are further attacking our rights and our communities. In response to the right-wing assault on marginalized communities, I partnered with civil rights attorneys in my district to introduce the Justice For All Act , which would restore and strengthen the protections in our country’s crucial civil rights laws: the Civil Rights Act of 1964 , the Fair Housing Act of 1968 , the Age Discrimination Act of 1975 , the Rehabilitation Act of 1973 , and Title IX of the Education Amendments of 1972. We must urgently pass legislation like the Justice For All Act , which would prohibit actions that have a discriminatory effect (regardless of any discriminatory intent) and give people more tools to combat discrimination in the courts—including rejected mortgage applications, unfair car insurance rates, racial profiling by the police, and workplace discrimination against race-related traits like hair texture. | Journalists like Karen Attiah and Jamelle Bouie have been calling this a segregationist presidential administration, and writer and teacher Brittney Cooper just posted: The administration’s attacks on the Department of Justice’s civil rights division are “unprecedented,” according to Damon Hewitt, president and executive director of the Lawyers’ Committee for Civil Rights Under Law. “We’ve never seen this before at this scale with any transfer of power, regardless of the ideology of any incoming president or administration.” The president’s attacks on reproductive health and other marginalized communities will also disproportionately harm Black immigrants, Black LGBTQ+ people, Black women, and Black people with disabilities, who already face life-threatening disparities and discrimination. In this time of growing dehumanization, I promise that I will always have your back, and I will do everything I can to continue the fight for racial justice and equity for all. And remember: We didn’t get civil rights and voting rights protections because Congress or the President woke up and thought they were great ideas. These advancements happened because people boycotted, marched, fought in courts, spoke out, and came together in their communities. We must defend these hard-fought wins and support Black-led organizations in the ongoing fight for a truly multi-racial democracy. Always fighting for you, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Night Vision Binoculars
subject: Claim your Night Vision Binoculars... (1080pHD)
body:
I’ve got something here you’re gonna want to see...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20124/6374453/bee0f3667b11efd01d738801e60789d7eb2d00b3/a74241797a75c6fc6fa067955703b62eb536004d)
---
| | |
---
_February 1st, 2025_
---
| | |
---
I’ve got something here you’re gonna want to see:

In fact, you’ll never see the world the same way again...

Because these new goggles will let you peer through the darkest, moonless night like it’s high noon!

In fact, these night vision binoculars are so powerful, we’ve dubbed them...

**[Claim Your 7-Level Infrared Night Vision Binoculars - 50% OFF!](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20124/6374453/556f3c2254c7d628876505c08ccca30e57b21696/a74241797a75c6fc6fa067955703b62eb536004d) **

Once reserved for the SEALs and Special Ops, this battlefield technology is now available to civilians.

**[Check it out](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20124/6374453/556f3c2254c7d628876505c08ccca30e57b21696/a74241797a75c6fc6fa067955703b62eb536004d)** : These bad boys have real-time IR night vision with 5X magnification, video recording and playback.

Plus they’re IP54 water resistant.

Thanks to an exclusive distribution agreement, I’m able to offer these DarkForce binos to you at an insane 50% OFF discount...

While supplies last, I’m throwing in a free neck strap, charging cable and **free shipping!** **[Grab your Night Vision Binoculars before we run out](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20124/6374453/556f3c2254c7d628876505c08ccca30e57b21696/a74241797a75c6fc6fa067955703b62eb536004d)**

P.S. These bad boys have 7 levels of IR intensity, are USB rechargeable (no batteries needed), and they’re super compact.

body:
# [#] https://secure.ngpvan.com/JcKdD-Q5sEmr2Bb9s_L8tg2?amount= [https://secure.ngpvan.com/JcKdD-Q5sEmr2Bb9s_L8tg2?amount=]Team, I just got great news from my team!

Thanks to supporters like you, we met our first end-of-month goal of 2025! Your grassroots support is what will allow us to reach voters, put up ads, and more before the primary in just a few short months.

Together, we will continue the fight for lower taxes, lower costs, and protect our Jersey Values as your next Governor. We can make New Jersey a place where everyone can afford to live, work, and raise a family.

Your support truly means the world.

Yours,

Josh

P.S. If you’re able, will you chip in $ to help us show that our momentum isn’t slowing down? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/JcKdD-Q5sEmr2Bb9s_L8tg2?amount=]
Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. name: AOC
subject: Even if you don't see a way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
It's still worth trying
#
I will always, always believe that it's worth trying, even if you don’t see a way — **because ways emerge**.
I was not supposed to get elected to Congress, by any stretch of the imagination.
**I was insane**.
It’s not just a cute story — I was wiping down a bar and asking people to vote for me. It wasn’t a summer job I had once. I was not supposed to win.
The guy I was running against spent $3 million against me, and I was making $2 in my paycheck once a week because I was working off tips and they take it all out.
**But things happen in America**. This is still a place of possibility.
In solidarity,
Alexandria
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250201.3eNb6T&refcode=em20250201-8044-P_FND_EGR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8044%2E2526796%2E8rVegz)

name: Jeff Younger
subject: I’m fighting to save my son
body:
I’m up against radical trans-activist judges, the 6 BILLION dollar trans lobby, and coastal elites forcing their LGBTQ+ agenda down our throats.| | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now.
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
| | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=fa3a5fe725dd4799967f294d7384694b&_e=gOSy2BbJ-3GwGCgnj3ie7jIzKBdLReQdsD2vLIFPwYqApb8gMpU5spau9OYGDq14AolmRAb0wvY4_9z3oCh5xbEXA9-TQKN2Mjmo6UO02zfh6g1jTjy769sIaGo-FHVI5_bQGfiWxSODlYS_1s_uymQn4pjM80DjKpVKhc9GvTnECwCSwS1dVOSyCbUE0UvBbqabFaEKMQkAMStV5GczzxKWIzNfCfkSYxw-CoauTuntGJM2Y-qFeFbzm4qSJGNuFCDbibtQxex6ZV8B7xOpWs_bOFlWEFzTRqsz8ZekH0UzIuhC1kxsOX_jjQWOnmAYhhrU0CAzvPjDKghsidSMwlP8zRmegV-8HCBfxUWfJqKSlgChC1uRwvhH0-3guf46)
---
My Dear Friend, When I tell people my story, I hear the same things over and over again:“That’s crazy.” “I don’t believe that.” “That can’t be.”But if you’ve heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or Fox News, then you know it’s horribly true. My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son **James** in the photo above.I’ve spent the last decade fighting tooth-and-nail to keep school counselors, my ex-wife, and activist judges from “transitioning” **James** against my will. If you didn’t know, “transitioning” is the LGBTQ+ industry’s euphemism for sex change surgery or the chemical castration of a child.And if these radicals get their way, my son will be sterilized, traumatized, and dependent on Big Pharma for the rest of his life.This all started ten years ago when my ex-wife began telling me our two-year-old boy **James **wanted to become a girl.I ignored her and kept dressing my son in boy’s clothes. Because he’s a boy!But then I found out that after dropping him off at school, the school counselor would change him into girl’s clothes WITHOUT TELLING ME.The counselors and teachers also began calling him a different name, “Luna,” at school. Also without telling me!I assumed I’d be able to stop this madness during the custody hearings with my ex-wife. Instead, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.I would only be allowed to see James if I dressed him in girl’s clothes.My friend, I’ve never lied to my sons.And I’m not about to start now. So I was forced to stop visiting him.And then I began the fight of my life to save James from this evil “trans” culture.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers.I even authored a bill to outlaw sex change surgeries for minors in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee.And spent almost every dollar I had to make sure politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair.After I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, my ex-wife fled with **James** to California: a “trans sanctuary” state. I think you know exactly what happened once she got to California.A radical judge sided with my ex-wife and gave the greenlight to proceed with chemically castrating my son.I have never felt so helpless in my life. I am James’s father – yet I can’t protect him from the powerful LGBTQ+ activists who are using my ex-wife and our kangaroo court systems to turn my son into the poster child for their twisted and perverted agenda.I’ve watched the school system, my ex-wife, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.In fact, I can’t even appeal my case because the judge sealed the court records. I’d have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process.Worst of all, I am under a gag order to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Technically, my writing you this to you today is illegal.But I didn’t hesitate for one second to write it. If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time.But I’m not just some activist.I’m a father trying to save his son from the Left’s madness and butchery.This is what happens when you go up against the $6 BILLION “trans lobby” and radical activist judges.They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees...They’re trying to break my spirit...But I refuse to ever stop fighting for my son... for truth... and for what’s right. Because I don’t want this to ever happen to another family.These radical LGBTQ+ doctors, lawyers and judges need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And **James** needs to be **saved** before he’s permanently butchered.That’s why I’m writing to you today.When Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) heard about my case, they immediately offered to stand with me and fight this insanity.PLDF has been on the frontlines defending innocent J6ers targeted by the Biden DOJ.And when they heard about my case, they told me they’d help in any way possible.The fact is, this transgender madness is affecting all of our children and grandchildren. It’s in their schools. In the books in their libraries. Pediatricians are asking five-year-olds if they “feel like they’re in the wrong body” during routine doctor visits.This is madness. And it’s got to stop.If you want to help save my son **James **from castration and make sure this will NEVER happen to ANY child ever again... And if you want to send a message to these radical judges that their day of reckoning has come... [I hope you’ll consider sending a one-time gift to PLDF today to help fund my battle against the California courts and judges who are trying to mutilate my son.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=fa3a5fe725dd4799967f294d7384694b&_e=gOSy2BbJ-3GwGCgnj3ie7jIzKBdLReQdsD2vLIFPwYqApb8gMpU5spau9OYGDq14AolmRAb0wvY4_9z3oCh5xUECh_yfX-1mhTvhF56qRbb2N8HWezXLpwNOgolPP2fHE5ztyDGwLuVGLHoZe4yo2iRlXlETvpUPv38UKKZx2gSw9D6P2j0ImCiTC95X13-Amhf9cHYVtWEetkApbeoWR_lDSh81wyfV-i0oC8UIzT92J-TZBlzJ9RBjfpwDKMKJF6BCDWHK5CDIgIFRuHL5ACTIpWyX80Bk4gcaJKISQO8P3YFBGDfNVWnBnLFQhTZW1Byu2faZCwCS2vcf-kKN55W3_K_qCrkSc3pbgGZMpEXxSWsayg088qIGpRLX2KIw4mRO1wAE_5TDZ9VuZn6wXw%3D%3D "https://patriots-legal-defense-fund.revv.co/rcl9ea4bb135305b?amount=50&utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250201_BDG_PLDF_DMSJ2_BDG_REV_RCL-RCL&utm_term=GFY2")

clean_body: I’m up against radical trans-activist judges, the 6 BILLION dollar trans lobby, and coastal elites forcing their LGBTQ+ agenda down our throats.| | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now. | | | | | | My Dear Friend, When I tell people my story, I hear the same things over and over again:“That’s crazy.” “I don’t believe that.” “That can’t be.”But if you’ve heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or Fox News, then you know it’s horribly true. My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above.I’ve spent the last decade fighting tooth-and-nail to keep school counselors, my ex-wife, and activist judges from “transitioning” James against my will. If you didn’t know, “transitioning” is the LGBTQ+ industry’s euphemism for sex change surgery or the chemical castration of a child.And if these radicals get their way, my son will be sterilized, traumatized, and dependent on Big Pharma for the rest of his life.This all started ten years ago when my ex-wife began telling me our two-year-old boy James wanted to become a girl.I ignored her and kept dressing my son in boy’s clothes. Because he’s a boy!But then I found out that after dropping him off at school, the school counselor would change him into girl’s clothes WITHOUT TELLING ME.The counselors and teachers also began calling him a different name, “Luna,” at school. Also without telling me!I assumed I’d be able to stop this madness during the custody hearings with my ex-wife. Instead, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.I would only be allowed to see James if I dressed him in girl’s clothes.My friend, I’ve never lied to my sons.And I’m not about to start now. So I was forced to stop visiting him.And then I began the fight of my life to save James from this evil “trans” culture.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers.I even authored a bill to outlaw sex change surgeries for minors in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee.And spent almost every dollar I had to make sure politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair.After I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, my ex-wife fled with James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state. I think you know exactly what happened once she got to California.A radical judge sided with my ex-wife and gave the greenlight to proceed with chemically castrating my son.I have never felt so helpless in my life. I am James’s father – yet I can’t protect him from the powerful LGBTQ+ activists who are using my ex-wife and our kangaroo court systems to turn my son into the poster child for their twisted and perverted agenda.I’ve watched the school system, my ex-wife, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.In fact, I can’t even appeal my case because the judge sealed the court records. I’d have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process.Worst of all, I am under a gag order to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Technically, my writing you this to you today is illegal.But I didn’t hesitate for one second to write it. If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time.But I’m not just some activist.I’m a father trying to save his son from the Left’s madness and butchery.This is what happens when you go up against the $6 BILLION “trans lobby” and radical activist judges.They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees...They’re trying to break my spirit...But I refuse to ever stop fighting for my son... for truth... and for what’s right. Because I don’t want this to ever happen to another family.These radical LGBTQ+ doctors, lawyers and judges need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And James needs to be saved before he’s permanently butchered.That’s why I’m writing to you today.When Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) heard about my case, they immediately offered to stand with me and fight this insanity.PLDF has been on the frontlines defending innocent J6ers targeted by the Biden DOJ.And when they heard about my case, they told me they’d help in any way possible.The fact is, this transgender madness is affecting all of our children and grandchildren. It’s in their schools. In the books in their libraries. Pediatricians are asking five-year-olds if they “feel like they’re in the wrong body” during routine doctor visits.This is madness. And it’s got to stop.If you want to help save my son James from castration and make sure this will NEVER happen to ANY child ever again... And if you want to send a message to these radical judges that their day of reckoning has come... "" | | | | | | | I was fired from my job in the tech industry after speaking out about this LGBTQ+ madness. I have been funding my fight from my own savings. But I can’t keep this up forever. And I’m running out of time to save James. "" I’ve met so many good Americans in this battle. It’s what keeps me going when I feel there’s no hope left. God bless you for reading my letter. With gratitude, P.S. After Tucker Carlson interviewed me on his podcast, I was fired from my job and blacklisted. These radical LGBTQ+ activists have the upper hand when it comes to money and power. But I’ll never stop fighting to save my son. By God, never. P.P.S. This is an old photo...I know I don’t look like that anymore.Sadly, I don’t know what my son looks like now.I haven’t seen him in years.Would you help me fight these corrupt judges and politicians? I’d love to send you a new photo once we’ve overturned these bogus rulings and I’m reunited with my boy. Thank you for reading my letter. "" Patriot's Legal Defense Fund601 Baffie Avenue Winter Park, Florida 32789

body:
The “educator” in the video tells young people: “It’s time to throw away the notion of losing your virginity.”

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/gnqd2tPh12f0p1szvNWP4ikxeTk3hpzMqmDW18M3kfPomyIJZrjeMd7R3K3jyLNwMgdrK-ZaDxfWeiNH7rID1_TtJKHGSbRhq5rTqTk3c7oYPGp2li1dNtEAM0Ki-PaNQXgX8YZ5_Fs-8wV3nlWNWExwvs0fiL_OV1yUbWTERK0WkYUuodQbnAY5/VIQy_BektHIhWXVgbLodYH-JhQMiSXQT/5)_

#
Friend of Life,

Planned Parenthood just came out with a new video that calls virginity "made up" and a "social construct."

The "educator" in the video tells young people: "It's time to throw away the notion of losing your virginity."

Instead of seeing it as "losing something," Planned Parenthood encourages impressionable teens to experiment sexually because "all of these myths around sex and virginity can be so hurtful and overwhelming."

Planned Parenthood is grooming the next generation for abortion. Promoting risky sexual practices to young people ultimately leads them to broken relationships and more children killed in the womb.

**Will you help fight back against Planned Parenthood 's anti-family, pro-death agenda? I'm asking 50 people to step forward today with a $50 gift to help us put our life-saving videos into classrooms nationwide**. **[https://give.liveaction.org/stop-planned-parenthood-mms/](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/z-82TCBuj1qncFcSDbuZx_JvMQNsX2rGzT93CHSJC4fau-wXcT3fPDh1mFBHZnrILxm1yJxkVVMix5OyDi_HTwkLLrNxxjF_d8W12y718KnGta0mGGXbml7o9371iyya1bFPDpWAgTZu5d38ySzBghqETjXH1qaiuoH3gA7H0Z5PakHrbvBC04Z3tHhhYF5zpuxM06oTUWnrgSj-q9exO0mOGfIBJIhggSRJF0OTADKdSMs9XfJnMOIjVbnWn-xa3LlGbH842EA_tdlTcTZb_mOSGGdx9oEs0ow75lfYq84DYGccb4UfXEec3O0853jwPd-wsAdfv-__lQhlhITK3lvORbLGlDc2cCXpeoh7nvVoh0L-7WJ_1JUS_zjxIIfmyaBREUGpVTgTI241Xez-NZQJ9UKfGH47jP7S/TK0gNSjwMw-jFGdqbUHEqE-E9h3qtfc-/5)**

Planned Parenthood has continuously pushed egregious and pornographic materials in schools to young kids and teens -- and what do they "teach" these impressionable kids about sex? That disturbing practices are "normal" and "healthy."

In classic Planned Parenthood fashion, irrefutable definitions are warped, and morality is thrown out the window.

Planned Parenthood is the largest provider of sex education in America -- and they teach kids that gender is fluid, deviant sexual practices are normal and healthy, and anything goes, as long as it's consensual.

**We need to protect our children against Planned Parenthood 's deception. This deadly organization should not be the educator of our children. **

Friend of Life, this is why we at Live Action have been creating - and are about to release! - wholesome sex-ed video series for schools across the country to use instead of Planned Parenthood's damaging materials.

We need to spread the truth about loving relationships between men and women and the beauty of procreation before the next generation of parents is convinced by Planned Parenthood's disturbing agenda that leads to abortion.

**But we can 't complete this critical initiative without your support. Your gift of $50 will help us complete the videos and get them into schools across the country. Use this secure link to make your gift and kick Planned Parenthood out of the classroom! [https://give.liveaction.org/stop-planned-parenthood-mms/](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/iqbFrHJwLtqnKOnefWQb0mkKX-XjmXFD55sI5Idwaz5EKWOSkS3k8bbeCD-edTRHHDBLu4FWPxADOM-rxRjVqy9SYWoCKrIIjW2xx_k3Q8-OnSploEas3wHmL9f5qSVWOzdulxO8TDjybbBMXce1WDRt1AnCZvEB7dQTG1-vr1uBXv__sOGcf1HTj8oBBeZe5krZQdKwMyQgwWhOOShWuTE_wiu2-n58XRlgww1rqGLF3OS1W_5jtff2L3919DEKXnl_uBb5uWGzBEpwcJLDcfGWljCJ_OjIvAze-p5y_AebdIvrWSGbiKEKLt1vYt74_c-WcGt9cn3swNUZMYJKur0QK3-U9B_Stb3-fELfoKZCwAx0997CO9x3ABBBXsJaDHaMj9KVu_ps-cQQyvgQEGQ22ojjNFiNOsqO/HFDzp0NI6cc-WDCWjBEoflX32OzWnmAs/5)
**
Your partnership gives me so much hope. I can't wait to share the impact your activism will have in months to come. Our children - and grandchildren - depend on it.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/v5SbSQVTa_fHzkCeaz2ywEb0YblB6zb-G07H21sarfCPOmpu_sRwEXxW4CdXsmouXjf584JPqrJ-2iStvRrUyRIN46wWr-Boejiu7QsDiKJpPcgMg0V0VWpE681rbjJsSLXeuX6KquztZJ_bpk8JNuXGgti9sc_cpDMRSG28VciFCTLVYWLxY-d-LknpVbeXOLs7IoT3Vn0SgpIF_-COatrjVW375aDwWtYokC8qU40xiHNeikcqNNpmNInS2-33TompJ6eP-gYzhAXH9elXPESIY9phT8t6I_0PfnTbFt_D89qvcTD8y8bG6f4T_udGSZv9xziVOlKq_chqzD6d2cG_ykXJFA3hlyA87_C3RFYNZ-6WoiyOhdBHCKjNmrEbZB-jlL7ABNtfcW7I0yjlkC63_ZyXVeVGTMk2/JAPUKc5z2U524xgVd_ay0CPiGm0pEdlE/5)

body:
We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House – so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.
If Democrats take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.
| |
---
| | | Of all the emails you've received today, this is BY FAR the most important. Why? Because...

_We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat!_

**Remember:** We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

**Remember:** If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

**Remember:** If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE.

**_[Friend- we need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the month to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=13ad123049a44cafb021422aa2448f84&_e=ylnaoalEtmC_ao4trbIrr04N-SQxsMPclmmEzEkp4JCgkW02650dnFyP56PTNK-lNMZcTAIhfzFz3PTu9-4MSOSCHNMZLBdEvKPxYFeeTtqT1tyinsHroiyLheapTCSEfkKRKkw__SjL3e6h6FTARsq5tz-uf087KQwar4mU4NAD1AmQI9TDr--qdvuTbZZv7F9U4At2QUg2gE1jxKf9cVij_nS_0tEmDLp5SUlAZIUUJHE0_WHb5gJEQn967nj9a-kJIyrMppMc9AVJF4r5Bp4CmgC9bVbN5uc5weOFjlJisCph-RjE6zfqzQtkcDaoGll_pK-lp6L3g_SjaIQw56f9N1YhH-H-BXSawqQ7hzsQx5r-4exccLjfEcnclTvVEUn0G1EJSJ6WzsblJ2CjAw%3D%3D "Friend – we need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the month to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority.")_**

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Tomorrow Will Be VERY Special...
body:
I can promise you that you DO NOT want to miss service tomorrow at Sheridan.Church. I have preached hundreds upon hundreds of sermons. Tomorrow's mes
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19171164.10527.1.73698bfcc21d40830d81ee33aac9f194) |
---
I can promise you that you _DO NOT_ want to miss service tomorrow at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19171164.10528.1.f357fda586aa6e733229b0fa7aeacfc0). I have preached _hundreds upon hundreds_ of sermons. Tomorrow's message might be the **biggest game changing message** I have ever been privileged to deliver. **The Book Of Acts Pt. 60 - Socrates Meets Jesus** Invite someone to join you as well! **Tulsa** | 10am **OKC** | 6pm | Water Baptism Sunday **Watch online** : [https://www.youtube.com/@sheridanchurch ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19171164.10529.1.105cc0a4bafb7bffed6bc2736537892b) **Upcoming Events/Services At Sheridan.Church:** -Friday, February 7 @6pm: **Marriage Seminar** | RSVP here: [https://clr.cm/rGhn ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19171164.10530.1.35c9a677f1d1f96959e4dae16bc9e110) -Sunday, February 9 @4pm: **Super Bowl Watch Party** -Friday, February 21 @7pm: **Young Adults (18-35) Service** -Tuesday, February 25 @6:30pm: **[Theology At The Pub](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19171164.10531.1.eb7eac66d8f5361da5c4643af62aa8e8)** | Kilkenny's Irish Pub -Wednesday, February 26 @6:30pm: **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** | RSVP here: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1554718](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19171164.10532.1.35a077f6b71a19e9addb822516fc09f2) Also, please consider partnering w/[Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19171164.10533.1.025d242e513ebce8db673d392cd60a3e) by visiting [https://sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19171164.10534.1.f3429b8a7e90844a937528d7de742059) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19171164.10535.1.a00ebd8e8e15a1a75fdfc875c9559ec0)
---
---
## Big UPDATES At Sheridan.Church
---
|
---
I am _beyond excited_ to share with you that in 2025, [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19171164.10536.1.1a324168bd5700f5b9be8b4cdb1966c9) will be getting an **outside facelift** along with the **installation of an outdoor basketball/pickle-ball court** targeting the next generation! With your help previously, we have taken a **former night-club** and _transformed_ it into a **beautiful church** on the inside. Now it's time to tackle the outside. **Phase 1** of this project (outside facelift + basketball/pickle-ball court) will cost the church around $250,000. We do things on a cash basis at [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19171164.10537.1.6d95ff236d490e5d5f4791df145a9754) and _I need your help_. Please consider partnering with us in 2025 with a gift of **$25** , **$250** , **$2500** _or more_. This message is going out to **thousands of believers** and if everybody will do something in 2025, we can accomplish this phase of transforming a **former tavern** into a **tabernacle**. Take a look at the pictures below! **Phase 2** is the addition of an upper deck of seating to our main auditorium. You can give by visiting [https://sheridan.church/give ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19171164.10538.1.416df2e8a6c3153ed730afa1a0886b2b) Thank you in advance!
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer

name: Team Pramila
subject: [SURVEY] What should Democrats prioritize right now?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We have a long four years ahead of us, but together we can fight back and win.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250201-4725-footer&t=1&akid=4725%2E420207%2El0uG-r)
Peter,
Tomorrow marks two weeks since Donald Trump stepped back into the White House, and we have our work cut out for us to stop the worst of his plans as the administration tries to implement Project 2025.
With Trump constantly creating distractions to divert attention away from his unpopular agenda, Democrats need to focus on what actually matters to working people.
**That’s why we’ve created a short open-ended survey to get your thoughts on what we should prioritize as the second Trump administration takes shape. [Will you take a minute to give us your thoughts?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2025-priorities-survey?source=em20250201-4725&akid=4725%2E420207%2El0uG-r)**
**[Take the survey](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2025-priorities-survey?source=em20250201-4725&akid=4725%2E420207%2El0uG-r)**
Whether there’s a policy you think we should rally around or an opposition strategy you think Democrats should adopt, we want to hear from you.
**This administration is stacked with billionaires like no other before it** , and the only way we’re going to overcome their money and influence is with a mass popular movement of working people across the country.
That’s why your feedback is so important to us, Peter. We have a long four years ahead of us, but together we can fight back and _win_.
[**Take a minute to fill out our 2025 Priorities Survey now and help us step up our opposition to Trump’s MAGA madness. We can’t do it without you!**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2025-priorities-survey?source=em20250201-4725&akid=4725%2E420207%2El0uG-r)
In solidarity,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250201-4725-footer&t=2&refcode2=4725_420207_l0uG-r&akid=4725%2E420207%2El0uG-r)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

# Free speech is under attack and Giuliani has joined the fight!
Read Mayor Giuliani's exclusive weekly op-eds only on PolitiBrawl's Substack. Support Mayor Giuliani with your paid subscription today!
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fe1961a5-e237-4402-835d-b239aafecb47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..mgPaCgodny-2UO9S4J0NQB7R_g7kB-srtkD1bRtOARo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=156247564)
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/59b46bb8-d4bd-470a-b14c-7f1b35aa8822?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**By Rudy W. Giuliani**
In a week that saw the Senate Judiciary Committee grill President Trump's nominee for FBI Director, Kash Patel, we witnessed more than just a confirmation hearing; we saw a battle for the soul of American justice. Patel, a man of unyielding integrity and fierce loyalty to the principles of our Constitution, stood in the lion's den, facing down the predictable and vicious attacks from Democrats like Adam Schiff and Amy Klobuchar. His performance was not just commendable; it was a masterclass in standing firm against the political weaponization of our institutions.
From the outset, it was clear that the Democrats' strategy was to paint Patel as a partisan hack, unfit for the role of leading the FBI. They threw everything at him, from his past affiliations to his unwavering support for President Trump, hoping that something would stick. But Patel, with the poise and resilience of a true patriot, did not waver. He was there to serve the American people, not to be a puppet for any political agenda, especially not those of the entrenched bureaucrats and the so-called "Deep State."...

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Peter,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

## ANNOUNCEMENT FROM PRESIDENT TRUMP:

Good afternoon Friend!
I’m opening up a few more OFFICIAL GRASSROOTS CABINET POSITIONS to celebrate the approval of several of my cabinet nominees.
I’ve only extended this offer to a select group of my most loyal supporters.
Since you’re reading this right now, that means YOU’RE ONE OF THEM!
**I need you to take one of my Trump Advisory Polls soon!**
**[So, I’m asking that you activate your membership now! clean_body: I’m opening up a few more Grassroots Cabinet positions. Secure one of the few spots to advise me. | | | | | ANNOUNCEMENT FROM PRESIDENT TRUMP: Good afternoon Friend! I’m opening up a few more OFFICIAL GRASSROOTS CABINET POSITIONS to celebrate the approval of several of my cabinet nominees. I’ve only extended this offer to a select group of my most loyal supporters. Since you’re reading this right now, that means YOU’RE ONE OF THEM! I need you to take one of my Trump Advisory Polls soon! To make this offer too good to pass up, I’m going to send you an official membership card when you accept. Sent from, President Trump | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. subject: MAGA Republicans are trying to ERASE Black History
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy9biRkT0ZFLBZo_8f8EnE7Jowo6A0R8oop8Rrw_kitS3sMwrJn2ozruxmkvaG936_l1duoWABImS72zia5WVvFde1GehCuB-1yurKWgqQcmvi5x_2xcrVgbcPTYmHuq8lM7C9ixbc6PCd1kcJZUV-3CjNgOCXLgJsKGHsTpabTiUFI3DJixQeX2bVA7AFjay2d52elEmcHjATPuzuq155vqiy-VQsrXW7Xx0Ty2LG65xplaIkcEmVI05EHyIkV1jkVcF6IwyE1rhawCcUyRdiKeAxph4QOeCjB-rb4SujWVU0FD1npAAr0aVZWkVb0F1GnMNIcP4ddloSeFqBKiOoUo4g6kJ4hbBca3eQYuArhujw/4dn/KUjhVYeWS_C4A5MCDNJbNg/h0/h001.ZYovb0uGZcR0xq2kM2Gtl2whT0wcOtlxZRCNH1HLQlc) | | **Peter, Black History is under ATTACK from Trump and his MAGA Republicans.** They’re doing everything they can to ERASE Black history, REWRITE the past, and PROSECUTE teachers who refuse to teach MAGA’s version of history. **[That’s why we’ve set a goal to collect 10,000 signatures on the first day of Black History Month for our petition to demand Congress pass the Black History is American History Act. Will you sign on before midnight?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39teHACB_0SCceF4EAHZrNybXZ7ZxYXZPuD0bjzZGOvNSKU5nl5FMVFXO8wyhqGpv59xiXi7cZjdcEt6TN6sdjAS5LCoxogck6dZ7U7SUs_GDO-G5fYTC5Gzi_7VPnXakNjm4GhurPh7gr3xfmLCZQ15FgpYUprggmlHWyn4rxFGqELvJoAeqpjl0RAgyoTdZmne6A7IOCl_a_iPngNEk1ZD0IOO7mvEnYq6d8n5buB3JmcD4NJjdzMK3kYY9WNizA/4dn/KUjhVYeWS_C4A5MCDNJbNg/h1/h001.t7j5raGf-YI-A25L9WeNph-ir5BRZcrG2eBopVsEk4Q)**
| | [CLICK HERE TO SIGN >>](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39teHACB_0SCceF4EAHZrNybXZ7ZxYXZPuD0bjzZGOvNSKU5nl5FMVFXO8wyhqGpv7eeqIYCLj-qPtQvxGxEmACdlPPSXg22li9TMsWY1Iq7xFwRO4SBlYpF59UUp_0Qo4XWDx_SVesPo9G6y4Awi2nzwp7uvnhtmeTk3Hz-4myIV2n4EnOugCLpdpVK_q9WRjxCLbwypLJ7bOtqQ7-g8ITnPBXC5ZTXNYhHbt14Bm28fyB1G06J_vTjVtrPiOl2OA/4dn/KUjhVYeWS_C4A5MCDNJbNg/h2/h001.mOOw5PVFmYme7TOtMdQyB5S9r3pXUtIpA4-TD1Fi1tQ)
---
Donald Trump and the MAGA right are working to indoctrinate the next generation by teaching them a false version of history.
They don’t want anybody to know about the contributions of Black leaders, activists, and artists.
They don’t want anyone to know about the horrors of slavery, Jim Crow, and the legacies of racism that continue to this day.
They create these false narratives because they make it easier for Trump and his cronies to consolidate power, undermine resistance, and control Americans.
**[We can’t let that happen. So please, be one of the 10,000 people we need to sign our day-one Black History Month petition. DEMAND Congress pass the Black History is American History Act! The petition closes at midnight, so don’t wait to add your name.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39teHACB_0SCceF4EAHZrNybXZ7ZxYXZPuD0bjzZGOvNSKU5nl5FMVFXO8wyhqGpv738pn8uDPnP4YLS7oq1a2abCdm6J3M3AnAsf0sKLYZVZN1bu46AmtgkpLbuTTTVnFIiI_jnOllBxoGWDDNkzai3ax67nJDTZ91hAEby24bZTSBUf1i386TQEN7sAGEMScV1WcfeGv8tOdqCpM1uicdK424Vrp5FedYnXKz6h-f_jYmGFvS1yxwyK7CfBl9g2c/4dn/KUjhVYeWS_C4A5MCDNJbNg/h3/h001.y2kesXouu60YlugRbo1FMVdFfw56tmxvWi54tnmY4Gc)**

| [CLICK HERE TO SIGN >>](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39teHACB_0SCceF4EAHZrNybXZ7ZxYXZPuD0bjzZGOvNSKU5nl5FMVFXO8wyhqGpv74wZsYEZ__fF9a6GDK1revRpiV7eQKaFE5HTuSWDYi8JE3o6OUhu6f-KwTCaYtnmKcCq9i-J8WDKAaTPY9a4TtXD3Olad5fUqogmsnaXWNfsvUYaaKbaFrDAw6u47fZJxzO9smq7IOHKp8Rsp-v_JL29857HyJZN9CajeEoe_PmMBy51baaDF5_-HDgQUuVHI/4dn/KUjhVYeWS_C4A5MCDNJbNg/h4/h001.GbY3aWVn3EOHV6o_x2mj4RoPlAPavDG2VuCwmgXsyZc)

Thank you,
Collective PAC
* * *

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtMtM9o7MpfQTM1SqECAoa9_VhhEkejDi70o2WzuERFq_YfoRgmiqjmOmciInNKcs2qRR6FK9UnvlgVyFAnwQvDmNV0IL5Kk7jMAurLN2G3tiDAF0XFTMeVDDQRVJcdtfh2hBGL_9_geCai4YbAOhuja5yyStJLgrSbQpruUlGGt_EGzJLvssPCMpVpcgV_ioNkDB8NlBLnsazOXdCtcjVVr4jBtOVuzOLVeQxjJGvcS4UxIddzyA1kdZZeE8IJEjSz3_neNmv1uPZ7w1IkLshVMUjbD7wTIqqQIJDxURGOxIHxUXBsal5PpxJjoRxAT87jQGalWpOd_a5-RJRCabfY/4dn/KUjhVYeWS_C4A5MCDNJbNg/h5/h001.5GT5SbcR5oN5rUHoDdEt9IdEQLpdaOdsVM8iri7b96w) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 500 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

name: Ken Martin (via Democrats.org)
subject: Build to Win, Build to Expand, Build to Last
body:
I’m honored to be stepping into a new role as chair of the DNC.
---
Derek, it’s Ken Martin — and I’m honored to be stepping into a new role as chair of the DNC. I firmly believe that if we’re going to be a national party, we need to compete _everywhere_ , in every place, every election, and at every level of government. And I’m looking forward to building a Party that will do just that. [**If you’re ready to join me, I hope you’ll consider making your first contribution of 2025 to support the DNC today:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250201_2687_fr&refcode2=2687_22930333_HpE_dm&akid=2687%2E22930333%2EHpE_dm) **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?refcode=em_20250201_2687_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2687_22930333_HpE_dm&akid=2687%2E22930333%2EHpE_dm)** I ran for DNC chair on a promise to implement a new framework: _Build to Win, Build to Expand, Build to Last._ Here’s what that looks like to me:
* We will **build to win** by expanding our vision and infrastructure. That means funding parties in all 57 states and territories, meaningfully investing in youth empowerment and mobilization, ensuring there is Democratic infrastructure in every ZIP code, and organizing year-round.
* We will **build to expand** by going on offense everywhere, contesting every race, and embracing our responsibility to support Democrats running at every level.
* We will **build to last** by planning, organizing, and implementing a 10-year strategy that aligns the infrastructure, partnerships, and the people we need to win. We must listen to voters and be willing to dig deep and recenter the Democratic agenda to reestablish who we are in the eyes of American voters.

This is the model we followed during my time as chairman of the Minnesota Democratic-Farmer-Labor Party — and it’s worked. Our party won every single statewide election (25-0), secured two trifectas, and was the only state in Democrats’ “Blue Wall” to vote against Trump in 2024. What’s worked here in Minnesota can work nationally, and together, we’re going to prove it. [**I hope you’re as ready as I am to get to work. You can make a $3 contribution here now to help fund the work ahead.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250201_2687_fr&refcode2=2687_22930333_HpE_dm&akid=2687%2E22930333%2EHpE_dm) Thank you, and more very soon. Ken Ken Martin
Chair
Democratic National Committee

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

Political analyst Mark Halperin said Friday on Newsmax that, regardless of who is confirmed as the Democratic National Committee (DNC) chair, he doesn’t believe it can “affect” the party enough to compete with the GOP.
http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqb5p65e14qp7jvfr6c7q1hcvqcaq70t2eg34oig_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5im2ob4cph238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cti69qbacpkmerj79hnmmrqbd1ieqqq1d1hm1qj4t5jmmgjfdbi65r7b89jmoqqcc5k6ip7b83kmorbctd66gprb91j6cqjccblk1q34sbkumij7dtlesobb8bnmmj3fddgekonadd7eion1dd76uo7f8h5u

Mark Halperin Doubts DNC Chair Picks Can ‘Affect’ Party Enough to
Compete With GOP

Political analyst Mark Halperin said Friday on Newsmax that,
regardless of who is confirmed as the Democratic National Committee

body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=Oij77%2F6sDmO6dVTxcXyrdm022uxp31lVqhM%2FbSjSJOHSHrpin20dGyDSot1y91iJnVbSS1ea4Lxvu5dI1Vt0qwHpbm%2B7s%2Fds2e9aT6l4tuD92cY2B6D0cZQYoU39%2Bp07IKHn1fhGdHb3uAeo2DRpOCXFlQlT%2FqG6JiOcvvdZyE%2FZ7AHQH%2BiB8ys65f8tuDyX8o0yZ95%2Ff3D7lX1qsTi3oxqCadeINThVK3hh3IcA8%2FIjqZkhVGpptRDQBPJlcfqVR2v%2BCK7KLm83eNU0cyCeyeWhbNeUbJiT0RCxINJn7xCGp2YacPBUJs99%2BEW99V3rdQ8KL831c9mc0LR%2FY9NwZ6WW99MiuIVN8Q3yoyLRzecC7SAX6UB%2BuYB3ybcHt6i6S6xV4yj6lwxRYavBRC2sI2k4QNB9TYtyRM0xjuD%2BRq8BuY6Fo9hdFY1ACgGi3v9A)

| |
---
Peter,

Thanks to the generous support of people like you, **we met our January end-of-month goal!!!**

Meeting this goal is the first step in taking back the House in 2026 and beating back Trump’s extreme agenda. We know that we have to put in the work **_now_** to stop extremism from gaining more power in the future. Your contributions help build our grassroots movement and will make a difference.

We have so much more work to do together – **to build an economy that works for working people, and to protect our democracy from the extremists, like Trump and his billionaire buddies, who want to divide us.** I’m committed to working hard every day to deliver on the things that matter to our community.

Your support makes that possible. I truly couldn’t do this without you.

Thank you,

Seth
