name: Kirk Cameron
subject: What is the “Prepare the Way” revival and how can you help?
body:
| | | Brave Books is spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" revival campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate...
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Believer, It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only about 12 weeks away.And in that short amount of time, my friends at Brave Books are spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate......to Jesus.And this revival mission needs you! My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood......by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love.Here’s exactly what their strategy is...First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created _Saving the Easter Bunny_ , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic.In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin.Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible.And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "_Mouse in the House_ ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' 12-week "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ big-time. **[And today I'm hoping you'll help them kick it into high gear before orders start pouring in by rushing back your best "Prepare the Way" gift.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=da212e5b6a884dcdb13b892d5b10e679&_e=g31cn4fr0ksPKhVN5oVzIF2zVZswWmzRJfk6npZHw_dDUxhUc0BIUmTu19LboqR4H8jokdKUH8CRmQUhs1MIN1oR_jllCQJNc7wL_U_p2ud_3IS1qC5G6Fd-cCndIfLxnXUMu-GoiWoyY4YNJP9LUCMuILqhTuwlngnrlLQic5U9a0l2zDggziltrJPUM0N2ikvNZ_G8oELkS82oHCSV-YpsmxRlD7zkvQ-ZU5CwuZsAbJDXK1w9Bf78mAeEWHLzCGQCsTcMFgOP7r5AEvB4qZqkP9lNDnCppHX5ZRayMqA8k9X0zospfZK_HZhfrQcdFzj2E9ihmTZVvX8VCTmXrdoQudvaxRO4I67dYRIrpoi0jE2UF4mOg9vJaqWeY1CJ)** No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done:
---
>>> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries.>>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ and a 17-city church tour.
---
Just look at what parents have already said about S _aving the Easter Bunny_ :
---
"It's not easy to explain the true meaning of Easter to adults never mind to children, but Brave Books does it beautifully."
---
— Lisa A.
---
"My kids love the amazing illustrations and so do I!"
---
– Bob A.
---
"My three granddaughters barely sit still but when I'm reading this book and Lord Joshua dies, you can hear a pin drop. That's quickly replaced by squeals of joy after the resurrection. Thank you for bringing the joy of Easter to their little hearts."
---
– Laurin
---

clean_body: | | | Brave Books is spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" revival campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate... | | | | Dear Fellow Believer, It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only about 12 weeks away.And in that short amount of time, my friends at Brave Books are spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate......to Jesus.And this revival mission needs you! My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood......by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love.Here’s exactly what their strategy is...First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created Saving the Easter Bunny , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic.In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin.Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible.And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "Mouse in the House ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' 12-week "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of Saving the Easter Bunny big-time. No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done: >> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries.>>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of Saving the Easter Bunny and a 17-city church tour. Just look at what parents have already said about S aving the Easter Bunny : "It's not easy to explain the true meaning of Easter to adults never mind to children, but Brave Books does it beautifully." — Lisa A. "My kids love the amazing illustrations and so do I!" – Bob A. "My three granddaughters barely sit still but when I'm reading this book and Lord Joshua dies, you can hear a pin drop. That's quickly replaced by squeals of joy after the resurrection. Thank you for bringing the joy of Easter to their little hearts." – Laurin And listen to this... Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools.AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. And if you need one more reason to help, when you , Brave Books will send you Saving the Easter Bunny absolutely free as a thank you. You can keep Saving the Easter Bunny for your family, gift it to someone you love, or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. Thank you for bringing the true meaning of Easter to families all across America. May God bless you this coming Easter season, | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. It's only January but Brave Books is focused on sparking historic revival this Easter! They've launched a massive 12-week "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate -- to Jesus. As a special thank you for your gift of $100 or more we'll send you your very own copy of Saving the Easter Bunny for your family. Thank you! | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | As we start the New Year, I have big news to share with you. But first, I want to say something about the victories you helped us accomplish in 2024.

| Peter,

Happy February! I want to take a moment to thank you for your support. **With your help, we hit our January fundraising goal and are starting the year off strong!** I am truly grateful for your contribution to my campaign and your belief in our work ahead.

Winning back the Virginia Governor’s seat will be a challenge, especially after we saw the gains Trump made in Virginia just this November compared to 2020. It will require a pitch-perfect campaign, extraordinary fundraising, and tireless campaigning across our Commonwealth.

**We know that all eyes will be on Virginia. subject: Tell the Senate to Kash Patel
body:
[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kMluwjAURb_G3hHZz46TLLxgCouKSiBRUXaOh8atMzQTzd9XUMr26rx3j66q2uDdLFGyQgClNz0CQGyJAMaBvanTad_NCx7vD4srA3vLEawf6ARPuNbq0KzGZV25S_9yvqy37z-7iT7xYW7tE36URrZSPtzSZION5KCo09hKmrCUsywFgUvJSAou08Ap52mhBSsIK0xRaO1iBYRjL4FATIBQmsUiJhGJrRNCQMIEJQ4c4uReFLnO2qH09ZftjPJhjnRT4SDLYWj7u1iOIG9MEdWjDnbs_650UyHIH8oI8glBnl2Or59mdz5uEcvvo7FNXbGp_BYTxZ007dWH4HuRIE4-_t_gScJvAAAA__-n9G4k)

| |
---
| | Kash Patel is a true patriot who has spent his career defending the American people, exposing the deep state, and fighting to restore integrity to our government.
---
| |
---
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kUFvozwQhn-NuQXZM8YkBw6kJP2kKp_atIm6vSAHjxtrMbBg6Obfr0BRLnN49Ejv-2q072pnbxlLtwzg6szAABjmDGAMeNan06G_rWRyeFv9INDMGTzd1QkeclPpt3Y75o23X8PL59fT7tff50k89HDr6CHfQ2Py2tUzTYvIZBK0sFVEmUhxLXGzBhVdMytRpOJiycg1Gau52iiQiRVcGIOaIpcBh4QDF2KTqITHPCGrlIIUleAWLJN8CYptTxSurvlNvdGuvsVV66M6u4bQDUuxPYO99rrSVXBtE_c0TXHVMtgPoUdLaSJTaS94MQz3Y_BloN4zLGwwgoGaydCOfUUMi23xvDruznfsybhxVneHO6m077T7bhgWS32BoswP-Uf5kr__Vx535_L9Iz-u5sNAlU3tDMOi2X6e_qdXek0WuLwLi8bjdP2jJhH1mel-XF27QaVM8u9l9rxyyuBfAAAA__9Lx5Rr)
---
| | **Fellow Patriot,** Donald Trump hit the ground running after his inauguration. He’s signed hundreds of executive orders to undo much of the damage caused by the Biden administration, and he’s named a stellar lineup of cabinet appointments. Some have already been confirmed by the Senate. But the Left-wing media, radical Democrats, and even weak-kneed RINOs are working overtime to sabotage one of his most important picks – **Kash Patel as FBI Director**. _**[_**Today I need your help to DEMAND Kash Patel CONFIRMATION!**_](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kc1uozAUhZ_G7ILs679kwYKUpKNWWSRto5lukOOf4A4GBgxt3n4EirK5i0-fdM7RVaGrvbtlSG4RQOXNgAAQzRHAGOlZfXwc-tuK8cNx9U3BzhzB012d4CE3Wh3b7Zg3wX0Or78_n3Z_fp4n8tDjrbMP-R6a2qB8PVNZJCZjoIjTic2IpGtGN2sQSZVJrBy9kLWi3HDMCZOGMMO4dk5vGHGJzwADx4AJ2XDBcYq5dUIIkFQQ7MAhhpeg1PXWxso3f21vlK9vqW5DUmdVjN2wFNsj2KugtNLRt03a22lKdYtgP8SeOis5k8xd6MUguh9jKKPtA6KFi4YgEDMZ2rHXFtFiWzyvTrvzHQdr_Diru8OdaBU65a8NosVSn1BS5of8vXzN336Vp925fHvPT6v5IBBlU3uDaPH18nM9xpcvcVjg8i5aNIFO1T8xkaTPTPft69oPQiKGr8vseeWUwf8AAAD__-GAlE8)**_ Kash Patel is a true patriot who has spent his career defending the American people, exposing the deep state, and fighting to restore integrity to our government. He’s proven that he won’t back down, especially in the fight to hold the FBI accountable for its weaponization under Christopher Wray. Under Wray’s leadership, the FBI’s actions cast a dark shadow on our nation’s federal law enforcement – it became a political tool used against the Biden administration’s political opponents and innocent American citizens. Under Wray’s watch:
---
* **The FBI coordinated with Big Tech outlets to censor and lie about the Hunter Biden laptop story.**
* **They targeted Traditional Catholics and labeled them as potential “Domestic Terrorists.”**
* **And they investigated parent groups to punish and malign Americans who opposed Critical Race Theory and gender madness in schools.**

---
My friend, **America deserves better.** President Trump understands that, which is why he’s nominated Kash Patel – someone who will restore honor, transparency, and fairness to the FBI. But we know what’s coming: just like they tried to do with Pete Hegseth, the Democrats will unite to block Kash Patel’s confirmation, and it will only take a handful of weak Republican Senators to sink this critical appointment. Make no mistake; the radical Democrats and deep state actors will do anything to stop Kash from cleaning house at the FBI... ... including bullying and coercing “Republican” Senators into voting “No.” If we don’t stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak RINOs could help the Democrats tank this nomination. We can’t let that happen. Peter, we’re exactly two months away from the Wisconsin Supreme Court election that will decide the fate of voting rights, abortion access, and labor rights in the Badger State. The NDRC is proud to have endorsed Judge Susan Crawford in this race — and the work we do together over the final weeks could make all the difference. That’s why we’re about to ask you to do something big. **Will you make a donation to the NDRC today and make it weekly for this last sprint to help support Democracy Defenders like Judge Crawford nationwide?** [**Yes, I'll make a weekly donation that will stop after the April 1 election →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101391428/525812610/635637513?recurring=1&refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_2MonthsTillWIEday_email_20250201-NDRC-Tier1-2MonthsTillWIEday_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250201-NDRC-Tier1-2MonthsTillWIEday_&utm_campaign=2MonthsTillWIEday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0YTljMGY3LWQ2ZTAtZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3dGHX-bWVH-mkdh-4zjObrAdUdeaRRuZJuFXMbUEXx8=) [**No, but I'll make a one-time gift right now →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101391430/525812618/635637513?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_2MonthsTillWIEday_email_20250201-NDRC-Tier1-2MonthsTillWIEday_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250201-NDRC-Tier1-2MonthsTillWIEday_&utm_campaign=2MonthsTillWIEday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0YTljMGY3LWQ2ZTAtZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3dGHX-bWVH-mkdh-4zjObrAdUdeaRRuZJuFXMbUEXx8=) The NDRC — with the support of dedicated supporters like you — has a proven track record in Wisconsin. In 2023, our grassroots movement helped deliver a resounding win for democracy in Wisconsin’s state supreme court race. Voters elected Judge Janet Protasiewicz by a _double-digit margin_ , making it clear that they’ve had enough of conservatives’ anti-democratic power grabs. But _The New York Times_ is predicting this year will be “a pitched political battle” — one that “is likely to be even more partisan, negative and expensive than the 2023 election, whose $56 million price tag shattered national spending records for a judicial contest.” By starting a weekly gift now, you’ll play a crucial role in helping our team invest wisely and strategically while there's still enough time to make a difference. The NDRC is proud to have endorsed Judge Susan Crawford in this race — and the work we do together over the final weeks could make all the difference. That’s why we’re about to ask you to do something big. Will you make a donation to the NDRC today and make it weekly for this last sprint to help support Democracy Defenders like Judge Crawford nationwide? = = The NDRC — with the support of dedicated supporters like you — has a proven track record in Wisconsin. In 2023, our grassroots movement helped deliver a resounding win for democracy in Wisconsin’s state supreme court race. Voters elected Judge Janet Protasiewicz by a double-digit margin , making it clear that they’ve had enough of conservatives’ anti-democratic power grabs. name: Dr. Amy Acton
subject: I’m running for Ohio Governor.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101391713/525813547/-491556796?refcode=250201_Serve_Acton_Running&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGVlZTE2Mi1kN2UwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=elR5zpqB4HgLCIuXI6m_3m2TP24MI_NXhN-7yKwYuI4=)
---
My name is Dr. Amy Acton and today, I’m announcing my campaign for Governor of Ohio. **I’m a mother, grandmother, preventative medicine and preventative medicine doctor, and a Youngstown native.** I’ve spent almost my entire life in Ohio. I grew up moving from place to place, often not knowing where we would sleep or if my brother and I would eat dinner that night. I worked hard to put myself through college and medical school before serving as the Director of the Department of Health. Unlike most of our leaders, I don’t believe the answer to fixing our state is giving politicians more power — **the answer is giving hardworking families more freedom.** Our families deserve better than political games and self-serving politicians that stand in the way of making real change for Ohioans. [**That’s why I’m running for Governor of Ohio. So right now, I’m asking you to split a donation between Serve America and my campaign before midnight tonight →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101391714/525813548/-927293987?refcode=250201_Serve_Acton_Running&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGVlZTE2Mi1kN2UwLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=elR5zpqB4HgLCIuXI6m_3m2TP24MI_NXhN-7yKwYuI4=) Friends, when Ohio’s Republican Governor Mike DeWine asked me to serve in his administration as the Director of the Ohio Department of Public Health in 2019, I had no idea what was coming. **I don’t always agree with Governor DeWine, but I put partisanship aside and we worked together to tackle the opioid crisis, weather the pandemic, and save lives. That’s because the problems we face don’t care if you’re a Democrat or a Republican. They just need fixing.** And that’s exactly how I plan to serve as Governor. I’ll fight to lower costs, make our communities safer and more business friendly, and give power back to the people...not politicians. [**But I can’t do this alone. This race is going to be tough, and I will need all the help I can get. clean_body: | = My name is Dr. Amy Acton and today, I’m announcing my campaign for Governor of Ohio. I’m a mother, grandmother, preventative medicine and preventative medicine doctor, and a Youngstown native. I’ve spent almost my entire life in Ohio. I grew up moving from place to place, often not knowing where we would sleep or if my brother and I would eat dinner that night. I worked hard to put myself through college and medical school before serving as the Director of the Department of Health. Unlike most of our leaders, I don’t believe the answer to fixing our state is giving politicians more power — the answer is giving hardworking families more freedom. Our families deserve better than political games and self-serving politicians that stand in the way of making real change for Ohioans. = Friends, when Ohio’s Republican Governor Mike DeWine asked me to serve in his administration as the Director of the Ohio Department of Public Health in 2019, I had no idea what was coming. I don’t always agree with Governor DeWine, but I put partisanship aside and we worked together to tackle the opioid crisis, weather the pandemic, and save lives. That’s because the problems we face don’t care if you’re a Democrat or a Republican. They just need fixing. And that’s exactly how I plan to serve as Governor. I’ll fight to lower costs, make our communities safer and more business friendly, and give power back to the people...not politicians. = = Sincerely, Dr. Amy Acton = = [content goes here] Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Serve America PAC

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Peter,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

_— AZ Mirror, January 9, 2025_
* * *

Anthony Kern, who called public universities “anti-American indoctrination camps” and sponsored a bill that would have allowed students to challenge their grades based on the “political bias” of their professors._ _Republican lawmakers have also set out to continue their campaign of anti-transgender legislation in schools, saying that students should only play on sports teams, and use bathroom and locker facilities that align with their biological sex, instead of their gender identity.”_ | [PITCH IN TO FIGHT BACK](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101392359/525815329/-94917156?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250201_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ3ZThhYWYtZGRlMC1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V0RDByEZxFkkYpbnl7el9e2t--HSNuYjX3zGM7SLyfY=)

Team,
Republicans in the Arizona general assembly are trying to mirror Donald Trump's extreme MAGA agenda right here in our state.
Their top priority? Battling so-called "wokeness" in schools.
We know what that _really_ means: **Pulling books off shelves, demonizing trans kids, and ignoring the real challenges our public education system faces, like underfunded districts, low teacher pay, and more.**
This all-out assault on our classrooms is unacceptable. These actions don't represent the majority of Arizonans who just want their kids to receive a quality education at a school where teachers are well-paid and well-staffed.
**[To defend our classrooms from this extremism, we need a strong grassroots team. name: Every Eligible American
subject: POLL: Should D.C. become the 51st state?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Every Eligible American_
body:
| Every Eligible American is committed to preserving a safe, secure, and accessible democracy for every eligible American, regardless of zip code. If you’d like to unsubscribe from our list, [**click here.**](https://valuethevote.us/l/x9WezkUk6Rbj)
---
| [ ](https://valuethevote.us/l/Oug1kxtvg0Yr)
---
Friend, If you’ve kept up with the news lately, you’ve seen President Donald Trump float the idea of making Canada the 51st state. _What!?_ **While Trump is talking about statehood for Canada, there’s a clear need for better representation for a “state” here at home – namely Washington, D.C.** Our nation’s capital is home to over 700,000 Americans who don’t enjoy the same representation we do in the 50 states. They have ZERO Senate representation, and we think it’s past due their voice were strengthened via statehood.
[**That’s why we’re polling our top supporters today: Should Washington, D.C. become our 51st state?**](https://valuethevote.us/l/WACtMEidL5dF)
---
| **[YES](https://valuethevote.us/l/V68w2u1MCNno)**
---
**[NO](https://valuethevote.us/l/Eai6caeeK3AG)**
---
**[UNSURE](https://valuethevote.us/l/xPzMMM42l9QS)**
---
We’re looking for 500 responses before midnight to inform our strategy. Thank you, Every Eligible American
---
|
---
_Paid for by Every Eligible American_
---

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Be part of the change for Women’s rights
body:
Join together
| Friend, Are you ready to take action against radical gender ideology? As you and I navigate this new political landscape, the importance of defending women’s rights has never been more critical.
With President Trump’s victory, you and I now have the chance to reclaim society from leftist values.
The Riley Gaines Center is rallying advocates and allies to join this movement in defense of women’s rights, and I want **_YOU_** to be part of it. Friend, with your support, I know that anything is possible. That includes setting things right and Making Women Female Again. As I travel the country and hear horror stories from concerned parents, one thing is clear. People want to know how they can help. Well, Friend, this is how: [Contribute now to our 2025 fundraising drive.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b47eb2146d684b05bfbcce41ff795a55&_e=izVfyOrOk8_AL4VdYYQwLR2nVZXBLde8u7vYh9Su0ysGXnd6n_JF-5m1vFhGtNLNX42yi526MMqH2EWDSuLIGWt8vQkHsDJfVtmr3W1Cvw4ZFDqn7VXatdvWUxM0WWeQNv55xHC4VTE-JCDenDd-PYcN4AuMFqMvq7qPWPZmEK-5dd04ktoSsncAs7JukgyElqVNfJ43rx1HohqePZEEsqWmcCEczsnYPgDl180-eJwqSJusQHG_f097j2hs2Va1Voe16ghCpWPoYRK5o6xzTF0t9zKIpUVPbKAZ2_4O-ux4LXZlSK_y__yRGBBTsd3TWM9SRMqMT4DrzjqVsDHUg7kwDOH1qVLev0aU5GJZD7fXlOxLkvnZGXv_gYJ90Wl3nVhx64MJjDZeaoz5wGV7Zg%3D%3D) Your critical support can empower the Riley Gaines Center’s Ambassadors to take decisive action and make a tangible difference in the lives of female athletes and students. My Ambassadors are out there right now, fighting for you and I. **Don’t worry, we’re young and hungry and ready to fight.**
Together, we can create a ripple effect that impacts every corner of our country.
[Every contribution matters. Whether it’s $25, $50, or more, your donation directly funds our programs and initiatives designed to protect and uplift women.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b47eb2146d684b05bfbcce41ff795a55&_e=izVfyOrOk8_AL4VdYYQwLR2nVZXBLde8u7vYh9Su0ysGXnd6n_JF-5m1vFhGtNLNX42yi526MMqH2EWDSuLIGWt8vQkHsDJfVtmr3W1Cvw4ZFDqn7VXatdvWUxM0WWeQNv55xHC4VTE-JCDenDd-PYcN4AuMFqMvq7qPWPZmEK-5dd04ktoSsncAs7JukgyElqVNfJ43rx1HohqePZEEsqWmcCEczsnYPgDl180-eJwqSJusQHG_f097j2hs2Va1Q1HL-L3Ou1LNOhfWOpNW_nupFnQSqpm7rnrWDyRfne2_Jn_39N2uXTluLdBRFHUtr9cBGbltVr6vOaHJZUPKeyn9jNDchHvVLYiDoX7hCyWalMHGKVtTJMfr7NzBvPfcV3iDZIlkZBJklBsRl8ChWQ%3D%3D) Together, you and I can make waves and advocate for policies that ensure fairness and equality. Let’s harness this momentum and continue the fight for women’s rights! Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines Director of the Riley Gaines Center
at the Leadership Institute P.S. - Together, you and I can create a powerful front against the challenges posed by the left’s radical agenda. At the very least, your support will help make sure that the “Women” sign on the bathroom door means something again. name: GundryMD
subject: don’t eat: almonds, peanut butter, and spinach (Here's why)
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

|
If you've been led to believe that peanut butter, almonds and spinach are good for you, today's email might shock you and is important to read, because these 3 healthy foods could be contributing to health problems in your body.

Let's take a quick look at why...

**1\. Peanut butter**

While peanut butter does contain a small amount of protein and vitamins/minerals, the cons outweigh the pros on this food.

First of all, peanuts contain one of the highest concentrations of aflatoxin, which is a mold toxin that is created in peanuts due to storage in moist conditions.

Peanut butter is also very high in inflammatory omega-6 fats and due to the processing of peanut butter, those omega 6 fats are in a harmful oxidized state.

Most people already get too much omega 6 fats from vegetable oils (soy, corn, canola, etc), and this contributes to insulin resistance, heart disease, brain inflammation, cancer, and lots more health problems, since most people are currently eating 5-10x more omega-6 fats than we should be eating in a healthy diet.

Lastly, peanut butter also contains medium amounts of oxalates, which are plant-based antinutrients that when consumed in excess can contribute to kidney stones, thyroid and gut problems, joint problems and more.

We'll talk more about oxalates in the next food...

**2\. Spinach**

Spinach is promoted as a healthy green, but contains FAR more downsides than good sides. Spinach is one of the highest oxalate foods that's commonly eaten by modern humans (in addition to beet greens, beets, almonds, and other veggies and nuts).

The amount of oxalates in a serving of spinach is extremely high, up to 600 mg in a normal sized bowl.

The "safe" amount of oxalates in a daily diet according to world renowned oxalate expert Sally Norton should be between 100-200 mg per day total to avoid a lot of the health problems caused by high oxalate plants.

So, you can see how concerning spinach is with the extremely high oxalate levels.

As mentioned above, eating too much oxalates too frequently can cause serious issues such as kidney stones, thyroid problems, gut damage, skin issues, and joint pain.

In fact, some people have even gotten "oxalate poisoning" by eating green smoothies too often and had to go to the ER for kidney failure.

**3\. Almonds**

Although almonds and almond milk are marketed as healthy, they also contain many downsides, including all of the negatives mentioned above about too much omega 6 fats and too much oxalates.

They're probably ok in your diet occasionally, but I personally avoid eating almonds too often because of these issues with excess oxalates and omega 6 fats.

Now let's take a look at a fun little quiz below and a few more foods...

**Bananas vs oranges vs apples... (the #1 WORST fruit for your gut & energy)** According to the best-selling author and world-renowned heart surgeon, Dr. Steven Gundry, there's one fruit people over 40 should never eat.

This fruit can **damage your gut and disrupt your hormones**. Both sapping you of energy and **forcing your body to create "sticky" fat cells that can NOT be "burned off" with normal diet and exercise. **

Do you know the fruit I'm talking about? Make sure you do by clicking the one below you think it is, and get the answer from Dr. Gundry himself on the next page:

[>> Bananas

>> Oranges

>> Apples

>> Grapes

](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/fff0ca01285f46fe9c19298d42144b2d-4c4a2da1046f43e9a0a0b7de916f2624/63)[](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/fff0ca01285f46fe9c19298d42144b2d-4c4a2da1046f43e9a0a0b7de916f2624/63)[
](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/fff0ca01285f46fe9c19298d42144b2d-4c4a2da1046f43e9a0a0b7de916f2624/63)

Dear USO Supporter,
On Feb. 4, the USO will celebrate its 84th birthday -- a milestone that caring Americans like you helped make possible. This celebration fills us with pride and gratitude for the incredible journey we've shared with the heroes who serve in America's military.
For more than eight decades, the USO has been a steadfast partner to our service members and their families, offering support, entertainment, critical resources, a connection to home when it's needed most and so much more. And it's all thanks to dedicated supporters like you.
It all began in 1941, when President Franklin D. Roosevelt envisioned a united front to boost the morale of the members of our military and keep them connected to their loved ones. Since then, we have been there for every military generation, through times of conflict, times of peace and everything in between.
During World War II, USO Centers welcomed more than a million service members during the peak of their operations. From providing warm meals to offering a space to write letters, the USO became a vital source of comfort. Our legendary USO Camp Shows brought laughter and joy to the front lines, with stars like Marlene Dietrich, Ann-Margret and Marilyn Monroe brightening our military heroes' days.
Through every major conflict since then -- the Korean War, the Vietnam War, the Gulf War, Operation Enduring Freedom and natural disasters right here at home -- the USO has never wavered in its mission. Even in the toughest moments, we've been there, providing support and connection to help service members who are far from their loved ones.
As we prepare to celebrate our 84th birthday, the USO continues to evolve and adapt to meet the needs of our military community. Whether it's as simple as offering a warm welcome at an airport, we are here -- to lend a hand and to always stand with our service members.
But what many people don't realize is that the USO is not a part of the federal government. We're a nonprofit organization, which means none of this would be possible without the unwavering support of caring friends like you. So, I want to say a heartfelt THANK YOU for supporting the USO as we strengthen the well-being of our military heroes and their families. There is no greater honor.
Happy birthday, USO! Here's to the next 84 years.
With deepest gratitude,
J.D. Crouch II
President and CEO, USO
**[P.S. If you'd like to help us continue this important work, please consider making a donation of $29 or more today. Every gift, no matter the size, makes a difference in the lives of those who sacrifice so much -- and in honor of the USO's 84th birthday, you'll receive a FREE USO hat when you donate $20 or more!](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/~)**
United Service Organizations, Inc. (USO) is a nonprofit 501(ς)(3) organization (EIN/Tax ID: 13-1610451) and not part of the Department of Defense (DOD). The appearance of DOD visual information does not imply or constitute DOD endorsement.
Photo by the USO.
(C)2025 USO, Inc. All Rights Reserved
PO Box 96860 Washington, DC 20077-7677
1-888-484-3876
[Click Here to Unsubscribe](https://action.uso.org/unsubscribe/list?m=24593934&r=OTA3NTg4MTc2NzQxS0&j=MzAyMDA0ODk0MQS2&l=13637754&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://www.uso.org/privacy) | [State Disclosures](https://www.uso.org/state-disclosures)
[ ](https://www.uso.org/) [SEND USO A BIRTHDAY GIFT!](https://links.e.uso.)

name: Bera Headquarters
subject: Making sure you saw our latest update!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

We’re almost a month into 2025, and we’re excited to share the latest updates on what Rep. Ami Bera has been working on for Sacramento County and beyond. From his leadership role on the House Foreign Foreign Affairs Committee to his ongoing efforts to support local communities, there’s plenty to catch up on. Please take a moment to read on about what Ami’s been up to!
# [#]Continuing his leadership on the House Foreign
Affairs Committee:
→ Congressman Ami Bera continues his leadership on the House Foreign Affairs Committee as the Ranking Member of the Subcommittee on East Asia and Pacific in the 119th Congress. Ami is focused on advancing a free and open Indo-Pacific to continue fostering peace and stability in the region, which is incredibly important to US national security, economic interests, and shared values. He remains committed to working across the aisle to address key challenges, including countering China’s aggressive and coercive actions, securing critical supply chains, and strengthening multilateral alliances.
Dr. Ami Bera appeared live on POLITICO’s AI Panel at Playbook:
photo Dr. Ami Bera on the AI Discussion panel [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/90578/images/bera.png]
→ Ami Bera joined a panel of experts to give his insights on America’s competitiveness in the AI race against China, along with Senator John Curtis, OpenAI’s Vice President of Global Affairs Chris Lehane, and Wiley Rein’s Hon. Nazak Nikakhtar. Check out the panel by clicking here! [https://x.com/POLITICOLive/status/1879185574969356600]
Honoring the life and legacy of former President Jimmy Carter:
→ Ami had the privilege of honoring the life and legacy of President Jimmy Carter at the Washington National Cathedral in early January. We reflect on President Carter’s contributions, and remember him as a great American who dedicated his life to creating a better, kinder, and more peaceful world during his presidency and throughout his life.
Federal commitment to support victims of the LA wildfires:
→ Ami has supported providing the necessary relief to help those impacted by natural disasters throughout his time in Congress, and continued that approach in response to the devastating wildfires in L.A. County. He joined Senator Alex Padilla, Senator Adam Schiff, and 46 other Members of the California delegation in supporting Joe Biden’s swift approval of a major disaster declaration.
Sworn in for the 119th Congress:
→ Dr. Ami Bera was honored to be reelected last November and sworn in January 3rd to begin his seventh term as a member of the 119th Congress! WhenAmi was first sworn in twelve years ago, he was the sole Indian American Member of Congress and only the third in U.S. history. Today, Ami is the longest serving Indian American in history and stands among a coalition of six. He is proud to continue representing residents of Sacramento County and California’s 6th congressional district in Washington, DC.
Certified the Election:
→ On January 6th, Ami joined his House and Senate colleagues in order to fulfill their constitutional duty of certifying the results of the 2024 presidential election. As you well know, the complete opposite situation unfolded, four years ago, when a mob stormed the Capitol in an attempt to disrupt the certification of the legitimate 2020 election results. Ami will continue to fight for the American people and protect our democracy.
End of Year District Statistics:
→ During the last Congress, Ami’s team resolved over 6,600 constituent cases and returned more than $5,000,000 to Sacramento County taxpayers. This includes assisting residents with stalled passports and tax returns, helping seniors access Social Security and Medicare benefits, and ensuring veterans receive the benefits they have earned. He also helped secure over $295,000,000 in federal funding and grants to improve the Sacramento region’s infrastructure, economy, and more.
Thank you, Joe:
→ Thank you, President Joe Biden, for being a president for all Americans, and reminding us that this a land of possibilities and nothing is beyond our capacity when we work together. Thank you, Joe, for your 50+ years of service to our great nation.

As we look ahead to the rest of 2025, Ami remains committed to serving Sacramento County and tackling the challenges facing our nation.

To get in touch with Ami’s congressional office, call 916-635-0505 or visit bera.house.gov [https://bera.house.gov] to learn more.

Thank you for your support!

— Bera Headquarters

---
Paid for by Bera for Congress

We reflect on President Carter’s contributions, and remember him as a great American who dedicated his life to creating a better, kinder, and more peaceful world during his presidency and throughout his life. Federal commitment to support victims of the LA wildfires: → Ami has supported providing the necessary relief to help those impacted by natural disasters throughout his time in Congress, and continued that approach in response to the devastating wildfires in L.A. County. He joined Senator Alex Padilla, Senator Adam Schiff, and 46 other Members of the California delegation in supporting Joe Biden’s swift approval of a major disaster declaration. Sworn in for the 119th Congress: → Dr. Ami Bera was honored to be reelected last November and sworn in January 3rd to begin his seventh term as a member of the 119th Congress! WhenAmi was first sworn in twelve years ago, he was the sole Indian American Member of Congress and only the third in U.S. history. Today, Ami is the longest serving Indian American in history and stands among a coalition of six. He is proud to continue representing residents of Sacramento County and California’s 6th congressional district in Washington, DC. Certified the Election: → On January 6th, Ami joined his House and Senate colleagues in order to fulfill their constitutional duty of certifying the results of the 2024 presidential election. As you well know, the complete opposite situation unfolded, four years ago, when a mob stormed the Capitol in an attempt to disrupt the certification of the legitimate 2020 election results. Ami will continue to fight for the American people and protect our democracy. End of Year District Statistics: → During the last Congress, Ami’s team resolved over 6,600 constituent cases and returned more than $5,000,000 to Sacramento County taxpayers. This includes assisting residents with stalled passports and tax returns, helping seniors access Social Security and Medicare benefits, and ensuring veterans receive the benefits they have earned. He also helped secure over $295,000,000 in federal funding and grants to improve the Sacramento region’s infrastructure, economy, and more. Thank you, Joe: → Thank you, President Joe Biden, for being a president for all Americans, and reminding us that this a land of possibilities and nothing is beyond our capacity when we work together. Thank you, Joe, for your 50+ years of service to our great nation. As we look ahead to the rest of 2025, Ami remains committed to serving Sacramento County and tackling the challenges facing our nation. To get in touch with Ami’s congressional office, call 916-635-0505 or visit bera.house.gov [] to learn more. Thank you for your support! — Bera Headquarters Paid for by Bera for Congress Bera for Congress PO Box 582496 Elk Grove, CA 95758 United States

name: Jeff Younger
subject: A California court ruled that my son can be chemically castrated...
body:
“That’s crazy.” “I don’t believe that.” “That can’t be.” | | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now.
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
| | I’m reaching out to you today with a personal and urgent message. I’m writing to you because I’m fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, corrupt untouchable judges, and an unconstitutional court order from “transitioning” my twelve year old son James against my will.**[And I need your help to save my son from a court-ordered chemical castration.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8bb42340439d4d769f56d75813ce24b6&_e=pdxd-wIbBL76P-bCxPlwfMR5z4IxNynEppognXOJEHpK8ad5RB6LnF392Q9AbNCR9Lqdqi7JVAfuNt5iHu-d7rZIMdkmOE8GmuXOshMyxq8VHfB4v4q7AmF0o_8eCLaivMP3K89YiK0kbioIRnPFjP23-JVRWlTm-fKpmQdUdbRj8a_oy5YUbTJ2StqH5Z2DSfiU0cQKtJIazjILKAupdhb4kNp0NksNZ6oUzgyf-C5urzCBmotrsAnD4qrzp5zQ7FXyiKo7KYMXQb40BJ_IFwjlxn9zHC_9IpSQcy99NLUga2BA3KtUbdh8Uy5hb_qn1N8JkQ2aOk0TFNtLnFyuuKDdRbV4TVFdJz4r61196GgaFP-yCneDAW_qXPrFo2nt)**

This is an old photo...I don’t even know what my son looks like now.I haven’t seen him in years.But I will never stop fighting.I need to save my son, _who was taken away from me by court order.__Who was forced to change into girls’ clothing by the school counselors after I dropped him off.__Without my knowledge._ My son is twelve years old. And despite residing in Texas, and Texas courts ruling that no gender reassignment may be permitted without consent, my son was whisked away to a California court infamous for transgender rulings against parents.And after a corrupt transgender judge ruled against me. My son is now just months away from being chemically castrated. **[Will you help me fight to save James?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8bb42340439d4d769f56d75813ce24b6&_e=pdxd-wIbBL76P-bCxPlwfMR5z4IxNynEppognXOJEHpK8ad5RB6LnF392Q9AbNCR9Lqdqi7JVAfuNt5iHu-d7rZIMdkmOE8GmuXOshMyxq8VHfB4v4q7AmF0o_8eCLaivMP3K89YiK0kbioIRnPFjP23-JVRWlTm-fKpmQdUdbRj8a_oy5YUbTJ2StqH5Z2DSfiU0cQKtJIazjILKAupdhb4kNp0NksNZ6oUzgyf-C5uMexshqtXqtQqoJu35C7yJpcd_DnIcJ-YbVDro6NwRIUQV2eX-PA1Eo6TDSlcWMrsZi0JagXQ3sbtlQtREqoCUKG8NTLvYGypeBORPw3yvrkQm2sUpa2A939xzTVXANX159P9VMqQN51hj-KGmET9)** I have partnered with the _Patriot’s Legal Defense Fund_ to fight against these family court sham rulings that are advancing a political agenda by hook or by crook. This _Patriot’s Legal Defense Fund_ will help me have the resources to fight this fight with the determination and vigor necessary to save my son – without having to worry about looming massive financial burdens.And it will help me pursue this battle to the end. Making sure these corrupt judges and politicians are held accountable – so that they cannot do this to hundreds of families across the country. These dark conspiracies to mutilate children are pure evil – and we have to stop this madness from ever happening to another child.Let alone my own son. **[That’s why I am humbly asking for you to make a generous contribution to this defense fund so that we can tirelessly fight this fight against evil.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8bb42340439d4d769f56d75813ce24b6&_e=pdxd-wIbBL76P-bCxPlwfMR5z4IxNynEppognXOJEHpK8ad5RB6LnF392Q9AbNCR9Lqdqi7JVAfuNt5iHu-d7rZIMdkmOE8GmuXOshMyxq8VHfB4v4q7AmF0o_8eCLaivMP3K89YiK0kbioIRnPFjP23-JVRWlTm-fKpmQdUdbRj8a_oy5YUbTJ2StqH5Z2DSfiU0cQKtJIazjILKAupdhb4kNp0NksNZ6oUzgyf-C47bs6WSk59E7bESIctMPOhQIXT6hTDPpWoO73EH23TmDzEjsHlHYnj-X6zJZl8a3edI5UY9D4kggZ8s4PE80LmXIWcjmQHJnLhzIxWJUm85SBRx2_0BakIITcjADPkjsFyw2YczZpj7FJz5Grpq-mp)**

clean_body: “That’s crazy.” “I don’t believe that.” “That can’t be.” | | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now. | | | | | | I’m reaching out to you today with a personal and urgent message. I’m writing to you because I’m fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, corrupt untouchable judges, and an unconstitutional court order from “transitioning” my twelve year old son James against my will. This is an old photo...I don’t even know what my son looks like now.I haven’t seen him in years.But I will never stop fighting.I need to save my son, who was taken away from me by court order.Who was forced to change into girls’ clothing by the school counselors after I dropped him off.Without my knowledge. My son is twelve years old. And despite residing in Texas, and Texas courts ruling that no gender reassignment may be permitted without consent, my son was whisked away to a California court infamous for transgender rulings against parents.And after a corrupt transgender judge ruled against me. My son is now just months away from being chemically castrated. I have partnered with the Patriot’s Legal Defense Fund to fight against these family court sham rulings that are advancing a political agenda by hook or by crook. This Patriot’s Legal Defense Fund will help me have the resources to fight this fight with the determination and vigor necessary to save my son – without having to worry about looming massive financial burdens.And it will help me pursue this battle to the end. Making sure these corrupt judges and politicians are held accountable – so that they cannot do this to hundreds of families across the country. These dark conspiracies to mutilate children are pure evil – and we have to stop this madness from ever happening to another child.Let alone my own son. | | | | | | | I’ve been fighting this for years. This all started when my son was only 5 years old. And it’s been a truly exhausting battle but now that a California court has ruled that my son can be chemically castrated I need to kick my efforts into overdrive.And I’m going to need all the help I can get.The patriot’s legal team will help me file to have judges removed and to open case details to the public. And they will be with me every step of the way making sure I have the resources to fight against the massive Leftist pro-trans movement and the Billions of dollars they can spend destroying families and mutilating kids to advance their political movement.I know that Donald Trump won because Conservatives like you and I are waking up every day to the evil that’s seeped into our country over the last decade. Thank you for standing with me against this evil. If you are not able to make a contribution please forward my message to your friends and family to spread awareness for my campaign to save my son.Sincerely,Jeff Younger. Patriot's Legal Defense Fund601 Baffie Avenue Winter Park, Florida 32789

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: When is Easter this year?
body:
| | | Brave Books is spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" revival campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate...
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Believer, It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only about 12 weeks away.And in that short amount of time, my friends at Brave Books are spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate......to Jesus.And this revival mission needs you! My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood......by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love.Here’s exactly what their strategy is...First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created _Saving the Easter Bunny_ , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic.In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin.Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible.And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "_Mouse in the House_ ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' 12-week "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ big-time. **[And today I'm hoping you'll help them kick it into high gear before orders start pouring in by rushing back your best "Prepare the Way" gift.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=2e00f0a305554bf0833128129834b76d&_e=d70eC8bVUELH1w2ZoKsQjNqhAGl-KmEjjGQD8hYvK8hIxBy-GEa4nm3BIsEG4YuSA_v-qp4I7d0BIsy0JJ5m_yPFd1gsD6rqdYwcC7UomzUnIfgk7fAcTChtVPMh0gZp4JYnWJSY3grCIt5tphyQxEbCoId0Sz4dkgBVcT_a-23JErgYbv79inzYadK_DsU0utSgP8qzPXn-oCI6KebMTfS5IByK2pIGRr-zPYvZqpHZtWer_teoBjx-Mhb5eQW3tmNCyzjNqpq64LfT2kr_VCG6SH-95WBcoKMeqxjGbfp6y9G7OxWcyA_Ry-bYwvBXfpN8fWpfn0UnbumOcZFnmRkMZJfpVToapHOqZJBoU6CaYADUVlOiArDUkguhzbZy)** No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done:

It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ and a 17-city church tour.

President Donald Trump's director of national intelligence nominee **[Tulsi Gabbard fired back with an unexpected answer](https://substack.com/redirect/a45a8c08-af05-4ccb-ba58-f5c3e8daafbd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during her dramatic confirmation hearing this week when one Democrat's question crossed the line.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5ad4bec6-929f-4423-9165-77814781befd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Democrat Senator Mark Kelly asked Gabbard about several past claims she made that the U.S. government "provided direct and indirect support to terrorist groups" including Al Qaeda to overthrow the Syrian regime.
Gabbard gave a clear answer, naming the Obama administration and CIA, who she says launched a "regime change war in Syria" that involved supporting terror groups.
"Senator, every American deserves to know that people in our own government were providing support to our sworn enemy, Al Qaeda. That should not be acceptable by anyone," Gabbard answered.
**[Watch the tense moment here:](https://substack.com/redirect/a45a8c08-af05-4ccb-ba58-f5c3e8daafbd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/5ad4bec6-929f-4423-9165-77814781befd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Kayleigh McEnany DESTROYS Jim Acosta's entire career live on Fox News**
Former Trump Press Secretary and Fox News host Kayleigh McEnany **[humiliated CNN's Jim Acosta](https://substack.com/redirect/34a2a51f-90c7-492a-83e0-b99ba26e3ca3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a brutal segment responding to him pandering to his dwindling audience on CNN.
She couldn't help but crack up laughing at him:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/34a2a51f-90c7-492a-83e0-b99ba26e3ca3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Let me remind you that this is the same Jim Acosta who openly expresses his contempt for Trump," McEnany said, cutting to a flashback of herself mercilessly destroying Acosta in the White House press room for asking misleading questions meant to demonize Trump.
Acosta announced this week that he will be leaving CNN after rejecting an offer to move his show to an unfavorable later slot.
**[Watch McEnany roast Acosta to his face:](https://substack.com/redirect/a45a8c08-af05-4ccb-ba58-f5c3e8daafbd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6195b3bd734541cd8c25b165520bf45d&_e=Up5H8smwNCO4vi-tsvzxqZZiwwhSk1kGMQFxZMYqzcGxoS40c4-CR0JcXHBilZN6R-GeMTGVnPGni39fu_mlnUzKP810n_kCVt-ZmBj4k0MQXokSvlat2sDQYwWDn8s3rTSRqhjtfGD4cYpEOqyF9qwUmwccwope7eSUibMlHe7-fPEFxLSVLB-5-XI0srRTYZ-T4weo_JY2lGFMjlUmtWTJzNVfgjhE7wdljdUkPTA4w4rqosXY9Xji-r_OfQtVl_A-J420KVA_SVvEK6vO6BiwcTUKTx15ovYx5BkQNa2J4xvTZPu2j_shKIgdz4ewNGVtC_dVp7GtwmVx4lt0uil9sJLMb80zjC8f5qRd8F_fvTTtOP0HRUClW8t1Ol6KYwvI5iQ7jGieyI-ZCzaME4S-iNBfGzdJrXOI2lJZ8cM%3D)
---
| | Everett Kelly sits atop the American Federation of Government Employees – the largest government union with dues collected from 800,000 workers – who are fighting tooth and nail to defend the “crown jewel” of the radical left......the deep-state. And, before President Trump even takes office, Everett Kelly and the other proponents of “unionized government” are making the rounds in the media attacking President Trump, attacking Elon Musk, attacking Vivek Ramaswamy, and conspiring with the outgoing Biden administration to extend collective bargaining agreements (an attempt to tie President trump’s hands on this issue for the next two years). **[**That is why the results of this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS will be tabulated and delivered to the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6195b3bd734541cd8c25b165520bf45d&_e=Up5H8smwNCO4vi-tsvzxqZZiwwhSk1kGMQFxZMYqzcGxoS40c4-CR0JcXHBilZN6R-GeMTGVnPGni39fu_mlnUzKP810n_kCVt-ZmBj4k0MQXokSvlat2sDQYwWDn8s3rTSRqhjtfGD4cYpEOqyF9qwUmwccwope7eSUibMlHe7-fPEFxLSVLB-5-XI0srRTYZ-T4weo_JY2lGFMjlUmtWTJzNVfgjhE7wdljdUkPTA4w4rqosXY9Xji-r_OfQtVl_A-J420KVA_SVvEK6vO6C6sHZOXv07svkTK2bnZWTvHt8CtZmeKtfH2pfCNE5NjiQu7HBfPBqP5r7P8kNFa-DavTt2n6EEMF2u2BdNaM0jmpsYqbuvMYWdEXUR0k374fusNGBWZ9nttXga7bZD9mZRtJdFLTyYfAAp_K0w-tuY%3D)** Your participation is of the utmost importance.
---
* _Do you believe it’s acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%._
* _Did you know that in addition to 15 cabinet departments, there are over 2,000 federal agencies?_
* _Were you aware that leasing and maintenance costs for federal office buildings costs $15.7 billion per year?_
* _Or that the occupancy of these buildings is 12% on average?_
* _What about the fact that it’s nearly impossible to fire a federal employee?_

---
These are the questions on part one of the **[**NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6195b3bd734541cd8c25b165520bf45d&_e=Up5H8smwNCO4vi-tsvzxqZZiwwhSk1kGMQFxZMYqzcGxoS40c4-CR0JcXHBilZN6R-GeMTGVnPGni39fu_mlnUzKP810n_kCVt-ZmBj4k0MQXokSvlat2sDQYwWDn8s3rTSRqhjtfGD4cYpEOqyF9qwUmwccwope7eSUibMlHe7-fPEFxLSVLB-5-XI0srRTYZ-T4weo_JY2lGFMjlUmtWTJzNVfgjhE7wdljdUkPTA4w4rqosXY9Xji-r_OfQtVl_A-J420KVA_SVvEK6vO6Np5CfNsW0b4Man37hu-OsjyKYIepn8uqixUKiw6eqXZ6Q11UoGosSlBit6q6c1f87lNawYXW2lqsu6b44Bony7bcH2R5Qe6cujAXmla2m7oFigfOqsKbrhJhcMkWvufTHqBqjBUfaTlU5D1f5GcSVA%3D)** And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who’ve burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servant”).CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration.
---
* _Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government?_
* _Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch?_
* _Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service?_
* _Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats?_

---
You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability.It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America... one that I’m intimately familiar with... because I helped to write and execute it when I was a member of the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s.I know from first-hand experience how Marxist radicals sought to infiltrate every facet of American life... _Schools. Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood. _And, yes, the federal bureaucracy.Now, I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left’s tactics against them – tactics like those outlined in Saul Alinsky’s “Rules for Radicals” ... in other words we fight fire with fire. Today, I’m asking you to join the Freedom Center in exposing the threat posed by government unions to the mandate delivered by American voters in the 2024 election. **[**Your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS is the key to reaffirming this mandate by demonstrating the consensus that exists to remove the obstructionist deep-state.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6195b3bd734541cd8c25b165520bf45d&_e=Up5H8smwNCO4vi-tsvzxqZZiwwhSk1kGMQFxZMYqzcGxoS40c4-CR0JcXHBilZN6R-GeMTGVnPGni39fu_mlnUzKP810n_kCVt-ZmBj4k0MQXokSvlat2sDQYwWDn8s3rTSRqhjtfGD4cYpEOqyF9qwUmwccwope7eSUibMlHe7-fPEFxLSVLB-5-XI0srRTYZ-T4weo_JY2lGFMjlUmtWTJzNVfgjhE7wdljdUkPTA4w4rqosXY9Xji-r_OfQtVl_A-J420KVA_SVvEK6vO6IF5TEFqlFV8AFo1BDePC64WgqD08aH5IFU179IgfRdK96wuVLL_iHdl4V14dsU2xPjoz1aFyohvy53_MyzxdrmU52AXHWBmFQnxeCM7PUfoEXzJ7D190edD8534e7uFcBR0Gqz8jpGnphvftiVkQTw%3D)** Please complete it as soon as possible. There’s no time to lose.The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. It is vitally important that we circulate 1 million of these surveys, so there can be no doubt where our country stands on this issue.Because if the threat of government unions is not broken, banned, and outlawed over the next two years... then it _never_ will. As I mentioned, the results of this survey will be reported to Elon Musk, Vivek Ramaswamy, and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) whose charter expires on July 4, 2026 – on our nation’s 250th birthday. You see, we’ve got a very tight deadline to accomplish this mission. **[That’s why I’m asking you to complete your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS without delay.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6195b3bd734541cd8c25b165520bf45d&_e=Up5H8smwNCO4vi-tsvzxqZZiwwhSk1kGMQFxZMYqzcGxoS40c4-CR0JcXHBilZN6R-GeMTGVnPGni39fu_mlnUzKP810n_kCVt-ZmBj4k0MQXokSvlat2sDQYwWDn8s3rTSRqhjtfGD4cYpEOqyF9qwUmwccwope7eSUibMlHe7-fPEFxLSVLB-5-XI0srRTYZ-T4weo_JY2lGFMjlUmtWTJzNVfgjhE7wdljdUkPTA4w4rqosXY9Xji-r_OfQtVl_A-J420KVA_SVvEK6vO6DKL0DkCC8rp4eyXph-SS9cUY3AVljqXpZqHU_DxQC4uRZwcreJGVHwAp0gnv8kPEp7Q_VBvU9pABcZy_FHUDHZYxqStcpo8Cw9n6whCIJgFGpYacszNQJTB8oqv2mY3YzFkhNl2uqWJIGfl7HZJvXw%3D)** And that’s why **I’m also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35** when you do. It’s going to take an enormous grassroots effort to circulate, collect, and tabulate the results of these surveys to the Department of Government Efficiency.**That said, if you can send a larger contribution – $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000, or more – it will supercharge this campaign.** I want you to know that the Freedom Center will maximize every dollar you contribute. We’ve had “woke” corporations and financial institutions conspire to “de-bank” and “de-platform” us before:
---
* They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on).
* We had to find a new bank after the local bank we’ve been at for years suddenly closed our accounts.
* The hotel we’ve held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly declined to renew our contract.

---
You see, because of our effectiveness in fighting for conservative principles, they hate us. Like President Trump, we’ve faced countless lies, leaks, and lawfare attempts from the Left. But I refuse to back down.Especially against the wasteful, constitution-subverting unions that make up the federal deep-state. So please hurry. With your support today, I’m confident we can win this fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6195b3bd734541cd8c25b165520bf45d&_e=Up5H8smwNCO4vi-tsvzxqZZiwwhSk1kGMQFxZMYqzcGxoS40c4-CR0JcXHBilZN6R-GeMTGVnPGni39fu_mlnUzKP810n_kCVt-ZmBj4k0MQXokSvlat2sDQYwWDn8s3rTSRqhjtfGD4cYpEOqyF9qwUmwccwope7eSUibMlHe7-fPEFxLSVLB-5-XI0srRTYZ-T4weo_JY2lGFMjlUmtWTJzNVfgjhE7wdljdUkPTA4w4rqosXY9Xji-r_OfQtVl_A-J420KVA_SVvEK6vO6NKmaLdZhrhanOT6sy6RMbvYP9B2PaPyRarnqsfNbeYsN_J5dQ079Bp5sipzV7ntsntwo6s9pafQlXspqr9jjieR_4Jpv8SGIv0vZsevB9_wAI5eQjwsz_JfeRKviA7Nn5hjAnLL_mdM9wcL5JEA6ss%3D)

| | **David Horowitz**

According to their website: “** _On average, AFGE members pay between $18 - $22 per pay period for union dues_**.” **[**Your survey and your financial support are of the utmost importance in this fight to overcome the illegal, ill-gotten influence of these government unions.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6195b3bd734541cd8c25b165520bf45d&_e=Up5H8smwNCO4vi-tsvzxqZZiwwhSk1kGMQFxZMYqzcGxoS40c4-CR0JcXHBilZN6R-GeMTGVnPGni39fu_mlnUzKP810n_kCVt-ZmBj4k0MQXokSvlat2sDQYwWDn8s3rTSRqhjtfGD4cYpEOqyF9qwUmwccwope7eSUibMlHe7-fPEFxLSVLB-5-XI0srRTYZ-T4weo_JY2lGFMjlUmtWTJzNVfgjhE7wdljdUkPTA4w4rqosXY9Xji-r_OfQtVl_A-J420KVA_SVvEK6vO6JYB1dkQiy3WnWHvx9hL16FSZ3uSs-0HGpGQmTmk1-tS1HMmSV4LAUJSeEUG8CKKSp3uGMnDymerzLNo1HKis-Kh4KJBH9D-KjWeG9lBuBWttVjjM5b6Aq4DLcBYRbXX9h3WJ3xJKfGdpDbzat01LR0%3D)**
